authors_text: Mingyu Cai,Shaoping Xiao,Baoluo Li,Zhiliang Li,Zhen Kan
title: Reinforcement Learning Based Temporal Logic Control with Maximum Probabilistic Satisfaction
title_zh: 基于强化学习的时态逻辑控制，具有最大概率满足
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.02791
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.02791
abstract: This paper presents a model-free reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm to synthesize a control policy that maximizes the satisfaction probability of linear temporal logic (LTL) specifications. Due to the consideration of environment and motion uncertainties, we model the robot motion as a probabilistic labeled Markov decision process with unknown transition probabilities and unknown probabilistic label functions. The LTL task specification is converted to a limit deterministic generalized Büchi automaton (LDGBA) with several accepting sets to maintain dense rewards during learning. The novelty of applying LDGBA is to construct an embedded LDGBA (E-LDGBA) by designing a synchronous tracking-frontier function, which enables the record of non-visited accepting sets without increasing dimensional and computational complexity. With appropriate dependent reward and discount functions, rigorous analysis shows that any method that optimizes the expected discount return of the RL-based approach is guaranteed to find the optimal policy that maximizes the satisfaction probability of the LTL specifications. A model-free RL-based motion planning strategy is developed to generate the optimal policy in this paper. The effectiveness of the RL-based control synthesis is demonstrated via simulation and experimental results.
summary: This paper presents a model-free reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm to synthesize a control policy that maximizes the satisfaction probability of linear temporal logic (LTL) specifications. Due to the consideration of environment and motion uncertainties, we model the robot motion as a probabilistic labeled Markov decision process with unknown transition probabilities and unknown probabilistic label functions. The LTL task specification is converted to a limit deterministic generalized Büchi automaton (LDGBA) with several accepting sets to maintain dense rewards during learning. The novelty of applying LDGBA is to construct an embedded LDGBA (E-LDGBA) by designing a synchronous tracking-frontier function, which enables the record of non-visited accepting sets without increasing dimensional and computational complexity. With appropriate dependent reward and discount functions, rigorous analysis shows that any method that optimizes the expected discount return of the RL-based approach is guaranteed to find the optimal policy that maximizes the satisfaction probability of the LTL specifications. A model-free RL-based motion planning strategy is developed to generate the optimal policy in this paper. The effectiveness of the RL-based control synthesis is demonstrated via simulation and experimental results.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种无模型强化学习（RL）算法来合成控制策略，最大化线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范的满足概率。由于考虑环境和运动不确定性，我们将机器人运动建模为具有未知转移概率和未知概率标签函数的概率标记马尔可夫决策过程。 LTL 任务规范被转换为具有多个接受集的极限确定性广义 Büchi 自动机 (LDGBA)，以在学习过程中保持密集奖励。应用LDGBA的新颖之处在于通过设计同步跟踪前沿函数来构造嵌入式LDGBA（E-LDGBA），该函数能够在不增加维度和计算复杂性的情况下记录未访问的接受集。通过适当的相关奖励和折扣函数，严格的分析表明，任何优化基于 RL 的方法的预期折扣回报的方法都可以保证找到最大化 LTL 规范的满足概率的最优策略。本文开发了一种基于强化学习的无模型运动规划策略来生成最优策略。通过仿真和实验结果证明了基于强化学习的控制综合的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的模型自由算法，用于合成最大化线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范满足概率的控制策略。
AI.motivation: 针对环境和运动不确定性，传统方法难以处理未知转移概率和概率标签函数的机器人运动控制问题，需设计鲁棒的控制策略以满足时序逻辑规范。
AI.method: 将机器人运动建模为具有未知转移概率和标签函数的概率标记马尔可夫决策过程（PLMDP），通过同步跟踪前沿函数构建嵌入式LDGBA（E-LDGBA）并设计依赖奖励与折扣函数，利用强化学习优化期望折扣回报以保证最优策略。
AI.result: 通过仿真与实验验证，所提出的基于强化学习的控制合成方法能有效生成满足LTL规范的最优策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过结合强化学习与LDGBA，成功解决了不确定环境下时序逻辑控制的策略合成问题，为复杂动态场景提供了理论保证与实践验证。

authors_text: Bardia Yousefi,Clemente Ibarra Castanedo,Xavier P. V. Maldague
title: Low-rank Convex/Sparse Thermal Matrix Approximation for Infrared-based Diagnostic System
title_zh: 基于红外的诊断系统的低秩凸/稀疏热矩阵近似
comment: Authors version
comments: Authors version
abstract: Active and passive thermography are two efficient techniques extensively used to measure heterogeneous thermal patterns leading to subsurface defects for diagnostic evaluations. This study conducts a comparative analysis on low-rank matrix approximation methods in thermography with applications of semi-, convex-, and sparse- non-negative matrix factorization (NMF) methods for detecting subsurface thermal patterns. These methods inherit the advantages of principal component thermography (PCT) and sparse PCT, whereas tackle negative bases in sparse PCT with non-negative constraints, and exhibit clustering property in processing data. The practicality and efficiency of these methods are demonstrated by the experimental results for subsurface defect detection in three specimens (for different depth and size defects) and preserving thermal heterogeneity for distinguishing breast abnormality in breast cancer screening dataset (accuracy of 74.1%, 75.8%, and 77.8%).
summary: Active and passive thermography are two efficient techniques extensively used to measure heterogeneous thermal patterns leading to subsurface defects for diagnostic evaluations. This study conducts a comparative analysis on low-rank matrix approximation methods in thermography with applications of semi-, convex-, and sparse- non-negative matrix factorization (NMF) methods for detecting subsurface thermal patterns. These methods inherit the advantages of principal component thermography (PCT) and sparse PCT, whereas tackle negative bases in sparse PCT with non-negative constraints, and exhibit clustering property in processing data. The practicality and efficiency of these methods are demonstrated by the experimental results for subsurface defect detection in three specimens (for different depth and size defects) and preserving thermal heterogeneity for distinguishing breast abnormality in breast cancer screening dataset (accuracy of 74.1%, 75.8%, and 77.8%).
abstract_zh: 主动和被动热成像是两种有效的技术，广泛用于测量导致地下缺陷的异质热模式以进行诊断评估。本研究对热成像中的低秩矩阵近似方法与用于检测地下热模式的半、凸和稀疏非负矩阵分解 (NMF) 方法的应用进行了比较分析。这些方法继承了主成分热成像（PCT）和稀疏PCT的优点，同时在非负约束下处理稀疏PCT中的负基，并在处理数据时表现出聚类特性。这些方法的实用性和效率通过三个样本的地下缺陷检测（针对不同深度和大小的缺陷）以及在乳腺癌筛查数据集中保留热异质性以区分乳腺异常的实验结果得到了证明（准确度分别为 74.1%、75.8% 和 77.8%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于低秩凸/稀疏热矩阵逼近的方法，用于红外诊断系统中的亚表面缺陷检测。
AI.motivation: 传统热成像方法（如PCT）存在负基问题且难以聚类数据，需改进方法以提升缺陷检测精度与实用性。
AI.method: 采用半非负、凸性和稀疏非负矩阵分解（NMF）方法，结合非负约束处理负基问题，并通过实验验证其聚类特性。
AI.result: 在三种不同缺陷深度/尺寸样品及乳腺癌筛查数据集上实现74.1%-77.8%的准确率，有效保留热异质性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在亚表面缺陷检测中兼具实用性与高效性，为红外热成像诊断提供新思路。

authors_text: Peng Peng,Jiugen Wang
title: Ferrograph image classification
title_zh: 铁谱图像分类
abstract: It has been challenging to identify ferrograph images with a small dataset and various scales of wear particle. A novel model is proposed in this study to cope with these challenging problems. For the problem of insufficient samples, we first proposed a data augmentation algorithm based on the permutation of image patches. Then, an auxiliary loss function of image patch permutation recognition was proposed to identify the image generated by the data augmentation algorithm. Moreover, we designed a feature extraction loss function to force the proposed model to extract more abundant features and to reduce redundant representations. As for the challenge of large change range of wear particle size, we proposed a multi-scale feature extraction block to obtain the multi-scale representations of wear particles. We carried out experiments on a ferrograph image dataset and a mini-CIFAR-10 dataset. Experimental results show that the proposed model can improve the accuracy of the two datasets by 9% and 20% respectively compared with the baseline.
summary: It has been challenging to identify ferrograph images with a small dataset and various scales of wear particle. A novel model is proposed in this study to cope with these challenging problems. For the problem of insufficient samples, we first proposed a data augmentation algorithm based on the permutation of image patches. Then, an auxiliary loss function of image patch permutation recognition was proposed to identify the image generated by the data augmentation algorithm. Moreover, we designed a feature extraction loss function to force the proposed model to extract more abundant features and to reduce redundant representations. As for the challenge of large change range of wear particle size, we proposed a multi-scale feature extraction block to obtain the multi-scale representations of wear particles. We carried out experiments on a ferrograph image dataset and a mini-CIFAR-10 dataset. Experimental results show that the proposed model can improve the accuracy of the two datasets by 9% and 20% respectively compared with the baseline.
abstract_zh: 识别具有小数据集和不同尺度磨损颗粒的铁谱图像一直是一项挑战。本研究提出了一种新颖的模型来应对这些具有挑战性的问题。针对样本不足​​的问题，我们首先提出了一种基于图像块排列的数据增强算法。然后，提出了图像块排列识别的辅助损失函数来识别数据增强算法生成的图像。此外，我们设计了特征提取损失函数，以迫使所提出的模型提取更丰富的特征并减少冗余表示。针对磨损颗粒尺寸变化范围大的挑战，我们提出了一种多尺度特征提取块来获得磨损颗粒的多尺度表示。我们在铁谱图像数据集和迷你 CIFAR-10 数据集上进行了实验。实验结果表明，与基线相比，所提出的模型可以将两个数据集的准确率分别提高9%和20%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型模型，用于解决在小数据集和磨损颗粒多尺度变化情况下铁谱图像分类的挑战。
AI.motivation: 铁谱图像分类面临样本不足和磨损颗粒尺寸变化范围大的问题，传统方法难以有效提升分类准确率。
AI.method: 提出基于图像块置换的数据增强算法，设计辅助损失函数识别增强图像，并构建多尺度特征提取模块以捕捉不同尺寸磨损颗粒的特征。
AI.result: 在铁谱图像数据集和mini-CIFAR-10数据集上，分类准确率分别提升9%和20%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过数据增强和多尺度特征提取有效解决了小样本和尺度变化问题，验证了模型在铁谱图像分类中的优越性。

search_text: Ferrograph image classification 铁谱图像分类 It has been challenging to identify ferrograph images with a small dataset and various scales of wear particle. A novel model is proposed in this study to cope with these challenging problems. For the problem of insufficient samples, we first proposed a data augmentation algorithm based on the permutation of image patches. Then, an auxiliary loss function of image patch permutation recognition was proposed to identify the image generated by the data augmentation algorithm. Moreover, we designed a feature extraction loss function to force the proposed model to extract more abundant features and to reduce redundant representations. As for the challenge of large change range of wear particle size, we proposed a multi-scale feature extraction block to obtain the multi-scale representations of wear particles. We carried out experiments on a ferrograph image dataset and a mini-CIFAR-10 dataset. Experimental results show that the proposed model can improve the accuracy of the two datasets by 9% and 20% respectively compared with the baseline. 识别具有小数据集和不同尺度磨损颗粒的铁谱图像一直是一项挑战。本研究提出了一种新颖的模型来应对这些具有挑战性的问题。针对样本不足​​的问题，我们首先提出了一种基于图像块排列的数据增强算法。然后，提出了图像块排列识别的辅助损失函数来识别数据增强算法生成的图像。此外，我们设计了特征提取损失函数，以迫使所提出的模型提取更丰富的特征并减少冗余表示。针对磨损颗粒尺寸变化范围大的挑战，我们提出了一种多尺度特征提取块来获得磨损颗粒的多尺度表示。我们在铁谱图像数据集和迷你 CIFAR-10 数据集上进行了实验。实验结果表明，与基线相比，所提出的模型可以将两个数据集的准确率分别提高9%和20%。 本文提出一种新型模型，用于解决在小数据集和磨损颗粒多尺度变化情况下铁谱图像分类的挑战。 Peng Peng,Jiugen Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Tan,Mohit Bansal
title: Vokenization: Improving Language Understanding with Contextualized, Visual-Grounded Supervision
title_zh: Vokenization：通过情境化、基于视觉的监督提高语言理解
comment: EMNLP 2020 (15 pages)
comments: EMNLP 2020 (15 pages)
abstract: Humans learn language by listening, speaking, writing, reading, and also, via interaction with the multimodal real world. Existing language pre-training frameworks show the effectiveness of text-only self-supervision while we explore the idea of a visually-supervised language model in this paper. We find that the main reason hindering this exploration is the large divergence in magnitude and distributions between the visually-grounded language datasets and pure-language corpora. Therefore, we develop a technique named "vokenization" that extrapolates multimodal alignments to language-only data by contextually mapping language tokens to their related images (which we call "vokens"). The "vokenizer" is trained on relatively small image captioning datasets and we then apply it to generate vokens for large language corpora. Trained with these contextually generated vokens, our visually-supervised language models show consistent improvements over self-supervised alternatives on multiple pure-language tasks such as GLUE, SQuAD, and SWAG. Code and pre-trained models publicly available at https://github.com/airsplay/vokenization
summary: Humans learn language by listening, speaking, writing, reading, and also, via interaction with the multimodal real world. Existing language pre-training frameworks show the effectiveness of text-only self-supervision while we explore the idea of a visually-supervised language model in this paper. We find that the main reason hindering this exploration is the large divergence in magnitude and distributions between the visually-grounded language datasets and pure-language corpora. Therefore, we develop a technique named "vokenization" that extrapolates multimodal alignments to language-only data by contextually mapping language tokens to their related images (which we call "vokens"). The "vokenizer" is trained on relatively small image captioning datasets and we then apply it to generate vokens for large language corpora. Trained with these contextually generated vokens, our visually-supervised language models show consistent improvements over self-supervised alternatives on multiple pure-language tasks such as GLUE, SQuAD, and SWAG. Code and pre-trained models publicly available at https://github.com/airsplay/vokenization
abstract_zh: 人类通过听、说、写、读以及与多模式现实世界的互动来学习语言。现有的语言预训练框架显示了纯文本自我监督的有效性，而我们在本文中探索了视觉监督语言模型的想法。我们发现阻碍这种探索的主要原因是基于视觉的语言数据集和纯语言语料库之间的数量级和分布存在巨大差异。因此，我们开发了一种名为“vokenization”的技术，通过将语言标记上下文映射到其相关图像（我们称之为“vokens”），将多模态对齐推断为纯语言数据。 “vokenizer”在相对较小的图像字幕数据集上进行训练，然后我们应用它来为大型语言语料库生成 voken。使用这些上下文生成的 voken 进行训练，我们的视觉监督语言模型在多种纯语言任务（例如 GLUE、SQuAD 和 SWAG）上显示出比自我监督替代方案的一致改进。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/airsplay/vokenization 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'vokenization'的新方法，通过视觉引导的上下文监督来增强语言模型的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有语言预训练框架依赖纯文本自监督，但视觉引导数据与纯文本数据在分布和数量级上存在显著差异，阻碍了视觉监督的有效应用。
AI.method: 开发'vokenizer'技术，通过小规模图像字幕数据集训练上下文映射模型，将语言标记映射到相关图像生成'voken'，再应用于大规模纯文本语料训练语言模型。
AI.result: 在GLUE、SQuAD和SWAG等纯文本任务中，视觉监督模型性能优于自监督模型，且代码与预训练模型已公开。
AI.conclusion: vokenization有效弥合视觉与文本数据差异，证明了跨模态上下文监督对语言理解的提升作用，为多模态预训练提供新思路。

authors_text: Joshua Thorpe,Ruwan Tennakoon,Alireza Bab-Hadiashar
title: Rotation Averaging with Attention Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用注意力图神经网络进行旋转平均
abstract: In this paper we propose a real-time and robust solution to large-scale multiple rotation averaging. Until recently, Multiple rotation averaging problem had been solved using conventional iterative optimization algorithms. Such methods employed robust cost functions that were chosen based on assumptions made about the sensor noise and outlier distribution. In practice, these assumptions do not always fit real datasets very well. A recent work showed that the noise distribution could be learnt using a graph neural network. This solution required a second network for outlier detection and removal as the averaging network was sensitive to a poor initialization. In this paper we propose a single-stage graph neural network that can robustly perform rotation averaging in the presence of noise and outliers. Our method uses all observations, suppressing outliers effects through the use of weighted averaging and an attention mechanism within the network design. The result is a network that is faster, more robust and can be trained with less samples than the previous neural approach, ultimately outperforming conventional iterative algorithms in accuracy and in inference times.
summary: In this paper we propose a real-time and robust solution to large-scale multiple rotation averaging. Until recently, Multiple rotation averaging problem had been solved using conventional iterative optimization algorithms. Such methods employed robust cost functions that were chosen based on assumptions made about the sensor noise and outlier distribution. In practice, these assumptions do not always fit real datasets very well. A recent work showed that the noise distribution could be learnt using a graph neural network. This solution required a second network for outlier detection and removal as the averaging network was sensitive to a poor initialization. In this paper we propose a single-stage graph neural network that can robustly perform rotation averaging in the presence of noise and outliers. Our method uses all observations, suppressing outliers effects through the use of weighted averaging and an attention mechanism within the network design. The result is a network that is faster, more robust and can be trained with less samples than the previous neural approach, ultimately outperforming conventional iterative algorithms in accuracy and in inference times.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种实时且鲁棒的大规模多次旋转平均解决方案。直到最近，多次旋转平均问题还可以使用传统的迭代优化算法来解决。此类方法采用了基于对传感器噪声和异常值分布的假设而选择的鲁棒成本函数。在实践中，这些假设并不总是非常适合真实的数据集。最近的一项工作表明，可以使用图神经网络来学习噪声分布。该解决方案需要第二个网络来检测和删除异常值，因为平均网络对不良初始化很敏感。在本文中，我们提出了一种单阶段图神经网络，它可以在存在噪声和异常值的情况下稳健地执行旋转平均。我们的方法使用所有观察结果，通过在网络设计中使用加权平均和注意机制来抑制异常值影响。与之前的神经方法相比，其结果是一个更快、更稳健的网络，并且可以使用更少的样本进行训练，最终在准确性和推理时间方面优于传统的迭代算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力图神经网络的实时且鲁棒的大规模多旋转平均方法。
AI.motivation: 传统迭代优化算法依赖对噪声和异常值分布的假设，难以适应实际数据；现有神经网络方法需额外网络进行异常值检测，效率较低。
AI.method: 设计单阶段图神经网络，结合加权平均与注意力机制，直接抑制异常值影响，无需单独的异常检测模块。
AI.result: 相较传统方法，该网络在精度和推理速度上表现更优，且训练样本需求更少。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过注意力机制与加权平均有效融合多源旋转数据，在鲁棒性与效率上实现突破。

In this paper we propose a single-stage graph neural network that can robustly perform rotation averaging in the presence of noise and outliers. Our method uses all observations, suppressing outliers effects through the use of weighted averaging and an attention mechanism within the network design. The result is a network that is faster, more robust and can be trained with less samples than the previous neural approach, ultimately outperforming conventional iterative algorithms in accuracy and in inference times. 在本文中，我们提出了一种实时且鲁棒的大规模多次旋转平均解决方案。直到最近，多次旋转平均问题还可以使用传统的迭代优化算法来解决。此类方法采用了基于对传感器噪声和异常值分布的假设而选择的鲁棒成本函数。在实践中，这些假设并不总是非常适合真实的数据集。最近的一项工作表明，可以使用图神经网络来学习噪声分布。该解决方案需要第二个网络来检测和删除异常值，因为平均网络对不良初始化很敏感。在本文中，我们提出了一种单阶段图神经网络，它可以在存在噪声和异常值的情况下稳健地执行旋转平均。我们的方法使用所有观察结果，通过在网络设计中使用加权平均和注意机制来抑制异常值影响。与之前的神经方法相比，其结果是一个更快、更稳健的网络，并且可以使用更少的样本进行训练，最终在准确性和推理时间方面优于传统的迭代算法。 本文提出了一种基于注意力图神经网络的实时且鲁棒的大规模多旋转平均方法。 Joshua Thorpe,Ruwan Tennakoon,Alireza Bab-Hadiashar cs.CV

authors_text: Michaël Dubé,Thierry Laliberté,Véronique Flamand,François Routhier,Alexandre Campeau-Lecours
title: Mechanical Design Improvement of a Passive Device to Assist Eating in People Living with Movement Disorders
title_zh: 辅助运动障碍患者进食的被动装置的机械设计改进
comment: ef:Rehabilitation Engineering Society of North America (now Rehabilitation Engineering and Assistive Technology Society of North America (RESNA), 2020
comments: ef:Rehabilitation Engineering Society of North America (now Rehabilitation Engineering and Assistive Technology Society of North America (RESNA), 2020
abstract: Many people living with neurological disorders, such as cerebral palsy, stroke, muscular dystrophy or dystonia experience upper limb impairments (muscle spasticity, loss of selective motor control, muscle weakness or tremors) and have difficulty to eat independently. The general goal of this project is to develop a new device to assist with eating, aimed at stabilizing the movement of people who have movement disorders. A first iteration of the device was validated with children living with cerebral palsy and showed promising results. This validation however pointed out important drawbacks. This paper presents an iteration of the design which includes a new mechanism reducing the required arm elevation, improving safety through a compliant utensil attachment, and improving damping and other static balancing factors.
summary: Many people living with neurological disorders, such as cerebral palsy, stroke, muscular dystrophy or dystonia experience upper limb impairments (muscle spasticity, loss of selective motor control, muscle weakness or tremors) and have difficulty to eat independently. The general goal of this project is to develop a new device to assist with eating, aimed at stabilizing the movement of people who have movement disorders. A first iteration of the device was validated with children living with cerebral palsy and showed promising results. This validation however pointed out important drawbacks. This paper presents an iteration of the design which includes a new mechanism reducing the required arm elevation, improving safety through a compliant utensil attachment, and improving damping and other static balancing factors.
abstract_zh: 许多患有脑瘫、中风、肌营养不良或肌张力障碍等神经系统疾病的人都会出现上肢损伤（肌肉痉挛、失去选择性运动控制、肌肉无力或震颤），并且难以独立进食。该项目的总体目标是开发一种新的辅助进食装置，旨在稳定患有运动障碍的人的运动。该设备的第一次迭代在脑瘫儿童身上进行了验证，并显示出有希望的结果。然而，这一验证指出了重要的缺点。本文提出了设计的迭代，其中包括减少所需臂高度的新机制，通过顺应的器具附件提高安全性，以及改善阻尼和其他静态平衡因素。

AI.tldr: 改进一种被动装置的机械设计，以帮助运动障碍患者更安全、方便地进食。
AI.motivation: 运动障碍患者因上肢功能受损导致独立进食困难，现有辅助设备存在安全性和实用性不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过迭代设计优化机械结构，引入顺从性餐具附件，改进阻尼系统和静态平衡机制。
AI.result: 改进后的设备有效降低了手臂抬升需求，提高了使用安全性与稳定性，验证了设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 改进设计为运动障碍患者提供了更可靠、安全的进食辅助方案，为后续研发提供了参考。

authors_text: Gabrielle Lemire,Thierry Laliberté,Alexandre Campeau-Lecours
title: Mechanical Orthosis Mechanism to Facilitate the Extension of the Leg
title_zh: 机械矫形器机制促进腿部伸展
comment: Rehabilitation Engineering Society of North America (now Rehabilitation Engineering and Assistive Technology Society of North America (RESNA), 2020
comments: Rehabilitation Engineering Society of North America (now Rehabilitation Engineering and Assistive Technology Society of North America (RESNA), 2020
abstract: This paper presents the design of a mechanism to help people using mechanical orthoses to extend their legs easily and lock the knee joint of their orthosis. Many people living with spinal cord injury are living with paraplegia and thus need orthoses to be able to stand and walk. Mechanical orthoses are common types of orthopedic devices. This paper proposes to add a mechanism that creates a lever arm just below the knee joint to help the user extend the leg. The development of the mechanism is first presented, then followed by the results of the tests that were conducted.
summary: This paper presents the design of a mechanism to help people using mechanical orthoses to extend their legs easily and lock the knee joint of their orthosis. Many people living with spinal cord injury are living with paraplegia and thus need orthoses to be able to stand and walk. Mechanical orthoses are common types of orthopedic devices. This paper proposes to add a mechanism that creates a lever arm just below the knee joint to help the user extend the leg. The development of the mechanism is first presented, then followed by the results of the tests that were conducted.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种机构的设计，可以帮助使用机械矫形器的人们轻松伸展腿部并锁定矫形器的膝关节。许多脊髓损伤患者都患有截瘫，因此需要矫形器才能站立和行走。机械矫形器是常见的矫形器械类型。本文建议添加一种机制，在膝关节下方创建一个杠杆臂，以帮助用户伸展腿部。首先介绍了该机制的开发，然后介绍了所进行的测试结果。

AI.tldr: 设计一种机械矫形器机制，帮助用户轻松伸展腿部并锁定膝关节
AI.motivation: 为脊髓损伤导致截瘫的患者提供更便捷的站立和行走辅助，解决现有矫形器在腿部伸展和锁定方面的不足
AI.method: 在膝关节下方设计杠杆臂机制，通过力学原理辅助腿部伸展，并进行实验测试验证效果
AI.result: 测试结果验证了该机制在辅助腿部伸展和锁定膝关节方面的有效性，提升了使用的便利性
AI.conclusion: 该杠杆臂机制有效帮助用户伸展腿部并锁定膝关节，为脊髓损伤患者提供了更实用的矫形器解决方案

authors_text: Rollin Omari,R. I. McKay,Tom Gedeon
title: Analogical and Relational Reasoning with Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用尖峰神经网络进行类比和关系推理
comment: Problems were discovered with the details of the experiments involving the LSM neural network, the results reported were not correct. A new version of the paper is in progress with corrected results
comments: Problems were discovered with the details of the experiments involving the LSM neural network, the results reported were not correct. A new version of the paper is in progress with corrected results
abstract: Raven's Progressive Matrices have been widely used for measuring abstract reasoning and intelligence in humans. However for artificial learning systems, abstract reasoning remains a challenging problem. In this paper we investigate how neural networks augmented with biologically inspired spiking modules gain a significant advantage in solving this problem. To illustrate this, we first investigate the performance of our networks with supervised learning, then with unsupervised learning. Experiments on the RAVEN dataset show that the overall accuracy of our supervised networks surpass human-level performance, while our unsupervised networks significantly outperform existing unsupervised methods. Finally, our results from both supervised and unsupervised learning illustrate that, unlike their non-augmented counterparts, networks with spiking modules are able to extract and encode temporal features without any explicit instruction, do not heavily rely on training data, and generalise more readily to new problems. In summary, the results reported here indicate that artificial neural networks with spiking modules are well suited to solving abstract reasoning.
summary: Raven's Progressive Matrices have been widely used for measuring abstract reasoning and intelligence in humans. However for artificial learning systems, abstract reasoning remains a challenging problem. In this paper we investigate how neural networks augmented with biologically inspired spiking modules gain a significant advantage in solving this problem. To illustrate this, we first investigate the performance of our networks with supervised learning, then with unsupervised learning. Experiments on the RAVEN dataset show that the overall accuracy of our supervised networks surpass human-level performance, while our unsupervised networks significantly outperform existing unsupervised methods. Finally, our results from both supervised and unsupervised learning illustrate that, unlike their non-augmented counterparts, networks with spiking modules are able to extract and encode temporal features without any explicit instruction, do not heavily rely on training data, and generalise more readily to new problems. In summary, the results reported here indicate that artificial neural networks with spiking modules are well suited to solving abstract reasoning.
abstract_zh: 雷文渐进矩阵已广泛用于测量人类的抽象推理和智力。然而对于人工学习系统来说，抽象推理仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们研究了使用受生物学启发的尖峰模块增强的神经网络如何在解决该问题方面获得显着优势。为了说明这一点，我们首先通过监督学习来研究网络的性能，然后通过无监督学习来研究网络的性能。 RAVEN 数据集上的实验表明，我们的监督网络的整体准确性超过了人类水平的表现，而我们的无监督网络则显着优于现有的无监督方法。最后，我们的监督和无监督学习结果表明，与非增强型网络不同，具有尖峰模块的网络能够在没有任何明确指令的情况下提取和编码时间特征，不严重依赖训练数据，并且更容易推广到新问题。总之，这里报告的结果表明具有尖峰模块的人工神经网络非常适合解决抽象推理。

AI.tldr: 本文研究脉冲神经网络在解决类比和关系推理问题（如RAVEN数据集）中的表现，验证其通过生物启发式模块提升抽象推理能力的潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在抽象推理任务（如RAVEN矩阵）中表现有限，而生物启发的脉冲模块可能通过模拟神经元动态增强此类能力，需验证其有效性。
AI.method: 设计包含脉冲模块的神经网络，在RAVEN数据集上分别采用监督学习和无监督学习进行训练与测试，对比其与传统网络的性能差异。
AI.result: 监督网络准确率超越人类水平，无监督网络显著优于现有方法；脉冲模块可自主提取时间特征，减少对训练数据依赖并提升泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 脉冲神经网络因其生物合理性与动态特征提取能力，是解决抽象推理任务的有力工具。

method: 设计包含脉冲模块的神经网络，在RAVEN数据集上分别采用监督学习和无监督学习进行训练与测试，对比其与传统网络的性能差异。
result: 监督网络准确率超越人类水平，无监督网络显著优于现有方法；脉冲模块可自主提取时间特征，减少对训练数据依赖并提升泛化能力。
conclusion: 脉冲神经网络因其生物合理性与动态特征提取能力，是解决抽象推理任务的有力工具。
search_text: Analogical and Relational Reasoning with Spiking Neural Networks 使用尖峰神经网络进行类比和关系推理 Raven's Progressive Matrices have been widely used for measuring abstract reasoning and intelligence in humans. However for artificial learning systems, abstract reasoning remains a challenging problem. In this paper we investigate how neural networks augmented with biologically inspired spiking modules gain a significant advantage in solving this problem. To illustrate this, we first investigate the performance of our networks with supervised learning, then with unsupervised learning. Experiments on the RAVEN dataset show that the overall accuracy of our supervised networks surpass human-level performance, while our unsupervised networks significantly outperform existing unsupervised methods. Finally, our results from both supervised and unsupervised learning illustrate that, unlike their non-augmented counterparts, networks with spiking modules are able to extract and encode temporal features without any explicit instruction, do not heavily rely on training data, and generalise more readily to new problems. In summary, the results reported here indicate that artificial neural networks with spiking modules are well suited to solving abstract reasoning. 雷文渐进矩阵已广泛用于测量人类的抽象推理和智力。然而对于人工学习系统来说，抽象推理仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们研究了使用受生物学启发的尖峰模块增强的神经网络如何在解决该问题方面获得显着优势。为了说明这一点，我们首先通过监督学习来研究网络的性能，然后通过无监督学习来研究网络的性能。 RAVEN 数据集上的实验表明，我们的监督网络的整体准确性超过了人类水平的表现，而我们的无监督网络则显着优于现有的无监督方法。最后，我们的监督和无监督学习结果表明，与非增强型网络不同，具有尖峰模块的网络能够在没有任何明确指令的情况下提取和编码时间特征，不严重依赖训练数据，并且更容易推广到新问题。总之，这里报告的结果表明具有尖峰模块的人工神经网络非常适合解决抽象推理。 本文研究脉冲神经网络在解决类比和关系推理问题（如RAVEN数据集）中的表现，验证其通过生物启发式模块提升抽象推理能力的潜力。 Rollin Omari,R. I. McKay,Tom Gedeon cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jake Grigsby,Yanjun Qi
title: Measuring Visual Generalization in Continuous Control from Pixels
title_zh: 测量像素连续控制中的视觉泛化
comment: A total of 20 pages, 8 pages as the main text
comments: A total of 20 pages, 8 pages as the main text
abstract: Self-supervised learning and data augmentation have significantly reduced the performance gap between state and image-based reinforcement learning agents in continuous control tasks. However, it is still unclear whether current techniques can face a variety of visual conditions required by real-world environments. We propose a challenging benchmark that tests agents' visual generalization by adding graphical variety to existing continuous control domains. Our empirical analysis shows that current methods struggle to generalize across a diverse set of visual changes, and we examine the specific factors of variation that make these tasks difficult. We find that data augmentation techniques outperform self-supervised learning approaches and that more significant image transformations provide better visual generalization \footnote{The benchmark and our augmented actor-critic implementation are open-sourced @ https://github.com/QData/dmc_remastered)
summary: Self-supervised learning and data augmentation have significantly reduced the performance gap between state and image-based reinforcement learning agents in continuous control tasks. However, it is still unclear whether current techniques can face a variety of visual conditions required by real-world environments. We propose a challenging benchmark that tests agents' visual generalization by adding graphical variety to existing continuous control domains. Our empirical analysis shows that current methods struggle to generalize across a diverse set of visual changes, and we examine the specific factors of variation that make these tasks difficult. We find that data augmentation techniques outperform self-supervised learning approaches and that more significant image transformations provide better visual generalization \footnote{The benchmark and our augmented actor-critic implementation are open-sourced @ https://github.com/QData/dmc_remastered)
abstract_zh: 自监督学习和数据增强显着缩小了连续控制任务中状态强化学习代理和基于图像的强化学习代理之间的性能差距。然而，目前还不清楚当前的技术是否能够面对现实环境所需的各种视觉条件。我们提出了一个具有挑战性的基准，通过向现有的连续控制域添加图形多样性来测试智能体的视觉泛化能力。我们的实证分析表明，当前的方法很难概括各种不同的视觉变化，并且我们研究了使这些任务变得困难的具体变化因素。我们发现数据增强技术优于自监督学习方法，并且更重要的图像转换提供了更好的视觉泛化\脚注{基准和我们的增强演员评论家实现是开源的@https://github.com/QData/dmc_remastered）

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基准测试，通过增加视觉多样性评估连续控制中基于像素的强化学习代理的视觉泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习和数据增强缩小了状态与图像输入的性能差距，但现有技术在真实环境多变的视觉条件下仍存在泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.method: 构建包含图形多样性的连续控制基准，对比数据增强与自监督学习方法在不同视觉变化下的表现，并分析影响泛化的关键因素。
AI.result: 现有方法在多样化视觉场景中表现不佳，数据增强优于自监督学习，且更大幅度的图像变换能提升视觉泛化效果。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强技术更利于视觉泛化，但当前方法仍难以应对复杂视觉变化，需进一步研究鲁棒的视觉适应机制。

authors_text: Pulkit Sharma,Shezan Rohinton Mirzan,Apurva Bhandari,Anish Pimpley,Abhiram Eswaran,Soundar Srinivasan,Liqun Shao
title: Evaluating Tree Explanation Methods for Anomaly Reasoning: A Case Study of SHAP TreeExplainer and TreeInterpreter
title_zh: 评估异常推理的树解释方法：SHAP TreeExplainer 和 TreeInterpreter 案例研究
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables, CMAI workshop 2020
comments: 10 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables, CMAI workshop 2020
abstract: Understanding predictions made by Machine Learning models is critical in many applications. In this work, we investigate the performance of two methods for explaining tree-based models- Tree Interpreter (TI) and SHapley Additive exPlanations TreeExplainer (SHAP-TE). Using a case study on detecting anomalies in job runtimes of applications that utilize cloud-computing platforms, we compare these approaches using a variety of metrics, including computation time, significance of attribution value, and explanation accuracy. We find that, although the SHAP-TE offers consistency guarantees over TI, at the cost of increased computation, consistency does not necessarily improve the explanation performance in our case study.
summary: Understanding predictions made by Machine Learning models is critical in many applications. In this work, we investigate the performance of two methods for explaining tree-based models- Tree Interpreter (TI) and SHapley Additive exPlanations TreeExplainer (SHAP-TE). Using a case study on detecting anomalies in job runtimes of applications that utilize cloud-computing platforms, we compare these approaches using a variety of metrics, including computation time, significance of attribution value, and explanation accuracy. We find that, although the SHAP-TE offers consistency guarantees over TI, at the cost of increased computation, consistency does not necessarily improve the explanation performance in our case study.
abstract_zh: 理解机器学习模型做出的预测在许多应用中至关重要。在这项工作中，我们研究了两种解释基于树的模型的方法的性能 - Tree Interpreter (TI) 和 SHapley Additive exPlanations TreeExplainer (SHAP-TE)。通过使用云计算平台检测应用程序作业运行时异常的案例研究，我们使用各种指标来比较这些方法，包括计算时间、归因值的重要性和解释准确性。我们发现，尽管 SHAP-TE 提供了优于 TI 的一致性保证，但以增加计算为代价，一致性并不一定会提高我们案例研究中的解释性能。

AI.tldr: 本文通过云平台作业运行时异常检测案例，比较Tree Interpreter与SHAP-TreeExplainer两种树模型解释方法的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型可解释性对关键应用至关重要，但现有树模型解释方法在一致性与效率间的权衡尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用案例研究法，基于云计算场景的异常检测任务，从计算耗时、归因显著性及解释准确性三个维度对比评估两种方法。
AI.result: SHAP-TreeExplainer虽具理论一致性优势，但计算成本显著高于Tree Interpreter，且在实际解释效果上未表现出明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 理论一致性未必直接提升解释效果，实际应用中需综合考虑计算效率与具体任务需求选择解释方法。

authors_text: Haoyu Wang,Muhao Chen,Hongming Zhang,Dan Roth
title: Joint Constrained Learning for Event-Event Relation Extraction
title_zh: 事件-事件关系提取的联合约束学习
comment: EMNLP 2020
comments: EMNLP 2020
abstract: Understanding natural language involves recognizing how multiple event mentions structurally and temporally interact with each other. In this process, one can induce event complexes that organize multi-granular events with temporal order and membership relations interweaving among them. Due to the lack of jointly labeled data for these relational phenomena and the restriction on the structures they articulate, we propose a joint constrained learning framework for modeling event-event relations. Specifically, the framework enforces logical constraints within and across multiple temporal and subevent relations by converting these constraints into differentiable learning objectives. We show that our joint constrained learning approach effectively compensates for the lack of jointly labeled data, and outperforms SOTA methods on benchmarks for both temporal relation extraction and event hierarchy construction, replacing a commonly used but more expensive global inference process. We also present a promising case study showing the effectiveness of our approach in inducing event complexes on an external corpus.
summary: Understanding natural language involves recognizing how multiple event mentions structurally and temporally interact with each other. In this process, one can induce event complexes that organize multi-granular events with temporal order and membership relations interweaving among them. Due to the lack of jointly labeled data for these relational phenomena and the restriction on the structures they articulate, we propose a joint constrained learning framework for modeling event-event relations. Specifically, the framework enforces logical constraints within and across multiple temporal and subevent relations by converting these constraints into differentiable learning objectives. We show that our joint constrained learning approach effectively compensates for the lack of jointly labeled data, and outperforms SOTA methods on benchmarks for both temporal relation extraction and event hierarchy construction, replacing a commonly used but more expensive global inference process. We also present a promising case study showing the effectiveness of our approach in inducing event complexes on an external corpus.
abstract_zh: 理解自然语言涉及识别多个事件提及如何在结构和时间上相互作用。在此过程中，可以诱发事件复合体，这些事件复合体组织多粒度事件，其中时间顺序和成员关系相互交织。由于缺乏这些关系现象的联合标记数据以及它们所表达的结构的限制，我们提出了一个联合约束学习框架来建模事件-事件关系。具体来说，该框架通过将这些约束转换为可微分的学习目标，在多个时间和子事件关系内部和之间强制执行逻辑约束。我们表明，我们的联合约束学习方法有效地弥补了联合标记数据的缺乏，并且在时间关系提取和事件层次结构构建的基准上优于 SOTA 方法，取代了常用但更昂贵的全局推理过程。我们还提出了一个有前景的案例研究，展示了我们的方法在外部语料库上诱导事件复合体的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种联合约束学习框架，解决事件-事件关系抽取中的数据不足和结构限制问题
AI.motivation: 现有方法因缺乏联合标注数据和结构限制导致效果不佳，需新方法提升性能
AI.method: 通过将时间及子事件关系的逻辑约束转化为可微学习目标，构建联合约束学习框架
AI.result: 在时间关系抽取和事件层次构建任务中超越现有最优方法，且替代传统全局推理过程，案例研究验证有效性
AI.conclusion: 联合约束学习有效弥补数据不足，提升事件关系抽取与层次构建性能

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种联合约束学习框架，解决事件-事件关系抽取中的数据不足和结构限制问题
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法因缺乏联合标注数据和结构限制导致效果不佳，需新方法提升性能

search_text: Joint Constrained Learning for Event-Event Relation Extraction 事件-事件关系提取的联合约束学习 Understanding natural language involves recognizing how multiple event mentions structurally and temporally interact with each other. In this process, one can induce event complexes that organize multi-granular events with temporal order and membership relations interweaving among them. Due to the lack of jointly labeled data for these relational phenomena and the restriction on the structures they articulate, we propose a joint constrained learning framework for modeling event-event relations. Specifically, the framework enforces logical constraints within and across multiple temporal and subevent relations by converting these constraints into differentiable learning objectives. We show that our joint constrained learning approach effectively compensates for the lack of jointly labeled data, and outperforms SOTA methods on benchmarks for both temporal relation extraction and event hierarchy construction, replacing a commonly used but more expensive global inference process. We also present a promising case study showing the effectiveness of our approach in inducing event complexes on an external corpus. 理解自然语言涉及识别多个事件提及如何在结构和时间上相互作用。在此过程中，可以诱发事件复合体，这些事件复合体组织多粒度事件，其中时间顺序和成员关系相互交织。由于缺乏这些关系现象的联合标记数据以及它们所表达的结构的限制，我们提出了一个联合约束学习框架来建模事件-事件关系。具体来说，该框架通过将这些约束转换为可微分的学习目标，在多个时间和子事件关系内部和之间强制执行逻辑约束。我们表明，我们的联合约束学习方法有效地弥补了联合标记数据的缺乏，并且在时间关系提取和事件层次结构构建的基准上优于 SOTA 方法，取代了常用但更昂贵的全局推理过程。我们还提出了一个有前景的案例研究，展示了我们的方法在外部语料库上诱导事件复合体的有效性。 提出一种联合约束学习框架，解决事件-事件关系抽取中的数据不足和结构限制问题 Haoyu Wang,Muhao Chen,Hongming Zhang,Dan Roth cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Muhao Chen,Hongming Zhang,Haoyu Wang,Dan Roth
title: "What Are You Trying to Do?" Semantic Typing of Event Processes
title_zh: “你想做什么？”事件过程的语义类型
comment: CoNLL 2020
comments: CoNLL 2020
abstract: This paper studies a new cognitively motivated semantic typing task, multi-axis event process typing, that, given an event process, attempts to infer free-form type labels describing (i) the type of action made by the process and (ii) the type of object the process seeks to affect. This task is inspired by computational and cognitive studies of event understanding, which suggest that understanding processes of events is often directed by recognizing the goals, plans or intentions of the protagonist(s). We develop a large dataset containing over 60k event processes, featuring ultra fine-grained typing on both the action and object type axes with very large ($10^3\sim 10^4$) label vocabularies. We then propose a hybrid learning framework, P2GT, which addresses the challenging typing problem with indirect supervision from glosses1and a joint learning-to-rank framework. As our experiments indicate, P2GT supports identifying the intent of processes, as well as the fine semantic type of the affected object. It also demonstrates the capability of handling few-shot cases, and strong generalizability on out-of-domain event processes.
summary: This paper studies a new cognitively motivated semantic typing task, multi-axis event process typing, that, given an event process, attempts to infer free-form type labels describing (i) the type of action made by the process and (ii) the type of object the process seeks to affect. This task is inspired by computational and cognitive studies of event understanding, which suggest that understanding processes of events is often directed by recognizing the goals, plans or intentions of the protagonist(s). We develop a large dataset containing over 60k event processes, featuring ultra fine-grained typing on both the action and object type axes with very large ($10^3\sim 10^4$) label vocabularies. We then propose a hybrid learning framework, P2GT, which addresses the challenging typing problem with indirect supervision from glosses1and a joint learning-to-rank framework. As our experiments indicate, P2GT supports identifying the intent of processes, as well as the fine semantic type of the affected object. It also demonstrates the capability of handling few-shot cases, and strong generalizability on out-of-domain event processes.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一种新的认知动机语义打字任务，即多轴事件过程打字，该任务在给定事件过程的情况下，尝试推断自由形式的类型标签，这些标签描述（i）该过程所做的动作类型和（ii）该过程试图影响的对象类型。这项任务的灵感来自于事件理解的计算和认知研究，这表明事件的理解过程通常是通过识别主角的目标、计划或意图来指导的。我们开发了一个包含超过 60k 事件过程的大型数据集，在动作和对象类型轴上都具有超细粒度的类型，具有非常大的 ($10^3\sim 10^4$) 标签词汇表。然后，我们提出了一个混合学习框架 P2GT，它通过注释1的间接监督和联合学习排名框架来解决具有挑战性的打字问题。正如我们的实验表明，P2GT 支持识别进程的意图以及受影响对象的精细语义类型。它还展示了处理小样本情况的能力以及对域外事件过程的强大通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多轴事件过程语义类型划分任务，旨在通过识别事件过程的动作类型及目标对象类型，解析事件意图。
AI.motivation: 受事件理解的认知与计算研究启发，旨在通过识别事件过程中的目标与意图，提升对事件语义的解析能力。
AI.method: 构建包含6万+事件过程的大规模数据集，并设计混合学习框架P2GT，结合词义监督与联合排序学习，解决细粒度类型划分问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，P2GT能有效识别事件意图与对象类型，在小样本场景下表现优异，且对领域外事件具有强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了意图识别在事件语义类型划分中的关键作用，证明了P2GT框架在处理复杂语义任务中的有效性与通用性。

authors_text: Liam Fowl,Micah Goldblum,Arjun Gupta,Amr Sharaf,Tom Goldstein
title: Random Network Distillation as a Diversity Metric for Both Image and Text Generation
title_zh: 随机网络蒸馏作为图像和文本生成的多样性度量
abstract: Generative models are increasingly able to produce remarkably high quality images and text. The community has developed numerous evaluation metrics for comparing generative models. However, these metrics do not effectively quantify data diversity. We develop a new diversity metric that can readily be applied to data, both synthetic and natural, of any type. Our method employs random network distillation, a technique introduced in reinforcement learning. We validate and deploy this metric on both images and text. We further explore diversity in few-shot image generation, a setting which was previously difficult to evaluate.
summary: Generative models are increasingly able to produce remarkably high quality images and text. The community has developed numerous evaluation metrics for comparing generative models. However, these metrics do not effectively quantify data diversity. We develop a new diversity metric that can readily be applied to data, both synthetic and natural, of any type. Our method employs random network distillation, a technique introduced in reinforcement learning. We validate and deploy this metric on both images and text. We further explore diversity in few-shot image generation, a setting which was previously difficult to evaluate.
abstract_zh: 生成模型越来越能够生成非常高质量的图像和文本。社区已经开发了许多评估指标来比较生成模型。然而，这些指标并不能有效地量化数据多样性。我们开发了一种新的多样性指标，可以轻松应用于任何类型的合成数据和自然数据。我们的方法采用随机网络蒸馏，这是强化学习中引入的一种技术。我们在图像和文本上验证并部署此指标。我们进一步探索少样本图像生成的多样性，这是以前难以评估的设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于随机网络蒸馏的通用多样性度量方法，适用于图像和文本生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型评估指标无法有效量化数据多样性，尤其在少样本生成场景下缺乏有效评估手段。
AI.method: 采用强化学习中的随机网络蒸馏技术，通过模型间知识蒸馏过程衡量生成数据的多样性，并在图像和文本数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 该指标成功应用于图像和文本生成任务，有效评估了少样本生成场景下的多样性表现。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为生成模型提供了通用的多样性评估框架，弥补了传统指标的不足，具有跨模态应用潜力。

authors_text: Joshua Hunte,Martin Neil,Norman Fenton
title: Product risk assessment: a Bayesian network approach
title_zh: 产品风险评估：贝叶斯网络方法
comment: 32 pages, 12 figures, 1 table
comments: 32 pages, 12 figures, 1 table
abstract: Product risk assessment is the overall process of determining whether a product, which could be anything from a type of washing machine to a type of teddy bear, is judged safe for consumers to use. There are several methods used for product risk assessment, including RAPEX, which is the primary method used by regulators in the UK and EU. However, despite its widespread use, we identify several limitations of RAPEX including a limited approach to handling uncertainty and the inability to incorporate causal explanations for using and interpreting test data. In contrast, Bayesian Networks (BNs) are a rigorous, normative method for modelling uncertainty and causality which are already used for risk assessment in domains such as medicine and finance, as well as critical systems generally. This article proposes a BN model that provides an improved systematic method for product risk assessment that resolves the identified limitations with RAPEX. We use our proposed method to demonstrate risk assessments for a teddy bear and a new uncertified kettle for which there is no testing data and the number of product instances is unknown. We show that, while we can replicate the results of the RAPEX method, the BN approach is more powerful and flexible.
summary: Product risk assessment is the overall process of determining whether a product, which could be anything from a type of washing machine to a type of teddy bear, is judged safe for consumers to use. There are several methods used for product risk assessment, including RAPEX, which is the primary method used by regulators in the UK and EU. However, despite its widespread use, we identify several limitations of RAPEX including a limited approach to handling uncertainty and the inability to incorporate causal explanations for using and interpreting test data. In contrast, Bayesian Networks (BNs) are a rigorous, normative method for modelling uncertainty and causality which are already used for risk assessment in domains such as medicine and finance, as well as critical systems generally. This article proposes a BN model that provides an improved systematic method for product risk assessment that resolves the identified limitations with RAPEX. We use our proposed method to demonstrate risk assessments for a teddy bear and a new uncertified kettle for which there is no testing data and the number of product instances is unknown. We show that, while we can replicate the results of the RAPEX method, the BN approach is more powerful and flexible.
abstract_zh: 产品风险评估是确定某种产品（可以是洗衣机、泰迪熊等任何产品）是否被认为可供消费者安全使用的整个过程。产品风险评估有多种方法，其中 RAPEX 是英国和欧盟监管机构使用的主要方法。然而，尽管它被广泛使用，我们还是发现了 RAPEX 的一些局限性，包括处理不确定性的方法有限，以及无法纳入使用和解释测试数据的因果解释。相比之下，贝叶斯网络 (BN) 是一种严格、规范的方法，用于对不确定性和因果关系进行建模，已用于医学和金融等领域以及一般关键系统的风险评估。本文提出了一种 BN 模型，该模型为产品风险评估提供了一种改进的系统方法，解决了 RAPEX 所发现的局限性。我们使用我们提出的方法来演示对泰迪熊和新的未经认证的水壶的风险评估，这些水壶没有测试数据，并且产品实例的数量未知。我们表明，虽然我们可以复制 RAPEX 方法的结果，但 BN 方法更强大、更灵活。

AI.tldr: 提出基于贝叶斯网络的产品风险评估方法，以解决现有RAPEX方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有RAPEX方法在处理不确定性和因果解释方面存在不足，需更严谨的方法。
AI.method: 构建贝叶斯网络模型，整合不确定性与因果关系，用于产品风险评估。
AI.result: 成功复现RAPEX结果，并证明BN方法更强大灵活。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯网络方法在处理产品风险评估中的不确定性和因果关系方面优于传统方法。

search_text: Product risk assessment: a Bayesian network approach 产品风险评估：贝叶斯网络方法 Product risk assessment is the overall process of determining whether a product, which could be anything from a type of washing machine to a type of teddy bear, is judged safe for consumers to use. There are several methods used for product risk assessment, including RAPEX, which is the primary method used by regulators in the UK and EU. However, despite its widespread use, we identify several limitations of RAPEX including a limited approach to handling uncertainty and the inability to incorporate causal explanations for using and interpreting test data. In contrast, Bayesian Networks (BNs) are a rigorous, normative method for modelling uncertainty and causality which are already used for risk assessment in domains such as medicine and finance, as well as critical systems generally. This article proposes a BN model that provides an improved systematic method for product risk assessment that resolves the identified limitations with RAPEX. We use our proposed method to demonstrate risk assessments for a teddy bear and a new uncertified kettle for which there is no testing data and the number of product instances is unknown. We show that, while we can replicate the results of the RAPEX method, the BN approach is more powerful and flexible. 产品风险评估是确定某种产品（可以是洗衣机、泰迪熊等任何产品）是否被认为可供消费者安全使用的整个过程。产品风险评估有多种方法，其中 RAPEX 是英国和欧盟监管机构使用的主要方法。然而，尽管它被广泛使用，我们还是发现了 RAPEX 的一些局限性，包括处理不确定性的方法有限，以及无法纳入使用和解释测试数据的因果解释。相比之下，贝叶斯网络 (BN) 是一种严格、规范的方法，用于对不确定性和因果关系进行建模，已用于医学和金融等领域以及一般关键系统的风险评估。本文提出了一种 BN 模型，该模型为产品风险评估提供了一种改进的系统方法，解决了 RAPEX 所发现的局限性。我们使用我们提出的方法来演示对泰迪熊和新的未经认证的水壶的风险评估，这些水壶没有测试数据，并且产品实例的数量未知。我们表明，虽然我们可以复制 RAPEX 方法的结果，但 BN 方法更强大、更灵活。 提出基于贝叶斯网络的产品风险评估方法，以解决现有RAPEX方法的局限性。 Joshua Hunte,Martin Neil,Norman Fenton stat.OT,cs.AI,stat.ME,stat.ML

authors_text: Qiang Ning,Hao Wu,Pradeep Dasigi,Dheeru Dua,Matt Gardner,Robert L. Logan IV,Ana Marasovic,Zhen Nie
title: Easy, Reproducible and Quality-Controlled Data Collection with Crowdaq
title_zh: 使用 Crowdaq 轻松、可重复且质量受控的数据收集
comment: Accepted to the demo track of EMNLP 2020
comments: Accepted to the demo track of EMNLP 2020
abstract: High-quality and large-scale data are key to success for AI systems. However, large-scale data annotation efforts are often confronted with a set of common challenges: (1) designing a user-friendly annotation interface; (2) training enough annotators efficiently; and (3) reproducibility. To address these problems, we introduce Crowdaq, an open-source platform that standardizes the data collection pipeline with customizable user-interface components, automated annotator qualification, and saved pipelines in a re-usable format. We show that Crowdaq simplifies data annotation significantly on a diverse set of data collection use cases and we hope it will be a convenient tool for the community.
summary: High-quality and large-scale data are key to success for AI systems. However, large-scale data annotation efforts are often confronted with a set of common challenges: (1) designing a user-friendly annotation interface; (2) training enough annotators efficiently; and (3) reproducibility. To address these problems, we introduce Crowdaq, an open-source platform that standardizes the data collection pipeline with customizable user-interface components, automated annotator qualification, and saved pipelines in a re-usable format. We show that Crowdaq simplifies data annotation significantly on a diverse set of data collection use cases and we hope it will be a convenient tool for the community.
abstract_zh: 高质量和大规模的数据是人工智能系统成功的关键。然而，大规模数据标注工作经常面临一系列常见的挑战：（1）设计用户友好的标注界面； （2）高效地训练足够的标注者； (3)再现性。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 Crowdaq，这是一个开源平台，它通过可定制的用户界面组件、自动注释器限定以及以可重用格式保存的管道来标准化数据收集管道。我们表明，Crowdaq 在各种数据收集用例中显着简化了数据注释，我们希望它将成为社区的便捷工具。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Crowdaq的开源平台，旨在解决大规模数据标注中的界面设计、标注员培训和可重复性问题。
AI.motivation: 高质量数据对AI系统至关重要，但现有数据标注流程面临界面设计复杂、培训效率低和缺乏可重复性等挑战。
AI.method: 开发Crowdaq平台，包含可定制化用户界面组件、自动化标注员资格认证系统及可复用的标准化数据收集流程。
AI.result: Crowdaq在多种数据收集场景中显著简化了标注流程，实现了高效的质量控制和可重复的数据采集。
AI.conclusion: Crowdaq为研究社区提供了便捷的标准化数据收集工具，有助于推动高质量数据的获取与AI系统发展。

authors_text: Yahia Hamdi,Hanen Akouaydi,Houcine Boubaker,Adel M. Alimi
title: Handwriting Quality Analysis using Online-Offline Models
title_zh: 使用线上线下模型进行笔迹质量分析
abstract: This work is part of an innovative e-learning project allowing the development of an advanced digital educational tool that provides feedback during the process of learning handwriting for young school children (three to eight years old). In this paper, we describe a new method for children handwriting quality analysis. It automatically detects mistakes, gives real-time on-line feedback for children's writing, and helps teachers comprehend and evaluate children's writing skills. The proposed method adjudges five main criteria shape, direction, stroke order, position respect to the reference lines, and kinematics of the trace. It analyzes the handwriting quality and automatically gives feedback based on the combination of three extracted models: Beta-Elliptic Model (BEM) using similarity detection (SD) and dissimilarity distance (DD) measure, Fourier Descriptor Model (FDM), and perceptive Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with Support Vector Machine (SVM) comparison engine. The originality of our work lies partly in the system architecture which apprehends complementary dynamic, geometric, and visual representation of the examined handwritten scripts and in the efficient selected features adapted to various handwriting styles and multiple script languages such as Arabic, Latin, digits, and symbol drawing. The application offers two interactive interfaces respectively dedicated to learners, educators, experts or teachers and allows them to adapt it easily to the specificity of their disciples. The evaluation of our framework is enhanced by a database collected in Tunisia primary school with 400 children. Experimental results show the efficiency and robustness of our suggested framework that helps teachers and children by offering positive feedback throughout the handwriting learning process using tactile digital devices.
summary: This work is part of an innovative e-learning project allowing the development of an advanced digital educational tool that provides feedback during the process of learning handwriting for young school children (three to eight years old). In this paper, we describe a new method for children handwriting quality analysis. It automatically detects mistakes, gives real-time on-line feedback for children's writing, and helps teachers comprehend and evaluate children's writing skills. The proposed method adjudges five main criteria shape, direction, stroke order, position respect to the reference lines, and kinematics of the trace. It analyzes the handwriting quality and automatically gives feedback based on the combination of three extracted models: Beta-Elliptic Model (BEM) using similarity detection (SD) and dissimilarity distance (DD) measure, Fourier Descriptor Model (FDM), and perceptive Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with Support Vector Machine (SVM) comparison engine. The originality of our work lies partly in the system architecture which apprehends complementary dynamic, geometric, and visual representation of the examined handwritten scripts and in the efficient selected features adapted to various handwriting styles and multiple script languages such as Arabic, Latin, digits, and symbol drawing. The application offers two interactive interfaces respectively dedicated to learners, educators, experts or teachers and allows them to adapt it easily to the specificity of their disciples. The evaluation of our framework is enhanced by a database collected in Tunisia primary school with 400 children. Experimental results show the efficiency and robustness of our suggested framework that helps teachers and children by offering positive feedback throughout the handwriting learning process using tactile digital devices.
abstract_zh: 这项工作是创新电子学习项目的一部分，该项目允许开发先进的数字教育工具，在幼儿（三至八岁）学习书法的过程中提供反馈。在本文中，我们描述了一种儿童书写质量分析的新方法。自动检测错误，实时在线反馈孩子的写作情况，帮助老师了解和评估孩子的写作能力。所提出的方法判断五个主要标准形状、方向、笔画顺序、相对于参考线的位置以及轨迹的运动学。它分析笔迹质量并根据三个提取模型的组合自动给出反馈：使用相似性检测 (SD) 和相异距离 (DD) 测量的 Beta 椭圆模型 (BEM)、傅里叶描述符模型 (FDM) 以及具有支持向量机 (SVM) 比较引擎的感知卷积神经网络 (CNN)。我们工作的原创性部分在于系统架构，它理解所检查的手写文字的互补动态、几何和视觉表示，以及适应各种手写风格和多种文字语言（如阿拉伯语、拉丁语、数字和符号绘图）的有效选择的功能。该应用程序提供了两个分别专用于学习者、教育工作者、专家或教师的交互界面，使他们能够轻松地适应其弟子的特殊性。在突尼斯小学收集的 400 名儿童的数据库增强了对我们框架的评估。实验结果显示了我们建议的框架的效率和稳健性，该框架通过使用触觉数字设备在整个手写学习过程中提供积极的反馈来帮助教师和儿童。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合在线与离线模型的儿童手写质量分析方法，用于数字教育工具中实时反馈儿童书写错误并评估其书写技能。
AI.motivation: 为帮助3至8岁儿童学习手写技能，需开发能自动检测错误、提供实时反馈的教育工具，以辅助教师评估学生书写能力。
AI.method: 融合Beta-椭圆模型（BEM）、傅里叶描述符模型（FDM）及卷积神经网络（CNN）与支持向量机（SVM）的混合方法，结合动态、几何与视觉特征分析手写轨迹，支持阿拉伯语、拉丁语等多语言脚本。
AI.result: 基于突尼斯400名儿童数据集的实验表明，该框架能有效检测书写错误并提供积极反馈，提升教师与儿童的互动教学效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多模型协同与跨语言适配，验证了系统架构在手写质量分析中的高效性与鲁棒性，为教育数字化提供了实用解决方案。

In this paper, we describe a new method for children handwriting quality analysis. It automatically detects mistakes, gives real-time on-line feedback for children's writing, and helps teachers comprehend and evaluate children's writing skills. The proposed method adjudges five main criteria shape, direction, stroke order, position respect to the reference lines, and kinematics of the trace. It analyzes the handwriting quality and automatically gives feedback based on the combination of three extracted models: Beta-Elliptic Model (BEM) using similarity detection (SD) and dissimilarity distance (DD) measure, Fourier Descriptor Model (FDM), and perceptive Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with Support Vector Machine (SVM) comparison engine. The originality of our work lies partly in the system architecture which apprehends complementary dynamic, geometric, and visual representation of the examined handwritten scripts and in the efficient selected features adapted to various handwriting styles and multiple script languages such as Arabic, Latin, digits, and symbol drawing. The application offers two interactive interfaces respectively dedicated to learners, educators, experts or teachers and allows them to adapt it easily to the specificity of their disciples. The evaluation of our framework is enhanced by a database collected in Tunisia primary school with 400 children. Experimental results show the efficiency and robustness of our suggested framework that helps teachers and children by offering positive feedback throughout the handwriting learning process using tactile digital devices. 这项工作是创新电子学习项目的一部分，该项目允许开发先进的数字教育工具，在幼儿（三至八岁）学习书法的过程中提供反馈。在本文中，我们描述了一种儿童书写质量分析的新方法。自动检测错误，实时在线反馈孩子的写作情况，帮助老师了解和评估孩子的写作能力。所提出的方法判断五个主要标准形状、方向、笔画顺序、相对于参考线的位置以及轨迹的运动学。它分析笔迹质量并根据三个提取模型的组合自动给出反馈：使用相似性检测 (SD) 和相异距离 (DD) 测量的 Beta 椭圆模型 (BEM)、傅里叶描述符模型 (FDM) 以及具有支持向量机 (SVM) 比较引擎的感知卷积神经网络 (CNN)。我们工作的原创性部分在于系统架构，它理解所检查的手写文字的互补动态、几何和视觉表示，以及适应各种手写风格和多种文字语言（如阿拉伯语、拉丁语、数字和符号绘图）的有效选择的功能。该应用程序提供了两个分别专用于学习者、教育工作者、专家或教师的交互界面，使他们能够轻松地适应其弟子的特殊性。在突尼斯小学收集的 400 名儿童的数据库增强了对我们框架的评估。实验结果显示了我们建议的框架的效率和稳健性，该框架通过使用触觉数字设备在整个手写学习过程中提供积极的反馈来帮助教师和儿童。 本文提出一种结合在线与离线模型的儿童手写质量分析方法，用于数字教育工具中实时反馈儿童书写错误并评估其书写技能。 Yahia Hamdi,Hanen Akouaydi,Houcine Boubaker,Adel M. Alimi cs.HC,cs.CV

authors_text: Mojtaba Nayyeri,Chengjin Xu,Jens Lehmann,Sahar Vahdati
title: Motif Learning in Knowledge Graphs Using Trajectories Of Differential Equations
title_zh: 使用微分方程轨迹进行知识图谱学习
abstract: Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGEs) have shown promising performance on link prediction tasks by mapping the entities and relations from a knowledge graph into a geometric space (usually a vector space). Ultimately, the plausibility of the predicted links is measured by using a scoring function over the learned embeddings (vectors). Therefore, the capability in preserving graph characteristics including structural aspects and semantics highly depends on the design of the KGE, as well as the inherited abilities from the underlying geometry. Many KGEs use the flat geometry which renders them incapable of preserving complex structures and consequently causes wrong inferences by the models. To address this problem, we propose a neuro differential KGE that embeds nodes of a KG on the trajectories of Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs). To this end, we represent each relation (edge) in a KG as a vector field on a smooth Riemannian manifold. We specifically parameterize ODEs by a neural network to represent various complex shape manifolds and more importantly complex shape vector fields on the manifold. Therefore, the underlying embedding space is capable of getting various geometric forms to encode complexity in subgraph structures with different motifs. Experiments on synthetic and benchmark dataset as well as social network KGs justify the ODE trajectories as a means to structure preservation and consequently avoiding wrong inferences over state-of-the-art KGE models.
summary: Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGEs) have shown promising performance on link prediction tasks by mapping the entities and relations from a knowledge graph into a geometric space (usually a vector space). Ultimately, the plausibility of the predicted links is measured by using a scoring function over the learned embeddings (vectors). Therefore, the capability in preserving graph characteristics including structural aspects and semantics highly depends on the design of the KGE, as well as the inherited abilities from the underlying geometry. Many KGEs use the flat geometry which renders them incapable of preserving complex structures and consequently causes wrong inferences by the models. To address this problem, we propose a neuro differential KGE that embeds nodes of a KG on the trajectories of Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs). To this end, we represent each relation (edge) in a KG as a vector field on a smooth Riemannian manifold. We specifically parameterize ODEs by a neural network to represent various complex shape manifolds and more importantly complex shape vector fields on the manifold. Therefore, the underlying embedding space is capable of getting various geometric forms to encode complexity in subgraph structures with different motifs. Experiments on synthetic and benchmark dataset as well as social network KGs justify the ODE trajectories as a means to structure preservation and consequently avoiding wrong inferences over state-of-the-art KGE models.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入（KGE）通过将知识图的实体和关系映射到几何空间（通常是向量空间），在链接预测任务中表现出了良好的性能。最终，通过使用学习嵌入（向量）的评分函数来测量预测链接的合理性。因此，保留图特征（包括结构方面和语义）的能力很大程度上取决于 KGE 的设计，以及从底层几何继承的能力。许多 KGE 使用平面几何结构，这使得它们无法保留复杂的结构，从而导致模型做出错误的推断。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种神经微分 KGE，它将 KG 的节点嵌入到常微分方程 (ODE) 的轨迹上。为此，我们将 KG 中的每个关系（边）表示为平滑黎曼流形上的向量场。我们专门通过神经网络对常微分方程进行参数化，以表示各种复杂形状流形，更重要的是流形上的复杂形状向量场。因此，底层的嵌入空间能够获得各种几何形式来编码具有不同主题的子图结构的复杂性。对合成数据集和基准数据集以及社交网络 KG 的实验证明了 ODE 轨迹作为结构保存的一种手段，从而避免了对最先进的 KGE 模型的错误推论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于常微分方程轨迹的知识图谱嵌入方法，用于学习知识图谱中的子图结构模式。
AI.motivation: 传统的知识图谱嵌入方法使用平坦几何，难以保留复杂结构，导致错误推理，因此需要一种新的方法来更好地保留结构特征。
AI.method: 本文通过神经网络参数化常微分方程，将知识图谱中的节点嵌入到微分方程的轨迹中，从而在黎曼流形上表示关系，并捕捉复杂结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在合成数据集、基准数据集和社会网络知识图谱上优于现有模型，能有效保留结构并避免错误推理。
AI.conclusion: 基于微分方程轨迹的知识图谱嵌入方法能够有效捕捉复杂结构，提高知识图谱推理的准确性。

authors_text: Tiffany Tianhui Cai,Jonathan Frankle,David J. Schwab,Ari S. Morcos
title: Are all negatives created equal in contrastive instance discrimination?
title_zh: 在对比实例歧视中，所有的底片都是平等的吗？
comment: Fixed author name error
comments: Fixed author name error
abstract: Self-supervised learning has recently begun to rival supervised learning on computer vision tasks. Many of the recent approaches have been based on contrastive instance discrimination (CID), in which the network is trained to recognize two augmented versions of the same instance (a query and positive) while discriminating against a pool of other instances (negatives). The learned representation is then used on downstream tasks such as image classification. Using methodology from MoCo v2 (Chen et al., 2020), we divided negatives by their difficulty for a given query and studied which difficulty ranges were most important for learning useful representations. We found a minority of negatives -- the hardest 5% -- were both necessary and sufficient for the downstream task to reach nearly full accuracy. Conversely, the easiest 95% of negatives were unnecessary and insufficient. Moreover, the very hardest 0.1% of negatives were unnecessary and sometimes detrimental. Finally, we studied the properties of negatives that affect their hardness, and found that hard negatives were more semantically similar to the query, and that some negatives were more consistently easy or hard than we would expect by chance. Together, our results indicate that negatives vary in importance and that CID may benefit from more intelligent negative treatment.
summary: Self-supervised learning has recently begun to rival supervised learning on computer vision tasks. Many of the recent approaches have been based on contrastive instance discrimination (CID), in which the network is trained to recognize two augmented versions of the same instance (a query and positive) while discriminating against a pool of other instances (negatives). The learned representation is then used on downstream tasks such as image classification. Using methodology from MoCo v2 (Chen et al., 2020), we divided negatives by their difficulty for a given query and studied which difficulty ranges were most important for learning useful representations. We found a minority of negatives -- the hardest 5% -- were both necessary and sufficient for the downstream task to reach nearly full accuracy. Conversely, the easiest 95% of negatives were unnecessary and insufficient. Moreover, the very hardest 0.1% of negatives were unnecessary and sometimes detrimental. Finally, we studied the properties of negatives that affect their hardness, and found that hard negatives were more semantically similar to the query, and that some negatives were more consistently easy or hard than we would expect by chance. Together, our results indicate that negatives vary in importance and that CID may benefit from more intelligent negative treatment.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习最近开始在计算机视觉任务上与监督学习相媲美。最近的许多方法都是基于对比实例辨别（CID），其中网络被训练来识别同一实例的两个增强版本（查询和肯定），同时区分其他实例（否定）池。然后将学习到的表示用于下游任务，例如图像分类。使用 MoCo v2（Chen 等人，2020）的方法，我们将负数除以给定查询的难度，并研究哪些难度范围对于学习有用的表示最重要。我们发现少数负面因素（最难的 5%）对于下游任务达到几乎完全的准确性来说是必要且充分的。相反，最简单的 95% 的负面因素是不必要的和不充分的。此外，最困难的 0.1% 的负面因素是不必要的，有时甚至是有害的。最后，我们研究了影响其硬度的否定的属性，发现硬否定在语义上与查询更相似，并且某些否定比我们偶然预期的更一致地容易或困难。总之，我们的结果表明，负面因素的重要性各不相同，CID 可能会受益于更明智的负面处理。

AI.tldr: 研究对比实例判别（CID）中负样本的重要性差异，探索不同难度负样本对学习有效表示的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有CID方法中负样本的处理较为粗放，可能影响模型效率与性能，需明确不同难度负样本的作用以优化训练过程。
AI.method: 基于MoCo v2框架，按查询难度对负样本进行分类，分析不同难度区间对表示学习的贡献，并研究影响负样本难度的属性。
AI.result: 最难5%的负样本对下游任务准确率至关重要，而最容易的95%冗余且无效；极难的0.1%有时有害。硬负样本语义更接近查询，且难易程度存在一致性。
AI.conclusion: 负样本的重要性存在显著差异，对比实例判别方法需引入更智能的负样本筛选或加权策略以提升效果。

Conversely, the easiest 95% of negatives were unnecessary and insufficient. Moreover, the very hardest 0.1% of negatives were unnecessary and sometimes detrimental. Finally, we studied the properties of negatives that affect their hardness, and found that hard negatives were more semantically similar to the query, and that some negatives were more consistently easy or hard than we would expect by chance. Together, our results indicate that negatives vary in importance and that CID may benefit from more intelligent negative treatment. 自监督学习最近开始在计算机视觉任务上与监督学习相媲美。最近的许多方法都是基于对比实例辨别（CID），其中网络被训练来识别同一实例的两个增强版本（查询和肯定），同时区分其他实例（否定）池。然后将学习到的表示用于下游任务，例如图像分类。使用 MoCo v2（Chen 等人，2020）的方法，我们将负数除以给定查询的难度，并研究哪些难度范围对于学习有用的表示最重要。我们发现少数负面因素（最难的 5%）对于下游任务达到几乎完全的准确性来说是必要且充分的。相反，最简单的 95% 的负面因素是不必要的和不充分的。此外，最困难的 0.1% 的负面因素是不必要的，有时甚至是有害的。最后，我们研究了影响其硬度的否定的属性，发现硬否定在语义上与查询更相似，并且某些否定比我们偶然预期的更一致地容易或困难。总之，我们的结果表明，负面因素的重要性各不相同，CID 可能会受益于更明智的负面处理。 研究对比实例判别（CID）中负样本的重要性差异，探索不同难度负样本对学习有效表示的影响。 Tiffany Tianhui Cai,Jonathan Frankle,David J. Schwab,Ari S. Morcos cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: You Li,Clément Le Bihan,Txomin Pourtau,Thomas Ristorcelli
title: InsClustering: Instantly Clustering LiDAR Range Measures for Autonomous Vehicle
title_zh: InsClustering：即时聚类自动驾驶汽车的 LiDAR 距离测量
comment: accepted by IEEE ITSC2020
comments: accepted by IEEE ITSC2020
abstract: LiDARs are usually more accurate than cameras in distance measuring. Hence, there is strong interest to apply LiDARs in autonomous driving. Different existing approaches process the rich 3D point clouds for object detection, tracking and recognition. These methods generally require two initial steps: (1) filter points on the ground plane and (2) cluster non-ground points into objects. This paper proposes a field-tested fast 3D point cloud segmentation method for these two steps. Our specially designed algorithms allow instantly process raw LiDAR data packets, which significantly reduce the processing delay. In our tests on Velodyne UltraPuck, a 32 layers spinning LiDAR, the processing delay of clustering all the $360^\circ$ LiDAR measures is less than 1ms. Meanwhile, a coarse-to-fine scheme is applied to ensure the clustering quality. Our field experiments in public roads have shown that the proposed method significantly improves the speed of 3D point cloud clustering whilst maintains good accuracy.
summary: LiDARs are usually more accurate than cameras in distance measuring. Hence, there is strong interest to apply LiDARs in autonomous driving. Different existing approaches process the rich 3D point clouds for object detection, tracking and recognition. These methods generally require two initial steps: (1) filter points on the ground plane and (2) cluster non-ground points into objects. This paper proposes a field-tested fast 3D point cloud segmentation method for these two steps. Our specially designed algorithms allow instantly process raw LiDAR data packets, which significantly reduce the processing delay. In our tests on Velodyne UltraPuck, a 32 layers spinning LiDAR, the processing delay of clustering all the $360^\circ$ LiDAR measures is less than 1ms. Meanwhile, a coarse-to-fine scheme is applied to ensure the clustering quality. Our field experiments in public roads have shown that the proposed method significantly improves the speed of 3D point cloud clustering whilst maintains good accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在距离测量方面，激光雷达通常比相机更准确。因此，人们对将激光雷达应用于自动驾驶产生了浓厚的兴趣。不同的现有方法处理丰富的 3D 点云以进行对象检测、跟踪和识别。这些方法通常需要两个初始步骤：（1）过滤地平面上的点和（2）将非地面点聚类到对象中。本文针对这两个步骤提出了一种经过现场测试的快速 3D 点云分割方法。我们专门设计的算法可以立即处理原始激光雷达数据包，从而显着减少处理延迟。在我们对 Velodyne UltraPuck（32 层旋转 LiDAR）的测试中，所有 $360^\circ$ LiDAR 测量的聚类处理延迟小于 1 毫秒。同时，采用由粗到细的方案来保证聚类质量。我们在公共道路上的现场实验表明，所提出的方法显着提高了 3D 点云聚类的速度，同时保持了良好的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶的快速LiDAR点云聚类方法InsClustering，旨在减少处理延迟并保持聚类准确性。
AI.motivation: LiDAR在距离测量上比摄像头更精确，但现有方法在地面点过滤和非地面点聚类过程中存在处理延迟高、效率低的问题，影响自动驾驶实时性。
AI.method: 设计专用算法对原始LiDAR数据包进行即时处理，并采用粗到细的方案确保聚类质量，优化了32层旋转式LiDAR（Velodyne UltraPuck）的360°点云处理流程。
AI.result: 在公共道路测试中，聚类处理延迟低于1ms，同时保持良好准确性，显著提升3D点云聚类速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过高效算法和分层策略，在保证精度的前提下实现了LiDAR点云的实时处理，为自动驾驶提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Jeff Delaune,David S. Bayard,Roland Brockers
title: xVIO: A Range-Visual-Inertial Odometry Framework
title_zh: xVIO：距离-视觉-惯性里程计框架
abstract: xVIO is a range-visual-inertial odometry algorithm implemented at JPL. It has been demonstrated with closed-loop controls on-board unmanned rotorcraft equipped with off-the-shelf embedded computers and sensors. It can operate at daytime with visible-spectrum cameras, or at night time using thermal infrared cameras. This report is a complete technical description of xVIO. It includes an overview of the system architecture, the implementation of the navigation filter, along with the derivations of the Jacobian matrices which are not already published in the literature.
summary: xVIO is a range-visual-inertial odometry algorithm implemented at JPL. It has been demonstrated with closed-loop controls on-board unmanned rotorcraft equipped with off-the-shelf embedded computers and sensors. It can operate at daytime with visible-spectrum cameras, or at night time using thermal infrared cameras. This report is a complete technical description of xVIO. It includes an overview of the system architecture, the implementation of the navigation filter, along with the derivations of the Jacobian matrices which are not already published in the literature.
abstract_zh: xVIO 是喷气推进实验室实施的距离-视觉-惯性里程计算法。它已通过配备现成嵌入式计算机和传感器的无人驾驶旋翼机上的闭环控制进行了演示。它可以在白天使用可见光谱相机进行操作，或者在夜间使用热红外相机进行操作。本报告是 xVIO 的完整技术描述。它包括系统架构的概述、导航过滤器的实现，以及尚未在文献中发表的雅可比矩阵的推导。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为xVIO的范围-视觉-惯性里程算法，适用于无人旋翼机在不同光照条件下的定位与导航。
AI.motivation: 现有里程算法在复杂环境或不同光照条件下存在鲁棒性不足的问题，需开发适应性强的多传感器融合框架。
AI.method: 结合范围传感器、视觉数据与惯性测量单元（IMU），设计多传感器融合的导航滤波器，并推导关键雅可比矩阵以实现闭环控制。
AI.result: 在无人旋翼机上成功验证xVIO框架，支持白天可见光与夜间热红外相机切换，实现稳定闭环控制。
AI.conclusion: xVIO框架通过多传感器协同提升了里程计算的鲁棒性，为复杂环境下的自主导航提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Yixin Gao,Noah D. Stein,Chieh-Chi Kao,Yunliang Cai,Ming Sun,Tao Zhang,Shiv Vitaladevuni
title: On Front-end Gain Invariant Modeling for Wake Word Spotting
title_zh: 唤醒词识别的前端增益不变建模
comment: In Proc. Interspeech 2020
comments: In Proc. Interspeech 2020
abstract: Wake word (WW) spotting is challenging in far-field due to the complexities and variations in acoustic conditions and the environmental interference in signal transmission. A suite of carefully designed and optimized audio front-end (AFE) algorithms help mitigate these challenges and provide better quality audio signals to the downstream modules such as WW spotter. Since the WW model is trained with the AFE-processed audio data, its performance is sensitive to AFE variations, such as gain changes. In addition, when deploying to new devices, the WW performance is not guaranteed because the AFE is unknown to the WW model. To address these issues, we propose a novel approach to use a new feature called $Δ$LFBE to decouple the AFE gain variations from the WW model. We modified the neural network architectures to accommodate the delta computation, with the feature extraction module unchanged. We evaluate our WW models using data collected from real household settings and showed the models with the $Δ$LFBE is robust to AFE gain changes. Specifically, when AFE gain changes up to $\pm$12dB, the baseline CNN model lost up to relative 19.0% in false alarm rate or 34.3% in false reject rate, while the model with $Δ$LFBE demonstrates no performance loss.
summary: Wake word (WW) spotting is challenging in far-field due to the complexities and variations in acoustic conditions and the environmental interference in signal transmission. A suite of carefully designed and optimized audio front-end (AFE) algorithms help mitigate these challenges and provide better quality audio signals to the downstream modules such as WW spotter. Since the WW model is trained with the AFE-processed audio data, its performance is sensitive to AFE variations, such as gain changes. In addition, when deploying to new devices, the WW performance is not guaranteed because the AFE is unknown to the WW model. To address these issues, we propose a novel approach to use a new feature called $Δ$LFBE to decouple the AFE gain variations from the WW model. We modified the neural network architectures to accommodate the delta computation, with the feature extraction module unchanged. We evaluate our WW models using data collected from real household settings and showed the models with the $Δ$LFBE is robust to AFE gain changes. Specifically, when AFE gain changes up to $\pm$12dB, the baseline CNN model lost up to relative 19.0% in false alarm rate or 34.3% in false reject rate, while the model with $Δ$LFBE demonstrates no performance loss.
abstract_zh: 由于声学条件的复杂性和变化以及信号传输中的环境干扰，唤醒词 (WW) 定位在远场中具有挑战性。一套精心设计和优化的音频前端 (AFE) 算法有助于缓解这些挑战，并向 WW Spotter 等下游模块提供更高质量的音频信号。由于 WW 模型是使用 AFE 处理的音频数据进行训练的，因此其性能对 AFE 变化（例如增益变化）很敏感。此外，当部署到新设备时，WW 性能无法得到保证，因为 AFE 对于 WW 模型来说是未知的。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，使用名为 $Δ$LFBE 的新功能来将 AFE 增益变化与 WW 模型解耦。我们修改了神经网络架构以适应增量计算，而特征提取模块保持不变。我们使用从真实家庭环境中收集的数据来评估我们的 WW 模型，并表明具有 $Δ$LFBE 的模型对于 AFE 增益变化具有鲁棒性。具体来说，当 AFE 增益变化达到 $\pm$12dB 时，基线 CNN 模型的误报率损失高达 19.0%，误报率损失高达 34.3%，而具有 $Δ$LFBE 的模型则没有表现出性能损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的ΔLFBE特征，用于解耦前端增益变化与唤醒词检测模型，以提高远场环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有唤醒词模型对前端音频处理模块（AFE）的增益变化敏感，导致在不同设备部署时性能不稳定，需解决AFE增益变化带来的性能下降问题。
AI.method: 设计ΔLFBE特征捕捉AFE增益变化，修改神经网络架构以支持增量计算，同时保持特征提取模块不变。
AI.result: 在真实家庭环境数据中，当AFE增益变化±12dB时，基线CNN模型的误报率下降19.0%或误拒率下降34.3%，而ΔLFBE模型无性能损失。
AI.conclusion: ΔLFBE方法有效解耦AFE增益变化，显著提升唤醒词模型在未知设备上的鲁棒性，适用于实际部署场景。
