search_text: On Front-end Gain Invariant Modeling for Wake Word Spotting 唤醒词识别的前端增益不变建模 Wake word (WW) spotting is challenging in far-field due to the complexities and variations in acoustic conditions and the environmental interference in signal transmission. A suite of carefully designed and optimized audio front-end (AFE) algorithms help mitigate these challenges and provide better quality audio signals to the downstream modules such as WW spotter. Since the WW model is trained with the AFE-processed audio data, its performance is sensitive to AFE variations, such as gain changes. In addition, when deploying to new devices, the WW performance is not guaranteed because the AFE is unknown to the WW model. To address these issues, we propose a novel approach to use a new feature called $Δ$LFBE to decouple the AFE gain variations from the WW model. We modified the neural network architectures to accommodate the delta computation, with the feature extraction module unchanged. We evaluate our WW models using data collected from real household settings and showed the models with the $Δ$LFBE is robust to AFE gain changes. Specifically, when AFE gain changes up to $\pm$12dB, the baseline CNN model lost up to relative 19.0% in false alarm rate or 34.3% in false reject rate, while the model with $Δ$LFBE demonstrates no performance loss. 由于声学条件的复杂性和变化以及信号传输中的环境干扰，唤醒词 (WW) 定位在远场中具有挑战性。一套精心设计和优化的音频前端 (AFE) 算法有助于缓解这些挑战，并向 WW Spotter 等下游模块提供更高质量的音频信号。由于 WW 模型是使用 AFE 处理的音频数据进行训练的，因此其性能对 AFE 变化（例如增益变化）很敏感。此外，当部署到新设备时，WW 性能无法得到保证，因为 AFE 对于 WW 模型来说是未知的。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，使用名为 $Δ$LFBE 的新功能来将 AFE 增益变化与 WW 模型解耦。我们修改了神经网络架构以适应增量计算，而特征提取模块保持不变。我们使用从真实家庭环境中收集的数据来评估我们的 WW 模型，并表明具有 $Δ$LFBE 的模型对于 AFE 增益变化具有鲁棒性。具体来说，当 AFE 增益变化达到 $\pm$12dB 时，基线 CNN 模型的误报率损失高达 19.0%，误报率损失高达 34.3%，而具有 $Δ$LFBE 的模型则没有表现出性能损失。 本文提出了一种新的ΔLFBE特征，用于解耦前端增益变化与唤醒词检测模型，以提高远场环境下的鲁棒性。 Yixin Gao,Noah D. Stein,Chieh-Chi Kao,Yunliang Cai,Ming Sun,Tao Zhang,Shiv Vitaladevuni eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Lily Li,Or Levi,Pedram Hosseini,David A. Broniatowski
title: A Multi-Modal Method for Satire Detection using Textual and Visual Cues
title_zh: 使用文本和视觉提示进行讽刺检测的多模态方法
comment: Accepted to the Third Workshop on NLP for Internet Freedom (NLP4IF): Censorship, Disinformation, and Propaganda. Co-located with COLING 2020
comments: Accepted to the Third Workshop on NLP for Internet Freedom (NLP4IF): Censorship, Disinformation, and Propaganda. Co-located with COLING 2020
abstract: Satire is a form of humorous critique, but it is sometimes misinterpreted by readers as legitimate news, which can lead to harmful consequences. We observe that the images used in satirical news articles often contain absurd or ridiculous content and that image manipulation is used to create fictional scenarios. While previous work have studied text-based methods, in this work we propose a multi-modal approach based on state-of-the-art visiolinguistic model ViLBERT. To this end, we create a new dataset consisting of images and headlines of regular and satirical news for the task of satire detection. We fine-tune ViLBERT on the dataset and train a convolutional neural network that uses an image forensics technique. Evaluation on the dataset shows that our proposed multi-modal approach outperforms image-only, text-only, and simple fusion baselines.
summary: Satire is a form of humorous critique, but it is sometimes misinterpreted by readers as legitimate news, which can lead to harmful consequences. We observe that the images used in satirical news articles often contain absurd or ridiculous content and that image manipulation is used to create fictional scenarios. While previous work have studied text-based methods, in this work we propose a multi-modal approach based on state-of-the-art visiolinguistic model ViLBERT. To this end, we create a new dataset consisting of images and headlines of regular and satirical news for the task of satire detection. We fine-tune ViLBERT on the dataset and train a convolutional neural network that uses an image forensics technique. Evaluation on the dataset shows that our proposed multi-modal approach outperforms image-only, text-only, and simple fusion baselines.
abstract_zh: 讽刺是幽默批评的一种形式，但有时会被读者误解为合法新闻，从而导致有害后果。我们观察到，讽刺新闻文章中使用的图像通常包含荒谬或可笑的内容，并且图像处理被用来创造虚构的场景。虽然之前的工作研究了基于文本的方法，但在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于最先进的视觉语言模型 ViLBERT 的多模态方法。为此，我们创建了一个由常规和讽刺新闻的图像和标题组成的新数据集，用于讽刺检测任务。我们在数据集上微调 ViLBERT，并训练使用图像取证技术的卷积神经网络。对数据集的评估表明，我们提出的多模态方法优于仅图像、仅文本和简单融合基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合文本和视觉线索的多模态方法，用于检测讽刺性新闻。
AI.motivation: 讽刺新闻可能被误认为真实新闻，导致不良影响。现有研究主要基于文本，而图像中的荒谬内容和人为篡改常被用于制造虚假场景，需结合视觉信息提升检测效果。
AI.method: 基于ViLBERT视觉语言模型，构建包含常规与讽刺新闻图像及标题的新数据集，通过微调ViLBERT并结合图像取证技术训练卷积神经网络实现多模态融合检测。
AI.result: 实验表明，该多模态方法在数据集上的表现优于纯图像、纯文本及简单融合的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合能有效提升讽刺检测准确性，未来可探索更多模态或改进模型架构以进一步优化性能。

authors_text: Qun Liu,Matthew Shreve,Raja Bala
title: LiDAM: Semi-Supervised Learning with Localized Domain Adaptation and Iterative Matching
title_zh: LiDAM：具有本地化域适应和迭代匹配的半监督学习
abstract: Although data is abundant, data labeling is expensive. Semi-supervised learning methods combine a few labeled samples with a large corpus of unlabeled data to effectively train models. This paper introduces our proposed method LiDAM, a semi-supervised learning approach rooted in both domain adaptation and self-paced learning. LiDAM first performs localized domain shifts to extract better domain-invariant features for the model that results in more accurate clusters and pseudo-labels. These pseudo-labels are then aligned with real class labels in a self-paced fashion using a novel iterative matching technique that is based on majority consistency over high-confidence predictions. Simultaneously, a final classifier is trained to predict ground-truth labels until convergence. LiDAM achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CIFAR-100 dataset, outperforming FixMatch (73.50% vs. 71.82%) when using 2500 labels.
summary: Although data is abundant, data labeling is expensive. Semi-supervised learning methods combine a few labeled samples with a large corpus of unlabeled data to effectively train models. This paper introduces our proposed method LiDAM, a semi-supervised learning approach rooted in both domain adaptation and self-paced learning. LiDAM first performs localized domain shifts to extract better domain-invariant features for the model that results in more accurate clusters and pseudo-labels. These pseudo-labels are then aligned with real class labels in a self-paced fashion using a novel iterative matching technique that is based on majority consistency over high-confidence predictions. Simultaneously, a final classifier is trained to predict ground-truth labels until convergence. LiDAM achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CIFAR-100 dataset, outperforming FixMatch (73.50% vs. 71.82%) when using 2500 labels.
abstract_zh: 尽管数据丰富，但数据标记的成本很高。半监督学习方法将少量标记样本与大量未标记数据结合起来，以有效地训练模型。本文介绍了我们提出的方法 LiDAM，这是一种植根于领域适应和自定进度学习的半监督学习方法。 LiDAM 首先执行局部域移位，为模型提取更好的域不变特征，从而产生更准确的聚类和伪标签。然后，使用基于高置信度预测的多数一致性的新颖迭代匹配技术，以自定进度的方式将这些伪标签与真实类标签对齐。同时，训练最终分类器来预测真实标签，直到收敛。 LiDAM 在 CIFAR-100 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，在使用 2500 个标签时优于 FixMatch（73.50% 与 71.82%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiDAM方法，通过局部领域自适应和迭代匹配技术提升半监督学习效果。
AI.motivation: 标注数据成本高昂，现有半监督方法在领域迁移和伪标签对齐方面存在不足。
AI.method: 结合领域自适应提取不变特征，利用高置信度预测的多数一致性进行迭代匹配，逐步对齐伪标签与真实标签。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100数据集上，使用2500标签时准确率73.50%，优于FixMatch的71.82%。
AI.conclusion: LiDAM通过局部领域适应和迭代匹配有效提升半监督学习性能，达到SOTA水平。

authors_text: Teruo M. Maruyama,Luiz S. Oliveira,Alceu S. Britto Jr,Robert Sabourin
title: Intrapersonal Parameter Optimization for Offline Handwritten Signature Augmentation
title_zh: 离线手写签名增强的内部参数优化
comment: 16 pages, 11 figures, To appear in the IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics & Security
comments: 16 pages, 11 figures, To appear in the IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics & Security
abstract: Usually, in a real-world scenario, few signature samples are available to train an automatic signature verification system (ASVS). However, such systems do indeed need a lot of signatures to achieve an acceptable performance. Neuromotor signature duplication methods and feature space augmentation methods may be used to meet the need for an increase in the number of samples. Such techniques manually or empirically define a set of parameters to introduce a degree of writer variability. Therefore, in the present study, a method to automatically model the most common writer variability traits is proposed. The method is used to generate offline signatures in the image and the feature space and train an ASVS. We also introduce an alternative approach to evaluate the quality of samples considering their feature vectors. We evaluated the performance of an ASVS with the generated samples using three well-known offline signature datasets: GPDS, MCYT-75, and CEDAR. In GPDS-300, when the SVM classifier was trained using one genuine signature per writer and the duplicates generated in the image space, the Equal Error Rate (EER) decreased from 5.71% to 1.08%. Under the same conditions, the EER decreased to 1.04% using the feature space augmentation technique. We also verified that the model that generates duplicates in the image space reproduces the most common writer variability traits in the three different datasets.

However, such systems do indeed need a lot of signatures to achieve an acceptable performance. Neuromotor signature duplication methods and feature space augmentation methods may be used to meet the need for an increase in the number of samples. Such techniques manually or empirically define a set of parameters to introduce a degree of writer variability. Therefore, in the present study, a method to automatically model the most common writer variability traits is proposed. The method is used to generate offline signatures in the image and the feature space and train an ASVS. We also introduce an alternative approach to evaluate the quality of samples considering their feature vectors. We evaluated the performance of an ASVS with the generated samples using three well-known offline signature datasets: GPDS, MCYT-75, and CEDAR. In GPDS-300, when the SVM classifier was trained using one genuine signature per writer and the duplicates generated in the image space, the Equal Error Rate (EER) decreased from 5.71% to 1.08%. Under the same conditions, the EER decreased to 1.04% using the feature space augmentation technique. We also verified that the model that generates duplicates in the image space reproduces the most common writer variability traits in the three different datasets.
abstract_zh: 通常，在现实场景中，可用于训练自动签名验证系统（ASVS）的签名样本很少。然而，这样的系统确实需要大量签名才能达到可接受的性能。可以使用神经运动特征复制方法和特征空间增强方法来满足样本数量增加的需要。此类技术手动或凭经验定义一组参数以引入一定程度的写入器可变性。因此，在本研究中，提出了一种自动建模最常见的作家变异性特征的方法。该方法用于在图像和特征空间中生成离线签名并训练 ASVS。我们还引入了另一种方法来考虑样本的特征向量来评估样本的质量。我们使用三个著名的离线签名数据集：GPDS、MCYT-75 和 CEDAR，通过生成的样本评估了 ASVS 的性能。在 GPDS-300 中，当使用每个作者一个真实签名和图像空间中生成的副本来训练 SVM 分类器时，等错误率 (EER) 从 5.71% 降低到 1.08%。在相同条件下，使用特征空间增强技术，EER 降低至 1.04%。我们还验证了在图像空间中生成重复项的模型再现了三个​​不同数据集中最常见的作者变异性特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动建模作者内在变异特征的方法，用于离线手写签名数据增强以提升自动签名验证系统性能。
AI.motivation: 真实场景中签名样本稀缺导致自动签名验证系统性能不足，现有数据增强方法依赖人工定义参数难以有效模拟作者变体。
AI.method: 通过自动学习作者常见书写变异特征，在图像空间和特征空间生成签名样本，并提出基于特征向量的样本质量评估方法。
AI.result: 在GPDS-300数据集上，使用图像空间生成样本使EER从5.71%降至1.08%，特征空间方法进一步降至1.04%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效生成符合作者书写习惯的高质量签名样本，显著提升自动签名验证系统性能。

authors_text: Yixin Gao,Yuriy Mishchenko,Anish Shah,Spyros Matsoukas,Shiv Vitaladevuni
title: Towards Data-efficient Modeling for Wake Word Spotting
title_zh: 面向唤醒词识别的数据高效建模
comment: ef:Proc. ICASSP 2020
comments: ef:Proc. ICASSP 2020
abstract: Wake word (WW) spotting is challenging in far-field not only because of the interference in signal transmission but also the complexity in acoustic environments. Traditional WW model training requires large amount of in-domain WW-specific data with substantial human annotations therefore it is hard to build WW models without such data. In this paper we present data-efficient solutions to address the challenges in WW modeling, such as domain-mismatch, noisy conditions, limited annotation, etc. Our proposed system is composed of a multi-condition training pipeline with a stratified data augmentation, which improves the model robustness to a variety of predefined acoustic conditions, together with a semi-supervised learning pipeline to accurately extract the WW and confusable examples from untranscribed speech corpus. Starting from only 10 hours of domain-mismatched WW audio, we are able to enlarge and enrich the training dataset by 20-100 times to capture the acoustic complexity. Our experiments on real user data show that the proposed solutions can achieve comparable performance of a production-grade model by saving 97\% of the amount of WW-specific data collection and 86\% of the bandwidth for annotation.
summary: Wake word (WW) spotting is challenging in far-field not only because of the interference in signal transmission but also the complexity in acoustic environments. Traditional WW model training requires large amount of in-domain WW-specific data with substantial human annotations therefore it is hard to build WW models without such data. In this paper we present data-efficient solutions to address the challenges in WW modeling, such as domain-mismatch, noisy conditions, limited annotation, etc. Our proposed system is composed of a multi-condition training pipeline with a stratified data augmentation, which improves the model robustness to a variety of predefined acoustic conditions, together with a semi-supervised learning pipeline to accurately extract the WW and confusable examples from untranscribed speech corpus. Starting from only 10 hours of domain-mismatched WW audio, we are able to enlarge and enrich the training dataset by 20-100 times to capture the acoustic complexity. Our experiments on real user data show that the proposed solutions can achieve comparable performance of a production-grade model by saving 97\% of the amount of WW-specific data collection and 86\% of the bandwidth for annotation.
abstract_zh: 唤醒词（WW）定位在远场中具有挑战性，不仅因为信号传输中的干扰，而且因为声学环境的复杂性。传统的 WW 模型训练需要大量具有大量人工注释的域内 WW 特定数据，因此如果没有这些数据，很难构建 WW 模型。在本文中，我们提出了数据高效的解决方案，以解决 WW 建模中的挑战，例如域不匹配、噪声条件、有限注释等。我们提出的系统由具有分层数据增强的多条件训练管道组成，该管道提高了模型对各种预定义声学条件的鲁棒性，同时还包括半监督学习管道，可从未转录的语音语料库中准确提取 WW 和易混淆的示例。从仅 10 小时的域不匹配 WW 音频开始，我们能够将训练数据集扩大和丰富 20-100 倍，以捕获声学复杂性。我们对真实用户数据的实验表明，所提出的解决方案可以通过节省 97% 的 WW 特定数据收集量和 86% 的注释带宽来实现与生产级模型相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出数据高效的方法解决远场唤醒词检测中的领域不匹配、噪声和标注限制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统唤醒词模型需要大量标注的领域内数据，数据获取成本高且难以应对复杂声学环境。
AI.method: 设计多条件训练管道结合分层数据增强提升模型鲁棒性，并通过半监督学习从未标注语音中提取唤醒词和混淆样本。
AI.result: 仅需10小时领域不匹配数据即可扩展20-100倍训练集，在真实用户数据上达到生产级模型性能，节省97%数据收集和86%标注成本。
AI.conclusion: 提出的解决方案显著降低唤醒词检测的数据依赖性，为实际部署提供高效可行的建模方法。

authors_text: Silvija Kokalj-Filipovic,Paul Toliver,William Johnson,Raymond R. Hoare II,Joseph J. Jezak
title: Deep Delay Loop Reservoir Computing for Specific Emitter Identification
title_zh: 用于特定发射器识别的深度延迟环储层计算
comment: 6 pages, appeared in GOMACTech 2020, released for public
comments: 6 pages, appeared in GOMACTech 2020, released for public
abstract: Current AI systems at the tactical edge lack the computational resources to support in-situ training and inference for situational awareness, and it is not always practical to leverage backhaul resources due to security, bandwidth, and mission latency requirements. We propose a solution through Deep delay Loop Reservoir Computing (DLR), a processing architecture supporting general machine learning algorithms on compact mobile devices by leveraging delay-loop (DL) reservoir computing in combination with innovative photonic hardware exploiting the inherent speed, and spatial, temporal and wavelength-based processing diversity of signals in the optical domain. DLR delivers reductions in form factor, hardware complexity, power consumption and latency, compared to State-of-the-Art . DLR can be implemented with a single photonic DL and a few electro-optical components. In certain cases multiple DL layers increase learning capacity of the DLR with no added latency. We demonstrate the advantages of DLR on the application of RF Specific Emitter Identification.
summary: Current AI systems at the tactical edge lack the computational resources to support in-situ training and inference for situational awareness, and it is not always practical to leverage backhaul resources due to security, bandwidth, and mission latency requirements. We propose a solution through Deep delay Loop Reservoir Computing (DLR), a processing architecture supporting general machine learning algorithms on compact mobile devices by leveraging delay-loop (DL) reservoir computing in combination with innovative photonic hardware exploiting the inherent speed, and spatial, temporal and wavelength-based processing diversity of signals in the optical domain. DLR delivers reductions in form factor, hardware complexity, power consumption and latency, compared to State-of-the-Art . DLR can be implemented with a single photonic DL and a few electro-optical components. In certain cases multiple DL layers increase learning capacity of the DLR with no added latency. We demonstrate the advantages of DLR on the application of RF Specific Emitter Identification.
abstract_zh: 当前处于战术边缘的人工智能系统缺乏支持态势感知的现场训练和推理的计算资源，并且由于安全、带宽和任务延迟要求，利用回程资源并不总是可行。我们通过深度延迟环路储层计算（DLR）提出了一种解决方案，这是一种处理架构，通过利用延迟环路（DL）储层计算与创新的光子硬件相结合，支持紧凑型移动设备上的通用机器学习算法，利用光域中信号的固有速度以及基于空间、时间和波长的处理多样性。与最先进的技术相比，DLR 降低了外形尺寸、硬件复杂性、功耗和延迟。 DLR 可以通过单个光子 DL 和一些电光组件来实现。在某些情况下，多个深度学习层可提高 DLR 的学习能力，且不会增加延迟。我们展示了 DLR 在射频特定发射器识别应用中的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为深度延迟环水库计算（DLR）的新型处理架构，用于在资源受限的战术边缘设备上实现特定发射机识别。
AI.motivation: 当前战术边缘的AI系统缺乏足够的计算资源支持现场训练和推理，且因安全、带宽和任务延迟限制难以依赖回传资源。
AI.method: 结合延迟环水库计算与光子硬件，利用光学域中的信号速度、空间、时间及波长多样性，通过单个光子延迟环和少量电光组件实现紧凑型计算架构。
AI.result: DLR在体积、硬件复杂度、功耗和延迟方面优于现有技术，且多层延迟环结构可提升学习能力而不增加延迟。
AI.conclusion: DLR为移动设备提供了高效、低功耗的AI解决方案，在射频特定发射机识别任务中表现出显著优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为深度延迟环水库计算（DLR）的新型处理架构，用于在资源受限的战术边缘设备上实现特定发射机识别。
ai_content.motivation: 当前战术边缘的AI系统缺乏足够的计算资源支持现场训练和推理，且因安全、带宽和任务延迟限制难以依赖回传资源。
ai_content.method: 结合延迟环水库计算与光子硬件，利用光学域中的信号速度、空间、时间及波长多样性，通过单个光子延迟环和少量电光组件实现紧凑型计算架构。
ai_content.result: DLR在体积、硬件复杂度、功耗和延迟方面优于现有技术，且多层延迟环结构可提升学习能力而不增加延迟。
ai_content.conclusion: DLR为移动设备提供了高效、低功耗的AI解决方案，在射频特定发射机识别任务中表现出显著优势。

search_text: Deep Delay Loop Reservoir Computing for Specific Emitter Identification 用于特定发射器识别的深度延迟环储层计算 Current AI systems at the tactical edge lack the computational resources to support in-situ training and inference for situational awareness, and it is not always practical to leverage backhaul resources due to security, bandwidth, and mission latency requirements. We propose a solution through Deep delay Loop Reservoir Computing (DLR), a processing architecture supporting general machine learning algorithms on compact mobile devices by leveraging delay-loop (DL) reservoir computing in combination with innovative photonic hardware exploiting the inherent speed, and spatial, temporal and wavelength-based processing diversity of signals in the optical domain. DLR delivers reductions in form factor, hardware complexity, power consumption and latency, compared to State-of-the-Art . DLR can be implemented with a single photonic DL and a few electro-optical components. In certain cases multiple DL layers increase learning capacity of the DLR with no added latency. We demonstrate the advantages of DLR on the application of RF Specific Emitter Identification. 当前处于战术边缘的人工智能系统缺乏支持态势感知的现场训练和推理的计算资源，并且由于安全、带宽和任务延迟要求，利用回程资源并不总是可行。我们通过深度延迟环路储层计算（DLR）提出了一种解决方案，这是一种处理架构，通过利用延迟环路（DL）储层计算与创新的光子硬件相结合，支持紧凑型移动设备上的通用机器学习算法，利用光域中信号的固有速度以及基于空间、时间和波长的处理多样性。与最先进的技术相比，DLR 降低了外形尺寸、硬件复杂性、功耗和延迟。 DLR 可以通过单个光子 DL 和一些电光组件来实现。在某些情况下，多个深度学习层可提高 DLR 的学习能力，且不会增加延迟。我们展示了 DLR 在射频特定发射器识别应用中的优势。 本文提出了一种名为深度延迟环水库计算（DLR）的新型处理架构，用于在资源受限的战术边缘设备上实现特定发射机识别。 Silvija Kokalj-Filipovic,Paul Toliver,William Johnson,Raymond R. Hoare II,Joseph J. Jezak eess.SP,cs.NE

authors_text: Matthew Hutchinson,Vijay Gadepally
title: Video Action Understanding
title_zh: 视频动作理解
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Access
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Access
abstract: Many believe that the successes of deep learning on image understanding problems can be replicated in the realm of video understanding. However, due to the scale and temporal nature of video, the span of video understanding problems and the set of proposed deep learning solutions is arguably wider and more diverse than those of their 2D image siblings. Finding, identifying, and predicting actions are a few of the most salient tasks in this emerging and rapidly evolving field. With a pedagogical emphasis, this tutorial introduces and systematizes fundamental topics, basic concepts, and notable examples in supervised video action understanding. Specifically, we clarify a taxonomy of action problems, catalog and highlight video datasets, describe common video data preparation methods, present the building blocks of state-of-the art deep learning model architectures, and formalize domain-specific metrics to baseline proposed solutions. This tutorial is intended to be accessible to a general computer science audience and assumes a conceptual understanding of supervised learning.
summary: Many believe that the successes of deep learning on image understanding problems can be replicated in the realm of video understanding. However, due to the scale and temporal nature of video, the span of video understanding problems and the set of proposed deep learning solutions is arguably wider and more diverse than those of their 2D image siblings. Finding, identifying, and predicting actions are a few of the most salient tasks in this emerging and rapidly evolving field. With a pedagogical emphasis, this tutorial introduces and systematizes fundamental topics, basic concepts, and notable examples in supervised video action understanding. Specifically, we clarify a taxonomy of action problems, catalog and highlight video datasets, describe common video data preparation methods, present the building blocks of state-of-the art deep learning model architectures, and formalize domain-specific metrics to baseline proposed solutions. This tutorial is intended to be accessible to a general computer science audience and assumes a conceptual understanding of supervised learning.
abstract_zh: 许多人认为深度学习在图像理解问题上的成功可以在视频理解领域复制。然而，由于视频的规模和时间性质，视频理解问题的跨度和提出的深度学习解决方案集可以说比它们的 2D 图像兄弟姐妹更广泛、更多样化。查找、识别和预测行动是这个新兴且快速发展的领域中最重要的任务之一。本教程以教学为重点，介绍并系统化了监督视频动作理解中的基本主题、基本概念和著名示例。具体来说，我们阐明了动作问题的分类，对视频数据集进行分类和突出显示，描述常见的视频数据准备方法，提出最先进的深度学习模型架构的构建块，并将特定领域的指标形式化为基线提出的解决方案。本教程旨在供一般计算机科学受众使用，并假设对监督学习有概念性的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了监督视频动作理解的基础概念、方法及数据集，旨在为计算机科学领域提供教学性指导。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在图像理解上取得成功，但视频理解因规模和时间特性更为复杂，亟需系统性教程以梳理其核心概念与方法。
AI.method: 通过分类动作问题、整理视频数据集、介绍数据预处理方法、解析前沿模型架构及定义领域特定评估指标，系统构建视频动作理解的知识框架。
AI.result: 形成了一套结构化的视频动作理解知识体系，为研究者与开发者提供系统性学习资源与基准评估方案。
AI.conclusion: 视频动作理解领域需持续探索更高效模型与评估标准，本文为该领域发展提供了基础性教学框架与研究方向指引。

authors_text: Jialu Zhang,Yitan Wang,Mark Santolucito,Ruzica Piskac
title: Succinct Explanations With Cascading Decision Trees
title_zh: 级联决策树的简洁解释
abstract: The decision tree is one of the most popular and classical machine learning models from the 1980s. However, in many practical applications, decision trees tend to generate decision paths with excessive depth. Long decision paths often cause overfitting problems, and make models difficult to interpret. With longer decision paths, inference is also more likely to fail when the data contain missing values. In this work, we propose a new tree model called Cascading Decision Trees to alleviate this problem. The key insight of Cascading Decision Trees is to separate the decision path and the explanation path. Our experiments show that on average, Cascading Decision Trees generate 63.38% shorter explanation paths, avoiding overfitting and thus achieve higher test accuracy. We also empirically demonstrate that Cascading Decision Trees have advantages in the robustness against missing values.
summary: The decision tree is one of the most popular and classical machine learning models from the 1980s. However, in many practical applications, decision trees tend to generate decision paths with excessive depth. Long decision paths often cause overfitting problems, and make models difficult to interpret. With longer decision paths, inference is also more likely to fail when the data contain missing values. In this work, we propose a new tree model called Cascading Decision Trees to alleviate this problem. The key insight of Cascading Decision Trees is to separate the decision path and the explanation path. Our experiments show that on average, Cascading Decision Trees generate 63.38% shorter explanation paths, avoiding overfitting and thus achieve higher test accuracy. We also empirically demonstrate that Cascading Decision Trees have advantages in the robustness against missing values.
abstract_zh: 决策树是 20 世纪 80 年代最流行、最经典的机器学习模型之一。然而，在许多实际应用中，决策树往往会生成深度过大的决策路径。较长的决策路径通常会导致过度拟合问题，并使模型难以解释。如果决策路径较长，当数据包含缺失值时，推理也更有可能失败。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为级联决策树的新树模型来缓解这个问题。级联决策树的关键见解是将决策路径和解释路径分开。我们的实验表明，平均而言，级联决策树生成的解释路径缩短了 63.38%，避免了过度拟合，从而实现了更高的测试精度。我们还凭经验证明级联决策树在针对缺失值的鲁棒性方面具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为级联决策树的新模型，旨在解决传统决策树生成过深决策路径导致的过拟合、可解释性差和缺失值处理问题。
AI.motivation: 传统决策树在实际应用中常因决策路径过长引发过拟合、解释困难及缺失值处理失效等问题，亟需改进模型结构以提升性能与可解释性。
AI.method: 通过分离决策路径与解释路径，构建级联决策树模型，缩短解释路径长度并增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，级联决策树平均缩短63.38%的解释路径，提升测试准确率，并在缺失值场景下展现更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 级联决策树有效缓解了传统决策树的路径过长问题，在准确性、可解释性及缺失值处理方面均优于现有方法。

Our experiments show that on average, Cascading Decision Trees generate 63.38% shorter explanation paths, avoiding overfitting and thus achieve higher test accuracy. We also empirically demonstrate that Cascading Decision Trees have advantages in the robustness against missing values. 决策树是 20 世纪 80 年代最流行、最经典的机器学习模型之一。然而，在许多实际应用中，决策树往往会生成深度过大的决策路径。较长的决策路径通常会导致过度拟合问题，并使模型难以解释。如果决策路径较长，当数据包含缺失值时，推理也更有可能失败。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为级联决策树的新树模型来缓解这个问题。级联决策树的关键见解是将决策路径和解释路径分开。我们的实验表明，平均而言，级联决策树生成的解释路径缩短了 63.38%，避免了过度拟合，从而实现了更高的测试精度。我们还凭经验证明级联决策树在针对缺失值的鲁棒性方面具有优势。 本文提出一种名为级联决策树的新模型，旨在解决传统决策树生成过深决策路径导致的过拟合、可解释性差和缺失值处理问题。 Jialu Zhang,Yitan Wang,Mark Santolucito,Ruzica Piskac cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jeff Delaune,Jacob Izraelevitz,Larry A. Young,William Rapin,Evgeniy Sklyanskiy,Wayne Johnson,Aaron Schutte,Abigail Fraeman,Valerie Scott,Carl Leake,Erik Ballesteros,Shannah Withrow,Raghav Bhagwat,Haley Cummings,Kim Aaron,Marcel Veismann,Skylar Wei,Regina Lee,Luis Pabon Madrid,Morteza Gharib,Joel Burdick
title: Motivations and Preliminary Design for Mid-Air Deployment of a Science Rotorcraft on Mars
title_zh: 火星上空中部署科学旋翼机的动机和初步设计
abstract: Mid-Air Deployment (MAD) of a rotorcraft during Entry, Descent and Landing (EDL) on Mars eliminates the need to carry a propulsion or airbag landing system. This reduces the total mass inside the aeroshell by more than 100 kg and simplifies the aeroshell architecture. MAD's lighter and simpler design is likely to bring the risk and cost associated with the mission down. Moreover, the lighter entry mass enables landing in the Martian highlands, at elevations inaccessible to current EDL technologies. This paper proposes a novel MAD concept for a Mars helicopter. We suggest a minimum science payload package to perform relevant science in the highlands. A variant of the Ingenuity helicopter is proposed to provide increased deceleration during MAD, and enough lift to fly the science payload in the highlands. We show in simulation that the lighter aeroshell results in a lower terminal velocity (30 m/s) at the end of the parachute phase of the EDL, and at higher altitudes than other approaches. After discussing the aerodynamics, controls, guidance, and mechanical challenges associated with deploying at such speed, we propose a backshell architecture that addresses them to release the helicopter in the safest conditions. Finally, we implemented the helicopter model and aerodynamic descent perturbations in the JPL Dynamics and Real-Time Simulation (DARTS)framework. Preliminary performance evaluation indicates landing and helicopter operation scan be achieved up to 5 km MOLA (Mars Orbiter Laser Altimeter reference).
summary: Mid-Air Deployment (MAD) of a rotorcraft during Entry, Descent and Landing (EDL) on Mars eliminates the need to carry a propulsion or airbag landing system. This reduces the total mass inside the aeroshell by more than 100 kg and simplifies the aeroshell architecture. MAD's lighter and simpler design is likely to bring the risk and cost associated with the mission down. Moreover, the lighter entry mass enables landing in the Martian highlands, at elevations inaccessible to current EDL technologies. This paper proposes a novel MAD concept for a Mars helicopter. We suggest a minimum science payload package to perform relevant science in the highlands. A variant of the Ingenuity helicopter is proposed to provide increased deceleration during MAD, and enough lift to fly the science payload in the highlands. We show in simulation that the lighter aeroshell results in a lower terminal velocity (30 m/s) at the end of the parachute phase of the EDL, and at higher altitudes than other approaches. After discussing the aerodynamics, controls, guidance, and mechanical challenges associated with deploying at such speed, we propose a backshell architecture that addresses them to release the helicopter in the safest conditions. Finally, we implemented the helicopter model and aerodynamic descent perturbations in the JPL Dynamics and Real-Time Simulation (DARTS)framework. Preliminary performance evaluation indicates landing and helicopter operation scan be achieved up to 5 km MOLA (Mars Orbiter Laser Altimeter reference).
abstract_zh: 旋翼机在火星进入、下降和着陆 (EDL) 期间的空中部署 (MAD) 消除了携带推进或安全气囊着陆系统的需要。这使得航空外壳内部的总质量减少了 100 公斤以上，并简化了航空外壳结构。 MAD 更轻、更简单的设计可能会降低与任务相关的风险和成本。此外，更轻的进入质量使得能够在当前 EDL 技术无法到达的高度的火星高地着陆。本文提出了一种新颖的火星直升机 MAD 概念。我们建议使用最低科学有效载荷包来在高地进行相关科学。建议采用 Ingenuity 直升机的变体，以在 MAD 期间提供更大的减速度，并提供足够的升力以在高地飞行科学有效载荷。我们在模拟中表明，较轻的航空外壳在 EDL 降落伞阶段结束时导致较低的终端速度 (30 m/s)，并且在比其他方法更高的高度。在讨论了与以这种速度部署相关的空气动力学、控制、制导和机械挑战后，我们提出了一种后壳架构，可以解决这些问题，以便在最安全的条件下释放直升机。最后，我们在 JPL 动力学和实时仿真 (DARTS) 框架中实现了直升机模型和气动下降扰动。初步性能评估表明着陆和直升机操作扫描可实现最远5公里的MOLA（火星轨道飞行器激光高度计参考）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种火星直升机的中空部署（MAD）概念设计，旨在通过减少着陆系统质量并简化气动外壳结构，实现高海拔地区的科学探测。
AI.motivation: 传统着陆系统质量大且复杂，限制了火星高海拔地区的探索。MAD技术可减轻质量、降低成本，并使直升机在高海拔地区作业成为可能。
AI.method: 基于Ingenuity直升机改进设计，增加减速能力与升力，通过JPL DARTS框架模拟气动下降扰动，验证轻量化气动外壳的终端速度与部署安全性。
AI.result: 模拟显示轻量化气动外壳终端速度降至30 m/s，可在比现有技术更高的海拔（5 km MOLA）实现安全着陆与直升机运行。
AI.conclusion: MAD概念在技术可行性与科学探测潜力上表现良好，为未来火星高海拔区域探索提供了创新方案。

authors_text: Hejia Zhang,Matthew C. Fontaine,Amy K. Hoover,Julian Togelius,Bistra Dilkina,Stefanos Nikolaidis
title: Video Game Level Repair via Mixed Integer Linear Programming
title_zh: 通过混合整数线性规划修复视频游戏关卡
comment: Accepted to AIIDE 2020 (oral)
comments: Accepted to AIIDE 2020 (oral)
abstract: Recent advancements in procedural content generation via machine learning enable the generation of video-game levels that are aesthetically similar to human-authored examples. However, the generated levels are often unplayable without additional editing. We propose a generate-then-repair framework for automatic generation of playable levels adhering to specific styles. The framework constructs levels using a generative adversarial network (GAN) trained with human-authored examples and repairs them using a mixed-integer linear program (MIP) with playability constraints. A key component of the framework is computing minimum cost edits between the GAN generated level and the solution of the MIP solver, which we cast as a minimum cost network flow problem. Results show that the proposed framework generates a diverse range of playable levels, that capture the spatial relationships between objects exhibited in the human-authored levels.
summary: Recent advancements in procedural content generation via machine learning enable the generation of video-game levels that are aesthetically similar to human-authored examples. However, the generated levels are often unplayable without additional editing. We propose a generate-then-repair framework for automatic generation of playable levels adhering to specific styles. The framework constructs levels using a generative adversarial network (GAN) trained with human-authored examples and repairs them using a mixed-integer linear program (MIP) with playability constraints. A key component of the framework is computing minimum cost edits between the GAN generated level and the solution of the MIP solver, which we cast as a minimum cost network flow problem. Results show that the proposed framework generates a diverse range of playable levels, that capture the spatial relationships between objects exhibited in the human-authored levels.
abstract_zh: 通过机器学习生成程序内容的最新进展使得能够生成在美学上与人类创作的示例相似的视频游戏关卡。然而，如果不进行额外的编辑，生成的关卡通常无法播放。我们提出了一个生成然后修复框架，用于自动生成符合特定风格的可玩关卡。该框架使用经过人类编写的示例训练的生成对抗网络 (GAN) 构建关卡，并使用具有可玩性约束的混合整数线性程序 (MIP) 修复它们。该框架的一个关键组成部分是计算 GAN 生成级别和 MIP 求解器的解决方案之间的最小成本编辑，我们将其视为最小成本网络流问题。结果表明，所提出的框架生成了各种可玩的关卡，捕捉了人类创作的关卡中展示的对象之间的空间关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过混合整数线性规划（MIP）自动修复生成的视频游戏关卡，使其符合可玩性约束的框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习能生成风格化关卡，但生成内容通常缺乏可玩性，需人工编辑修正。
AI.method: 结合生成对抗网络（GAN）生成初始关卡，利用MIP模型约束可玩性，并将修复过程转化为最小成本网络流问题计算最优编辑方案。
AI.result: 框架成功生成多样化可玩关卡，保留了人类创作中物体的空间关系特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生成-修复联合框架，有效解决了程序化生成关卡的可玩性问题，为游戏设计提供自动化工具。

authors_text: Raul de Queiroz Mendes,Eduardo Godinho Ribeiro,Nicolas dos Santos Rosa,Valdir Grassi Jr
title: On Deep Learning Techniques to Boost Monocular Depth Estimation for Autonomous Navigation
title_zh: 深度学习技术促进自主导航单目深度估计
comment: 29 pages, 16 figures. Preprint published in the Elsevier's Robotics and Autonomous Systems journal on November 23, 2020
comments: 29 pages, 16 figures. Preprint published in the Elsevier's Robotics and Autonomous Systems journal on November 23, 2020
abstract: Inferring the depth of images is a fundamental inverse problem within the field of Computer Vision since depth information is obtained through 2D images, which can be generated from infinite possibilities of observed real scenes. Benefiting from the progress of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to explore structural features and spatial image information, Single Image Depth Estimation (SIDE) is often highlighted in scopes of scientific and technological innovation, as this concept provides advantages related to its low implementation cost and robustness to environmental conditions. In the context of autonomous vehicles, state-of-the-art CNNs optimize the SIDE task by producing high-quality depth maps, which are essential during the autonomous navigation process in different locations. However, such networks are usually supervised by sparse and noisy depth data, from Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) laser scans, and are carried out at high computational cost, requiring high-performance Graphic Processing Units (GPUs). Therefore, we propose a new lightweight and fast supervised CNN architecture combined with novel feature extraction models which are designed for real-world autonomous navigation. We also introduce an efficient surface normals module, jointly with a simple geometric 2.5D loss function, to solve SIDE problems. We also innovate by incorporating multiple Deep Learning techniques, such as the use of densification algorithms and additional semantic, surface normals and depth information to train our framework. The method introduced in this work focuses on robotic applications in indoor and outdoor environments and its results are evaluated on the competitive and publicly available NYU Depth V2 and KITTI Depth datasets.
summary: Inferring the depth of images is a fundamental inverse problem within the field of Computer Vision since depth information is obtained through 2D images, which can be generated from infinite possibilities of observed real scenes. Benefiting from the progress of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to explore structural features and spatial image information, Single Image Depth Estimation (SIDE) is often highlighted in scopes of scientific and technological innovation, as this concept provides advantages related to its low implementation cost and robustness to environmental conditions. In the context of autonomous vehicles, state-of-the-art CNNs optimize the SIDE task by producing high-quality depth maps, which are essential during the autonomous navigation process in different locations. However, such networks are usually supervised by sparse and noisy depth data, from Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) laser scans, and are carried out at high computational cost, requiring high-performance Graphic Processing Units (GPUs). Therefore, we propose a new lightweight and fast supervised CNN architecture combined with novel feature extraction models which are designed for real-world autonomous navigation. We also introduce an efficient surface normals module, jointly with a simple geometric 2.5D loss function, to solve SIDE problems. We also innovate by incorporating multiple Deep Learning techniques, such as the use of densification algorithms and additional semantic, surface normals and depth information to train our framework. The method introduced in this work focuses on robotic applications in indoor and outdoor environments and its results are evaluated on the competitive and publicly available NYU Depth V2 and KITTI Depth datasets.
abstract_zh: 推断图像的深度是计算机视觉领域的一个基本逆问题，因为深度信息是通过 2D 图像获得的，而二维图像可以从观察到的真实场景的无限可能性中生成。受益于卷积神经网络（CNN）在探索结构特征和空间图像信息方面的进步，单图像深度估计（SIDE）经常在科技创新领域受到重视，因为该概念具有实施成本低和对环境条件鲁棒性等优势。在自动驾驶汽车的背景下，最先进的 CNN 通过生成高质量的深度图来优化 SIDE 任务，这在不同位置的自主导航过程中至关重要。然而，此类网络通常由来自光探测和测距 (LiDAR) 激光扫描的稀疏且嘈杂的深度数据进行监督，并且计算成本很高，需要高性能图形处理单元 (GPU)。因此，我们提出了一种新的轻量级、快速的监督 CNN 架构，与专为现实世界自主导航而设计的新颖特征提取模型相结合。我们还引入了一个高效的表面法线模块，结合简单的几何 2.5D 损失函数，来解决 SIDE 问题。我们还通过结合多种深度学习技术进行创新，例如使用致密化算法和附加语义、表面法线和深度信息来训练我们的框架。这项工作中介绍的方法侧重于室内和室外环境中的机器人应用，其结果在竞争性且公开的 NYU Depth V2 和 KITTI Depth 数据集上进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级且高效的卷积神经网络架构，结合新型特征提取模型和几何损失函数，以提升单目深度估计在自动驾驶中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法依赖稀疏且昂贵的LiDAR数据训练，计算成本高且难以适应复杂环境，需开发更高效、低成本的解决方案以满足自动驾驶需求。
AI.method: 设计轻量级CNN架构，整合表面法线模块与2.5D几何损失函数，并引入密集化算法及语义信息、法线信息与深度信息的多模态融合训练框架。
AI.result: 在NYU Depth V2和KITTI Depth数据集上验证，模型在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算成本，适用于室内外自动驾驶场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过多技术融合有效提升了单目深度估计的效率与鲁棒性，为实时自动驾驶导航提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Marton Havasi,Rodolphe Jenatton,Stanislav Fort,Jeremiah Zhe Liu,Jasper Snoek,Balaji Lakshminarayanan,Andrew M. Dai,Dustin Tran
title: Training independent subnetworks for robust prediction
title_zh: 训练独立子网络以进行稳健预测
comment: Updated to the ICLR camera ready version, added reference to Soflaei et al. 2020
comments: Updated to the ICLR camera ready version, added reference to Soflaei et al. 2020
abstract: Recent approaches to efficiently ensemble neural networks have shown that strong robustness and uncertainty performance can be achieved with a negligible gain in parameters over the original network. However, these methods still require multiple forward passes for prediction, leading to a significant computational cost. In this work, we show a surprising result: the benefits of using multiple predictions can be achieved `for free' under a single model's forward pass. In particular, we show that, using a multi-input multi-output (MIMO) configuration, one can utilize a single model's capacity to train multiple subnetworks that independently learn the task at hand. By ensembling the predictions made by the subnetworks, we improve model robustness without increasing compute. We observe a significant improvement in negative log-likelihood, accuracy, and calibration error on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet, and their out-of-distribution variants compared to previous methods.
summary: Recent approaches to efficiently ensemble neural networks have shown that strong robustness and uncertainty performance can be achieved with a negligible gain in parameters over the original network. However, these methods still require multiple forward passes for prediction, leading to a significant computational cost. In this work, we show a surprising result: the benefits of using multiple predictions can be achieved `for free' under a single model's forward pass. In particular, we show that, using a multi-input multi-output (MIMO) configuration, one can utilize a single model's capacity to train multiple subnetworks that independently learn the task at hand. By ensembling the predictions made by the subnetworks, we improve model robustness without increasing compute. We observe a significant improvement in negative log-likelihood, accuracy, and calibration error on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet, and their out-of-distribution variants compared to previous methods.
abstract_zh: 最近有效集成神经网络的方法表明，可以通过原始网络的参数增益可以忽略不计来实现强大的鲁棒性和不确定性性能。然而，这些方法仍然需要多次前向传递来进行预测，从而导致巨大的计算成本。在这项工作中，我们展示了一个令人惊讶的结果：在单个模型的前向传播下可以“免费”实现使用多个预测的好处。特别是，我们表明，使用多输入多输出（MIMO）配置，人们可以利用单个模型的能力来训练多个子网络，这些子网络独立地学习手头的任务。通过集成子网络做出的预测，我们在不增加计算量的情况下提高了模型的鲁棒性。与之前的方法相比，我们观察到 CIFAR10、CIFAR100、ImageNet 及其分布外变体的负对数似然性、准确性和校准误差有显着改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过训练独立子网络来提升模型预测鲁棒性，无需额外计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有集成方法虽参数开销小，但需多次前向计算导致高计算成本，本文旨在实现单次前向传递下的多预测优势。
AI.method: 采用多输入多输出（MIMO）架构，在单一模型中训练多个独立子网络并集成其预测结果。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/100、ImageNet及其分布外变体上，负对数似然、准确率和校准误差均优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了单模型内多子网络集成的有效性，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升鲁棒性。

authors_text: Dallas Card,Peter Henderson,Urvashi Khandelwal,Robin Jia,Kyle Mahowald,Dan Jurafsky
title: With Little Power Comes Great Responsibility
title_zh: 小力量带来大责任
comment: To appear at EMNLP 2020
comments: To appear at EMNLP 2020
abstract: Despite its importance to experimental design, statistical power (the probability that, given a real effect, an experiment will reject the null hypothesis) has largely been ignored by the NLP community. Underpowered experiments make it more difficult to discern the difference between statistical noise and meaningful model improvements, and increase the chances of exaggerated findings. By meta-analyzing a set of existing NLP papers and datasets, we characterize typical power for a variety of settings and conclude that underpowered experiments are common in the NLP literature. In particular, for several tasks in the popular GLUE benchmark, small test sets mean that most attempted comparisons to state of the art models will not be adequately powered. Similarly, based on reasonable assumptions, we find that the most typical experimental design for human rating studies will be underpowered to detect small model differences, of the sort that are frequently studied. For machine translation, we find that typical test sets of 2000 sentences have approximately 75% power to detect differences of 1 BLEU point. To improve the situation going forward, we give an overview of best practices for power analysis in NLP and release a series of notebooks to assist with future power analyses.
summary: Despite its importance to experimental design, statistical power (the probability that, given a real effect, an experiment will reject the null hypothesis) has largely been ignored by the NLP community. Underpowered experiments make it more difficult to discern the difference between statistical noise and meaningful model improvements, and increase the chances of exaggerated findings. By meta-analyzing a set of existing NLP papers and datasets, we characterize typical power for a variety of settings and conclude that underpowered experiments are common in the NLP literature. In particular, for several tasks in the popular GLUE benchmark, small test sets mean that most attempted comparisons to state of the art models will not be adequately powered. Similarly, based on reasonable assumptions, we find that the most typical experimental design for human rating studies will be underpowered to detect small model differences, of the sort that are frequently studied. For machine translation, we find that typical test sets of 2000 sentences have approximately 75% power to detect differences of 1 BLEU point. To improve the situation going forward, we give an overview of best practices for power analysis in NLP and release a series of notebooks to assist with future power analyses.
abstract_zh: 尽管统计功效对实验设计很重要，但它在很大程度上被 NLP 界忽视了。动力不足的实验使得辨别统计噪声和有意义的模型改进之间的差异变得更加困难，并增加了夸大结果的机会。通过对一组现有的 NLP 论文和数据集进行元分析，我们描述了各种设置的典型功效，并得出结论，功效不足的实验在 NLP 文献中很常见。特别是，对于流行的 GLUE 基准测试中的几个任务，小测试集意味着大多数与最先进模型的尝试都无法得到充分的支持。同样，基于合理的假设，我们发现用于人类评级研究的最典型的实验设计将不足以检测经常研究的那种小的模型差异。对于机器翻译，我们发现 2000 个句子的典型测试集具有大约 75% 的功效来检测 1 BLEU 点的差异。为了改善未来的情况，我们概述了 NLP 功耗分析的最佳实践，并发布了一系列笔记本来协助未来的功耗分析。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了自然语言处理（NLP）领域实验设计中统计功效不足的问题，并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 统计功效对实验可靠性至关重要，但NLP社区普遍忽视该问题，导致实验结果难以区分噪声与真实效果。
AI.method: 通过元分析现有NLP论文和数据集，评估不同实验场景下的统计功效，并基于合理假设进行模拟分析。
AI.result: 发现NLP文献中普遍存在低功效实验，如GLUE基准测试因小测试集导致比较无效，人类评分实验难以检测细微模型差异，机器翻译测试集仅约75%功效检测1 BLEU点差异。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁NLP研究者重视统计功效分析，提供最佳实践指南及工具，以提升实验设计的科学性和结果可信度。

search_text: With Little Power Comes Great Responsibility 小力量带来大责任 Despite its importance to experimental design, statistical power (the probability that, given a real effect, an experiment will reject the null hypothesis) has largely been ignored by the NLP community. Underpowered experiments make it more difficult to discern the difference between statistical noise and meaningful model improvements, and increase the chances of exaggerated findings. By meta-analyzing a set of existing NLP papers and datasets, we characterize typical power for a variety of settings and conclude that underpowered experiments are common in the NLP literature. In particular, for several tasks in the popular GLUE benchmark, small test sets mean that most attempted comparisons to state of the art models will not be adequately powered. Similarly, based on reasonable assumptions, we find that the most typical experimental design for human rating studies will be underpowered to detect small model differences, of the sort that are frequently studied. For machine translation, we find that typical test sets of 2000 sentences have approximately 75% power to detect differences of 1 BLEU point. To improve the situation going forward, we give an overview of best practices for power analysis in NLP and release a series of notebooks to assist with future power analyses. 尽管统计功效对实验设计很重要，但它在很大程度上被 NLP 界忽视了。动力不足的实验使得辨别统计噪声和有意义的模型改进之间的差异变得更加困难，并增加了夸大结果的机会。通过对一组现有的 NLP 论文和数据集进行元分析，我们描述了各种设置的典型功效，并得出结论，功效不足的实验在 NLP 文献中很常见。特别是，对于流行的 GLUE 基准测试中的几个任务，小测试集意味着大多数与最先进模型的尝试都无法得到充分的支持。同样，基于合理的假设，我们发现用于人类评级研究的最典型的实验设计将不足以检测经常研究的那种小的模型差异。对于机器翻译，我们发现 2000 个句子的典型测试集具有大约 75% 的功效来检测 1 BLEU 点的差异。为了改善未来的情况，我们概述了 NLP 功耗分析的最佳实践，并发布了一系列笔记本来协助未来的功耗分析。 本文分析了自然语言处理（NLP）领域实验设计中统计功效不足的问题，并提出改进方法。 Dallas Card,Peter Henderson,Urvashi Khandelwal,Robin Jia,Kyle Mahowald,Dan Jurafsky cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Darshana Rathnayake,Ashen de Silva,Dasun Puwakdandawa,Lakmal Meegahapola,Archan Misra,Indika Perera
title: Jointly Optimizing Sensing Pipelines for Multimodal Mixed Reality Interaction
title_zh: 联合优化多模式混合现实交互的传感管道
comment: 17th IEEE International Conference on Mobile Ad-Hoc and Sensor Systems (MASS) - 2020
comments: 17th IEEE International Conference on Mobile Ad-Hoc and Sensor Systems (MASS) - 2020
abstract: Natural human interactions for Mixed Reality Applications are overwhelmingly multimodal: humans communicate intent and instructions via a combination of visual, aural and gestural cues. However, supporting low-latency and accurate comprehension of such multimodal instructions (MMI), on resource-constrained wearable devices, remains an open challenge, especially as the state-of-the-art comprehension techniques for each individual modality increasingly utilize complex Deep Neural Network models. We demonstrate the possibility of overcoming the core limitation of latency--vs.--accuracy tradeoff by exploiting cross-modal dependencies -- i.e., by compensating for the inferior performance of one model with an increased accuracy of more complex model of a different modality. We present a sensor fusion architecture that performs MMI comprehension in a quasi-synchronous fashion, by fusing visual, speech and gestural input. The architecture is reconfigurable and supports dynamic modification of the complexity of the data processing pipeline for each individual modality in response to contextual changes. Using a representative "classroom" context and a set of four common interaction primitives, we then demonstrate how the choices between low and high complexity models for each individual modality are coupled. In particular, we show that (a) a judicious combination of low and high complexity models across modalities can offer a dramatic 3-fold decrease in comprehension latency together with an increase 10-15% in accuracy, and (b) the right collective choice of models is context dependent, with the performance of some model combinations being significantly more sensitive to changes in scene context or choice of interaction.
summary: Natural human interactions for Mixed Reality Applications are overwhelmingly multimodal: humans communicate intent and instructions via a combination of visual, aural and gestural cues. However, supporting low-latency and accurate comprehension of such multimodal instructions (MMI), on resource-constrained wearable devices, remains an open challenge, especially as the state-of-the-art comprehension techniques for each individual modality increasingly utilize complex Deep Neural Network models. We demonstrate the possibility of overcoming the core limitation of latency--vs.--accuracy tradeoff by exploiting cross-modal dependencies -- i.e., by compensating for the inferior performance of one model with an increased accuracy of more complex model of a different modality. We present a sensor fusion architecture that performs MMI comprehension in a quasi-synchronous fashion, by fusing visual, speech and gestural input. The architecture is reconfigurable and supports dynamic modification of the complexity of the data processing pipeline for each individual modality in response to contextual changes. Using a representative "classroom" context and a set of four common interaction primitives, we then demonstrate how the choices between low and high complexity models for each individual modality are coupled. In particular, we show that (a) a judicious combination of low and high complexity models across modalities can offer a dramatic 3-fold decrease in comprehension latency together with an increase 10-15% in accuracy, and (b) the right collective choice of models is context dependent, with the performance of some model combinations being significantly more sensitive to changes in scene context or choice of interaction.
abstract_zh: 混合现实应用程序的自然人类交互绝大多数是多模式的：人类通过视觉、听觉和手势提示的组合来传达意图和指令。然而，在资源有限的可穿戴设备上支持此类多模态指令 (MMI) 的低延迟和准确理解仍然是一个开放的挑战，特别是随着每种单独模态的最先进的理解技术越来越多地利用复杂的深度神经网络模型。我们证明了通过利用跨模态依赖性来克服延迟与准确性权衡的核心限制的可能性，即通过提高不同模态的更复杂模型的准确性来补偿一个模型的较差性能。我们提出了一种传感器融合架构，通过融合视觉、语音和手势输入，以准同步方式执行 MMI 理解。该架构是可重新配置的，并支持动态修改每个单独模态的数据处理管道的复杂性，以响应上下文变化。然后，我们使用代表性的“课堂”上下文和一组四个常见的交互原语，演示如何耦合每个单独模态的低复杂度模型和高复杂度模型之间的选择。特别是，我们表明（a）跨模态的低复杂度和高复杂度模型的明智组合可以使理解延迟显着减少 3 倍，同时准确度提高 10-15％，（b）模型的正确集体选择是上下文相关的，某些模型组合的性能对场景上下文或交互选择的变化明显更加敏感。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态混合现实交互的感知流水线联合优化方法，通过跨模态依赖关系平衡延迟与准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络模型在资源受限的可穿戴设备上难以同时满足多模态交互的低延迟和高准确性需求，需解决模态间性能权衡问题。
AI.method: 设计可重构的传感器融合架构，准同步处理视觉、语音和手势输入，动态调整各模态数据处理复杂度以适应上下文变化。
AI.result: 在教室场景实验中，低/高复杂度模型组合使理解延迟降低3倍且准确率提升10-15%，模型选择效果高度依赖场景上下文和交互方式。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态动态优化可有效突破延迟-准确性权衡，但需根据具体交互场景和上下文条件选择最优模型组合策略。

authors_text: Daniel J. Fremont,Edward Kim,Tommaso Dreossi,Shromona Ghosh,Xiangyu Yue,Alberto L. Sangiovanni-Vincentelli,Sanjit A. Seshia
title: Scenic: A Language for Scenario Specification and Data Generation
title_zh: Scenic：场景规范和数据生成的语言
comment: Supercedes arXiv:1809.09310
comments: Supercedes arXiv:1809.09310
abstract: We propose a new probabilistic programming language for the design and analysis of cyber-physical systems, especially those based on machine learning. Specifically, we consider the problems of training a system to be robust to rare events, testing its performance under different conditions, and debugging failures. We show how a probabilistic programming language can help address these problems by specifying distributions encoding interesting types of inputs, then sampling these to generate specialized training and test data. More generally, such languages can be used to write environment models, an essential prerequisite to any formal analysis. In this paper, we focus on systems like autonomous cars and robots, whose environment at any point in time is a 'scene', a configuration of physical objects and agents. We design a domain-specific language, Scenic, for describing scenarios that are distributions over scenes and the behaviors of their agents over time. As a probabilistic programming language, Scenic allows assigning distributions to features of the scene, as well as declaratively imposing hard and soft constraints over the scene. We develop specialized techniques for sampling from the resulting distribution, taking advantage of the structure provided by Scenic's domain-specific syntax. Finally, we apply Scenic in a case study on a convolutional neural network designed to detect cars in road images, improving its performance beyond that achieved by state-of-the-art synthetic data generation methods.
summary: We propose a new probabilistic programming language for the design and analysis of cyber-physical systems, especially those based on machine learning. Specifically, we consider the problems of training a system to be robust to rare events, testing its performance under different conditions, and debugging failures. We show how a probabilistic programming language can help address these problems by specifying distributions encoding interesting types of inputs, then sampling these to generate specialized training and test data. More generally, such languages can be used to write environment models, an essential prerequisite to any formal analysis. In this paper, we focus on systems like autonomous cars and robots, whose environment at any point in time is a 'scene', a configuration of physical objects and agents. We design a domain-specific language, Scenic, for describing scenarios that are distributions over scenes and the behaviors of their agents over time. As a probabilistic programming language, Scenic allows assigning distributions to features of the scene, as well as declaratively imposing hard and soft constraints over the scene. We develop specialized techniques for sampling from the resulting distribution, taking advantage of the structure provided by Scenic's domain-specific syntax. Finally, we apply Scenic in a case study on a convolutional neural network designed to detect cars in road images, improving its performance beyond that achieved by state-of-the-art synthetic data generation methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的概率编程语言，用于设计和分析网络物理系统，特别是基于机器学习的系统。具体来说，我们考虑训练系统对罕见事件具有鲁棒性、在不同条件下测试其性能以及调试故障的问题。我们展示了概率编程语言如何通过指定编码有趣的输入类型的分布来帮助解决这些问题，然后对它们进行采样以生成专门的训练和测试数据。更一般地说，此类语言可用于编写环境模型，这是任何形式分析的基本先决条件。在本文中，我们重点关注自动驾驶汽车和机器人等系统，它们在任何时间点的环境都是一个“场景”，是物理对象和代理的配置。我们设计了一种特定于领域的语言 Scenic，用于描述场景分布及其代理随时间的行为。作为一种概率编程语言，Scenic 允许为场景的特征分配分布，以及以声明方式对场景施加硬约束和软约束。我们开发了专门的技术，利用 Scenic 的特定领域语法提供的结构，从结果分布中进行采样。最后，我们将 Scenic 应用于卷积神经网络的案例研究中，该网络旨在检测道路图像中的汽车，从而提高其性能，超越最先进的合成数据生成方法所实现的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Scenic的领域特定语言，用于描述场景分布及智能体行为，以生成用于训练和测试的合成数据，提升机器学习系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理自动驾驶等系统在罕见事件下的鲁棒性训练、多条件测试及故障调试问题，需通过场景分布建模生成针对性数据。
AI.method: 设计Scenic语言，支持对场景特征赋概率分布并声明约束条件，结合专用采样技术生成符合分布的场景数据，应用于卷积神经网络的训练优化。
AI.result: 在车辆检测任务中，Scenic生成的数据使目标检测模型性能超越现有合成数据方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: Scenic通过场景分布建模为复杂系统提供了高效的合成数据生成方案，可提升机器学习系统的可靠性与适应性。

search_text: Scenic: A Language for Scenario Specification and Data Generation Scenic：场景规范和数据生成的语言 We propose a new probabilistic programming language for the design and analysis of cyber-physical systems, especially those based on machine learning. Specifically, we consider the problems of training a system to be robust to rare events, testing its performance under different conditions, and debugging failures. We show how a probabilistic programming language can help address these problems by specifying distributions encoding interesting types of inputs, then sampling these to generate specialized training and test data. More generally, such languages can be used to write environment models, an essential prerequisite to any formal analysis. In this paper, we focus on systems like autonomous cars and robots, whose environment at any point in time is a 'scene', a configuration of physical objects and agents. We design a domain-specific language, Scenic, for describing scenarios that are distributions over scenes and the behaviors of their agents over time. As a probabilistic programming language, Scenic allows assigning distributions to features of the scene, as well as declaratively imposing hard and soft constraints over the scene. We develop specialized techniques for sampling from the resulting distribution, taking advantage of the structure provided by Scenic's domain-specific syntax. Finally, we apply Scenic in a case study on a convolutional neural network designed to detect cars in road images, improving its performance beyond that achieved by state-of-the-art synthetic data generation methods. 我们提出了一种新的概率编程语言，用于设计和分析网络物理系统，特别是基于机器学习的系统。具体来说，我们考虑训练系统对罕见事件具有鲁棒性、在不同条件下测试其性能以及调试故障的问题。我们展示了概率编程语言如何通过指定编码有趣的输入类型的分布来帮助解决这些问题，然后对它们进行采样以生成专门的训练和测试数据。更一般地说，此类语言可用于编写环境模型，这是任何形式分析的基本先决条件。在本文中，我们重点关注自动驾驶汽车和机器人等系统，它们在任何时间点的环境都是一个“场景”，是物理对象和代理的配置。我们设计了一种特定于领域的语言 Scenic，用于描述场景分布及其代理随时间的行为。作为一种概率编程语言，Scenic 允许为场景的特征分配分布，以及以声明方式对场景施加硬约束和软约束。我们开发了专门的技术，利用 Scenic 的特定领域语法提供的结构，从结果分布中进行采样。最后，我们将 Scenic 应用于卷积神经网络的案例研究中，该网络旨在检测道路图像中的汽车，从而提高其性能，超越最先进的合成数据生成方法所实现的性能。 本文提出一种名为Scenic的领域特定语言，用于描述场景分布及智能体行为，以生成用于训练和测试的合成数据，提升机器学习系统的鲁棒性。 Daniel J. Fremont,Edward Kim,Tommaso Dreossi,Shromona Ghosh,Xiangyu Yue,Alberto L. Sangiovanni-Vincentelli,Sanjit A. Seshia cs.PL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jack Hessel,Lillian Lee
title: Does my multimodal model learn cross-modal interactions? It's harder to tell than you might think!
title_zh: 我的多模态模型是否能够学习跨模态交互？这比你想象的更难说！
comment: ef:Published in EMNLP 2020
comments: ef:Published in EMNLP 2020
abstract: Modeling expressive cross-modal interactions seems crucial in multimodal tasks, such as visual question answering. However, sometimes high-performing black-box algorithms turn out to be mostly exploiting unimodal signals in the data. We propose a new diagnostic tool, empirical multimodally-additive function projection (EMAP), for isolating whether or not cross-modal interactions improve performance for a given model on a given task. This function projection modifies model predictions so that cross-modal interactions are eliminated, isolating the additive, unimodal structure. For seven image+text classification tasks (on each of which we set new state-of-the-art benchmarks), we find that, in many cases, removing cross-modal interactions results in little to no performance degradation. Surprisingly, this holds even when expressive models, with capacity to consider interactions, otherwise outperform less expressive models; thus, performance improvements, even when present, often cannot be attributed to consideration of cross-modal feature interactions. We hence recommend that researchers in multimodal machine learning report the performance not only of unimodal baselines, but also the EMAP of their best-performing model.
summary: Modeling expressive cross-modal interactions seems crucial in multimodal tasks, such as visual question answering. However, sometimes high-performing black-box algorithms turn out to be mostly exploiting unimodal signals in the data. We propose a new diagnostic tool, empirical multimodally-additive function projection (EMAP), for isolating whether or not cross-modal interactions improve performance for a given model on a given task. This function projection modifies model predictions so that cross-modal interactions are eliminated, isolating the additive, unimodal structure. For seven image+text classification tasks (on each of which we set new state-of-the-art benchmarks), we find that, in many cases, removing cross-modal interactions results in little to no performance degradation. Surprisingly, this holds even when expressive models, with capacity to consider interactions, otherwise outperform less expressive models; thus, performance improvements, even when present, often cannot be attributed to consideration of cross-modal feature interactions. We hence recommend that researchers in multimodal machine learning report the performance not only of unimodal baselines, but also the EMAP of their best-performing model.
abstract_zh: 在多模态任务（例如视觉问答）中，对表达性跨模态交互进行建模似乎至关重要。然而，有时高性能黑盒算法主要利用数据中的单峰信号。我们提出了一种新的诊断工具，经验多模态加性函数投影（EMAP），用于隔离跨模态交互是否可以提高给定模型在给定任务上的性能。该函数投影修改了模型预测，从而消除了跨模态相互作用，从而隔离了加法、单模态结构。对于七个图像+文本分类任务（我们为每个任务设置了新的最先进基准），我们发现在许多情况下，消除跨模式交互几乎不会导致性能下降。令人惊讶的是，即使具有考虑交互作用的表达模型在其他方面优于表达能力较差的模型，这一点仍然成立。因此，即使存在性能改进，通常也不能归因于考虑跨模式特征交互。因此，我们建议多模态机器学习的研究人员不仅报告单模态基线的性能，还报告其最佳性能模型的 EMAP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的诊断工具EMAP，用于检测多模态模型是否真正学习了跨模态交互。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态任务中跨模态交互的重要性被广泛认可，但高性能的黑盒算法有时主要依赖于单模态信号，因此需要一种方法来验证模型是否真正利用了跨模态交互。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为EMAP的诊断工具，通过修改模型预测以消除跨模态交互，从而隔离出单模态结构。
AI.result: 在七个图像+文本分类任务中发现，即使去除跨模态交互，模型性能几乎没有下降，这表明性能提升并不总是由跨模态交互引起。
AI.conclusion: 建议多模态机器学习研究者不仅报告单模态基线性能，还应报告其最佳模型的EMAP结果，以更全面地评估模型行为。

search_text: Does my multimodal model learn cross-modal interactions? It's harder to tell than you might think! 我的多模态模型是否能够学习跨模态交互？这比你想象的更难说！ Modeling expressive cross-modal interactions seems crucial in multimodal tasks, such as visual question answering. However, sometimes high-performing black-box algorithms turn out to be mostly exploiting unimodal signals in the data. We propose a new diagnostic tool, empirical multimodally-additive function projection (EMAP), for isolating whether or not cross-modal interactions improve performance for a given model on a given task. This function projection modifies model predictions so that cross-modal interactions are eliminated, isolating the additive, unimodal structure. For seven image+text classification tasks (on each of which we set new state-of-the-art benchmarks), we find that, in many cases, removing cross-modal interactions results in little to no performance degradation. Surprisingly, this holds even when expressive models, with capacity to consider interactions, otherwise outperform less expressive models; thus, performance improvements, even when present, often cannot be attributed to consideration of cross-modal feature interactions. We hence recommend that researchers in multimodal machine learning report the performance not only of unimodal baselines, but also the EMAP of their best-performing model. 在多模态任务（例如视觉问答）中，对表达性跨模态交互进行建模似乎至关重要。然而，有时高性能黑盒算法主要利用数据中的单峰信号。我们提出了一种新的诊断工具，经验多模态加性函数投影（EMAP），用于隔离跨模态交互是否可以提高给定模型在给定任务上的性能。该函数投影修改了模型预测，从而消除了跨模态相互作用，从而隔离了加法、单模态结构。对于七个图像+文本分类任务（我们为每个任务设置了新的最先进基准），我们发现在许多情况下，消除跨模式交互几乎不会导致性能下降。令人惊讶的是，即使具有考虑交互作用的表达模型在其他方面优于表达能力较差的模型，这一点仍然成立。因此，即使存在性能改进，通常也不能归因于考虑跨模式特征交互。因此，我们建议多模态机器学习的研究人员不仅报告单模态基线的性能，还报告其最佳性能模型的 EMAP。 本文提出了一种新的诊断工具EMAP，用于检测多模态模型是否真正学习了跨模态交互。 Jack Hessel,Lillian Lee cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Alexander S. Wein
title: Optimal Low-Degree Hardness of Maximum Independent Set
title_zh: 最大独立集的最优低度硬度
comment: 19 pages
comments: 19 pages
abstract: We study the algorithmic task of finding a large independent set in a sparse Erdős-Rényi random graph with $n$ vertices and average degree $d$. The maximum independent set is known to have size $(2 \log d / d)n$ in the double limit $n \to \infty$ followed by $d \to \infty$, but the best known polynomial-time algorithms can only find an independent set of half-optimal size $(\log d / d)n$. We show that the class of low-degree polynomial algorithms can find independent sets of half-optimal size but no larger, improving upon a result of Gamarnik, Jagannath, and the author. This generalizes earlier work by Rahman and Virág, which proved the analogous result for the weaker class of local algorithms.
summary: We study the algorithmic task of finding a large independent set in a sparse Erdős-Rényi random graph with $n$ vertices and average degree $d$. The maximum independent set is known to have size $(2 \log d / d)n$ in the double limit $n \to \infty$ followed by $d \to \infty$, but the best known polynomial-time algorithms can only find an independent set of half-optimal size $(\log d / d)n$. We show that the class of low-degree polynomial algorithms can find independent sets of half-optimal size but no larger, improving upon a result of Gamarnik, Jagannath, and the author. This generalizes earlier work by Rahman and Virág, which proved the analogous result for the weaker class of local algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在具有 $n$ 个顶点和平均度 $d$ 的稀疏 Erdős-Rényi 随机图中查找大型独立集的算法任务。已知最大独立集的大小为 $(2 \log d / d)n$ 在双重极限 $n \to \infty$ 中，后跟 $d \to \infty$，但最著名的多项式时间算法只能找到半最优大小 $(\log d / d)n$ 的独立集。我们表明，低次多项式算法可以找到半最佳大小但不能更大的独立集，从而改进了 Gamarnik、Jagannath 和作者的结果。这概括了 Rahman 和 Virág 的早期工作，证明了较弱的局部算法类的类似结果。

AI.tldr: 研究稀疏随机图中低度多项式算法寻找最大独立集的最优性问题。
AI.motivation: 填补已知多项式时间算法与理论最优解之间的差距，分析低度多项式算法的计算限制。
AI.method: 通过分析Erdős-Rényi随机图结构，结合概率方法与算法复杂性理论证明低度多项式算法的性能上限。
AI.result: 证明低度多项式算法无法超越半最优独立集规模，改进了现有结果并推广了局部算法的结论。
AI.conclusion: 低度多项式算法在最大独立集问题上存在固有性能限制，为随机图算法设计提供理论边界。

We show that the class of low-degree polynomial algorithms can find independent sets of half-optimal size but no larger, improving upon a result of Gamarnik, Jagannath, and the author. Wein cs.CC,cs.DS,math.PR,stat.ML

authors_text: Jayadev Acharya,Clément L. Canonne,Ziteng Sun,Himanshu Tyagi
title: Unified lower bounds for interactive high-dimensional estimation under information constraints
title_zh: 信息约束下交互式高维估计的统一下界
comment: Streamline some statements; add the low-privacy corollary (high value of the privacy parameter) for Corollary 1, along with the implications for the applications considered; add the upper bound for the low-privacy regimes for Bernoulli (Theorem 3) and Gaussian (Theorem 4); slightly improve Lemma 5 by relaxing the independence assumption
comments: Streamline some statements; add the low-privacy corollary (high value of the privacy parameter) for Corollary 1, along with the implications for the applications considered; add the upper bound for the low-privacy regimes for Bernoulli (Theorem 3) and Gaussian (Theorem 4); slightly improve Lemma 5 by relaxing the independence assumption
abstract: We consider distributed parameter estimation using interactive protocols subject to local information constraints such as bandwidth limitations, local differential privacy, and restricted measurements. We provide a unified framework enabling us to derive a variety of (tight) minimax lower bounds for different parametric families of distributions, both continuous and discrete, under any $\ell_p$ loss. Our lower bound framework is versatile and yields "plug-and-play" bounds that are widely applicable to a large range of estimation problems, and, for the prototypical case of the Gaussian family, circumvents limitations of previous techniques. In particular, our approach recovers bounds obtained using data processing inequalities and Cramér--Rao bounds, two other alternative approaches for proving lower bounds in our setting of interest. Further, for the families considered, we complement our lower bounds with matching upper bounds.
summary: We consider distributed parameter estimation using interactive protocols subject to local information constraints such as bandwidth limitations, local differential privacy, and restricted measurements. We provide a unified framework enabling us to derive a variety of (tight) minimax lower bounds for different parametric families of distributions, both continuous and discrete, under any $\ell_p$ loss. Our lower bound framework is versatile and yields "plug-and-play" bounds that are widely applicable to a large range of estimation problems, and, for the prototypical case of the Gaussian family, circumvents limitations of previous techniques. In particular, our approach recovers bounds obtained using data processing inequalities and Cramér--Rao bounds, two other alternative approaches for proving lower bounds in our setting of interest. Further, for the families considered, we complement our lower bounds with matching upper bounds.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用受本地信息约束（例如带宽限制、本地差分隐私和受限测量）的交互式协议进行分布式参数估计。我们提供了一个统一的框架，使我们能够在任何 $\ell_p$ 损失下为不同的参数分布族（连续的和离散的）导出各种（紧）极小极大下界。我们的下界框架是通用的，并产生“即插即用”界限，广泛适用于大范围的估计问题，并且对于高斯族的典型情况，规避了先前技术的局限性。特别是，我们的方法恢复了使用数据处理不等式和 Cramér-Rao 边界获得的边界，这是证明我们感兴趣的设置下限的另外两种替代方法。此外，对于所考虑的家庭，我们用匹配的上限来补充我们的下限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一框架，用于在信息约束下推导分布式参数估计的最小最大下界，适用于多种分布族和ℓ_p损失函数。
AI.motivation: 现有技术在处理高维估计问题时存在局限性，尤其在面对不同分布族和信息约束时缺乏通用性，需建立更灵活的理论工具。
AI.method: 通过结合数据处理不等式与Cramér-Rao界，构建适用于连续/离散分布及各类ℓ_p损失的统一下界分析框架，并验证其普适性。
AI.result: 为多种参数分布族（包括高斯分布）建立了紧致的最小最大下界，克服了传统方法限制，并补充了匹配的上界证明。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为交互式高维估计问题提供了通用分析工具，理论结果具有广泛适用性，为后续研究奠定了基础。

authors_text: Eduardo Godinho Ribeiro,Raul de Queiroz Mendes,Valdir Grassi Jr
title: Real-Time Deep Learning Approach to Visual Servo Control and Grasp Detection for Autonomous Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 用于自主机器人操作的视觉伺服控制和抓取检测的实时深度学习方法
comment: 27 pages, 24 figures. Preprint published in the Elsevier's Robotics and Autonomous Systems journal on February 24, 2021
comments: 27 pages, 24 figures. Preprint published in the Elsevier's Robotics and Autonomous Systems journal on February 24, 2021
abstract: In order to explore robotic grasping in unstructured and dynamic environments, this work addresses the visual perception phase involved in the task. This phase involves the processing of visual data to obtain the location of the object to be grasped, its pose and the points at which the robot`s grippers must make contact to ensure a stable grasp. For this, the Cornell Grasping dataset is used to train a convolutional neural network that, having an image of the robot`s workspace, with a certain object, is able to predict a grasp rectangle that symbolizes the position, orientation and opening of the robot`s grippers before its closing. In addition to this network, which runs in real-time, another one is designed to deal with situations in which the object moves in the environment. Therefore, the second network is trained to perform a visual servo control, ensuring that the object remains in the robot`s field of view. This network predicts the proportional values of the linear and angular velocities that the camera must have so that the object is always in the image processed by the grasp network. The dataset used for training was automatically generated by a Kinova Gen3 manipulator. The robot is also used to evaluate the applicability in real-time and obtain practical results from the designed algorithms. Moreover, the offline results obtained through validation sets are also analyzed and discussed regarding their efficiency and processing speed. The developed controller was able to achieve a millimeter accuracy in the final position considering a target object seen for the first time. To the best of our knowledge, we have not found in the literature other works that achieve such precision with a controller learned from scratch. Thus, this work presents a new system for autonomous robotic manipulation with high processing speed and the ability to generalize to several different objects.

In addition to this network, which runs in real-time, another one is designed to deal with situations in which the object moves in the environment. The dataset used for training was automatically generated by a Kinova Gen3 manipulator. The robot is also used to evaluate the applicability in real-time and obtain practical results from the designed algorithms. The developed controller was able to achieve a millimeter accuracy in the final position considering a target object seen for the first time. abstract_zh: 为了探索非结构化和动态环境中的机器人抓取，这项工作解决了任务中涉及的视觉感知阶段。此阶段涉及处理视觉数据，以获得要抓取的物体的位置、其姿态以及机器人的抓手必须接触的点以确保稳定的抓取。为此，康奈尔抓取数据集用于训练卷积神经网络，该网络具有机器人工作空间和特定物体的图像，能够预测抓取矩形，该矩形代表机器人抓取器在关闭之前的位置、方向和打开状态。除了这个实时运行的网络之外，另一个网络被设计用来处理物体在环境中移动的情况。因此，第二个网络被训练来执行视觉伺服控制，确保物体保留在机器人的视野中。该网络预测相机必须具有的线速度和角速度的比例值，以便物体始终位于抓取网络处理的图像中。用于训练的数据集由 Kinova Gen3 操纵器自动生成。该机器人还用于实时评估其适用性，并从设计的算法中获得实际结果。此外，还对通过验证集获得的离线结果的效率和处理速度进行了分析和讨论。考虑到第一次看到的目标物体，所开发的控制器能够在最终位置达到毫米级精度。据我们所知，我们在文献中尚未发现其他作品可以通过从头开始学习的控制器来实现如此精确的精度。因此，这项工作提出了一种新的自主机器人操纵系统，具有高处理速度和泛化到多个不同对象的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于实时深度学习的视觉伺服控制与抓取检测系统，用于自主机械臂在非结构化动态环境中的操作。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态环境中难以实现高精度实时抓取，需开发兼具高速处理能力与泛化性的自主机械臂控制方案。
AI.method: 采用两个卷积神经网络：1）基于Cornell数据集训练抓取检测网络，预测机械臂夹爪位置与姿态；2）设计视觉伺服控制网络，通过预测相机运动参数保持目标物在视野内。使用Kinova Gen3机械臂生成数据并验证。
AI.result: 系统实现毫米级定位精度，首次接触目标物时仍保持高精度，且处理速度满足实时性要求，文献中未见同类成果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新系统在实时性、精度及跨物体泛化能力上达到领先水平，为自主机械臂操作提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Sasan Tavakkol,Feng Han,Brandon Mayer,Mark Phillips,Cyrus Shahabi,Yao-Yi Chiang,Raimondas Kiveris
title: Kartta Labs: Collaborative Time Travel
title_zh: Kartta Labs：协作时间旅行
abstract: We introduce the modular and scalable design of Kartta Labs, an open source, open data, and scalable system for virtually reconstructing cities from historical maps and photos. Kartta Labs relies on crowdsourcing and artificial intelligence consisting of two major modules: Maps and 3D models. Each module, in turn, consists of sub-modules that enable the system to reconstruct a city from historical maps and photos. The result is a spatiotemporal reference that can be used to integrate various collected data (curated, sensed, or crowdsourced) for research, education, and entertainment purposes. The system empowers the users to experience collaborative time travel such that they work together to reconstruct the past and experience it on an open source and open data platform.
summary: We introduce the modular and scalable design of Kartta Labs, an open source, open data, and scalable system for virtually reconstructing cities from historical maps and photos. Kartta Labs relies on crowdsourcing and artificial intelligence consisting of two major modules: Maps and 3D models. Each module, in turn, consists of sub-modules that enable the system to reconstruct a city from historical maps and photos. The result is a spatiotemporal reference that can be used to integrate various collected data (curated, sensed, or crowdsourced) for research, education, and entertainment purposes. The system empowers the users to experience collaborative time travel such that they work together to reconstruct the past and experience it on an open source and open data platform.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了 Kartta Labs 的模块化和可扩展设计，这是一个开源、开放数据和可扩展的系统，用于根据历史地图和照片虚拟重建城市。 Kartta Labs 依赖于众包和人工智能，由两个主要模块组成：地图和 3D 模型。每个模块又由子模块组成，这些子模块使系统能够根据历史地图和照片重建城市。其结果是一个时空参考，可用于集成各种收集的数据（策划的、感测的或众包的）以用于研究、教育和娱乐目的。该系统使用户能够体验协作时间旅行，以便他们共同重建过去并在开源和开放数据平台上体验它。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Kartta Labs系统，该系统通过历史地图和照片模块化重建城市，支持协作式时间旅行体验。
AI.motivation: 现有历史重建工具缺乏模块化设计和数据整合能力，难以满足研究、教育等多场景需求。
AI.method: 采用众包与人工智能结合的双模块架构（地图与3D模型），通过子模块协同处理历史数据重建城市。
AI.result: 构建了时空参考系统，可集成多源数据并实现开放平台上的协作历史重建与体验。
AI.conclusion: Kartta Labs通过开源开放设计，有效推动了跨领域的历史研究与教育应用，实现了协作式时间旅行目标。

authors_text: Julius von Kügelgen,Amir-Hossein Karimi,Umang Bhatt,Isabel Valera,Adrian Weller,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: On the Fairness of Causal Algorithmic Recourse
title_zh: 论因果算法追索的公平性
comment: AAAI 2022 extended camera-ready version with technical appendices. (9 pages main paper + references + appendices)
comments: AAAI 2022 extended camera-ready version with technical appendices. (9 pages main paper + references + appendices)
abstract: Algorithmic fairness is typically studied from the perspective of predictions. Instead, here we investigate fairness from the perspective of recourse actions suggested to individuals to remedy an unfavourable classification. We propose two new fairness criteria at the group and individual level, which -- unlike prior work on equalising the average group-wise distance from the decision boundary -- explicitly account for causal relationships between features, thereby capturing downstream effects of recourse actions performed in the physical world. We explore how our criteria relate to others, such as counterfactual fairness, and show that fairness of recourse is complementary to fairness of prediction. We study theoretically and empirically how to enforce fair causal recourse by altering the classifier and perform a case study on the Adult dataset. Finally, we discuss whether fairness violations in the data generating process revealed by our criteria may be better addressed by societal interventions as opposed to constraints on the classifier.
summary: Algorithmic fairness is typically studied from the perspective of predictions. Instead, here we investigate fairness from the perspective of recourse actions suggested to individuals to remedy an unfavourable classification. We propose two new fairness criteria at the group and individual level, which -- unlike prior work on equalising the average group-wise distance from the decision boundary -- explicitly account for causal relationships between features, thereby capturing downstream effects of recourse actions performed in the physical world. We explore how our criteria relate to others, such as counterfactual fairness, and show that fairness of recourse is complementary to fairness of prediction. We study theoretically and empirically how to enforce fair causal recourse by altering the classifier and perform a case study on the Adult dataset. Finally, we discuss whether fairness violations in the data generating process revealed by our criteria may be better addressed by societal interventions as opposed to constraints on the classifier.
abstract_zh: 算法公平性通常是从预测的角度来研究的。相反，在这里我们从向个人建议补救不利分类的追索行动的角度来调查公平性。我们在群体和个人层面提出了两个新的公平标准，与之前关于均衡与决策边界的平均群体距离的工作不同，它们明确地考虑了特征之间的因果关系，从而捕获了在物理世界中执行的追索行为的下游影响。我们探讨了我们的标准如何与其他标准相关，例如反事实公平性，并表明追索的公平性与预测的公平性是互补的。我们从理论上和经验上研究了如何通过改变分类器来实施公平的因果追索，并对成人数据集进行案例研究。最后，我们讨论我们的标准所揭示的数据生成过程中的公平违规是否可以通过社会干预而不是对分类器的限制更好地解决。

AI.tldr: 本文从因果关系角度提出新的公平性标准，研究算法推荐的补救措施对分类结果的公平性影响。
AI.motivation: 现有算法公平性研究多关注预测结果，而忽视了补救措施可能引发的现实世界因果效应及群体间差异。
AI.method: 提出群体与个体层面的公平性准则，结合因果图模型分析补救行动的下游影响，并通过修改分类器实现公平性约束。
AI.result: 理论证明补救公平性与预测公平性互补，实验证明在Adult数据集上调整分类器可有效提升补救措施的公平性。
AI.conclusion: 数据生成过程中的公平性问题需结合社会干预而非仅依赖算法约束来解决。

authors_text: Perry R. Cook
title: Principles for Designing Computer Music Controllers
title_zh: 计算机音乐控制器设计原则
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: This paper will present observations on the design, artistic, and human factors of creating digital music controllers. Specific projects will be presented, and a set of design principles will be supported from those examples.
summary: This paper will present observations on the design, artistic, and human factors of creating digital music controllers. Specific projects will be presented, and a set of design principles will be supported from those examples.
abstract_zh: 本文将提出对创建数字音乐控制器的设计、艺术和人为因素的观察。将介绍具体的项目，并从这些示例中支持一套设计原则。

AI.tldr: 本文通过具体项目案例，探讨数字音乐控制器的设计、艺术与人机交互因素，并提出一套设计原则。
AI.motivation: 现有数字音乐控制器缺乏系统性设计原则，难以兼顾艺术表达与用户体验，需通过研究建立可指导实践的设计框架。
AI.method: 基于实际项目案例分析，结合艺术创作需求与人机交互理论，提炼出通用设计原则。
AI.result: 总结出一套涵盖功能性、艺术性及用户适应性的数字音乐控制器设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 设计原则为数字音乐控制器开发提供了理论支持，有助于平衡技术创新与艺术表达需求。
