search_text: Face Mask Assistant: Detection of Face Mask Service Stage Based on Mobile Phone 口罩助手：基于手机检测口罩使用阶段 Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) has spread all over the world since it broke out massively in December 2019, which has caused a large loss to the whole world. Both the confirmed cases and death cases have reached a relatively frightening number. Syndrome coronaviruses 2 (SARS-CoV-2), the cause of COVID-19, can be transmitted by small respiratory droplets. To curb its spread at the source, wearing masks is a convenient and effective measure. In most cases, people use face masks in a high-frequent but short-time way. Aimed at solving the problem that we don't know which service stage of the mask belongs to, we propose a detection system based on the mobile phone. We first extract four features from the GLCMs of the face mask's micro-photos. Next, a three-result detection system is accomplished by using KNN algorithm. The results of validation experiments show that our system can reach a precision of 82.87% (standard deviation=8.5%) on the testing dataset. In future work, we plan to expand the detection objects to more mask types. This work demonstrates that the proposed mobile microscope system can be used as an assistant for face mask being used, which may play a positive role in fighting against COVID-19. 2019冠状病毒病（COVID-19）自2019年12月大规模爆发以来，已在全球蔓延，给全世界造成了巨大损失。无论是确诊病例还是死亡病例，都达到了一个比较可怕的数字。综合症冠状病毒 2 (SARS-CoV-2) 是导致 COVID-19 的原因，可通过细小的呼吸道飞沫传播。从源头遏制疫情蔓延，佩戴口罩是便捷有效的措施。在大多数情况下，人们使用口罩的频率较高，但时间较短。针对我们不知道口罩属于哪个使用阶段的问题，我们提出了一种基于手机的检测系统。我们首先从口罩微照片的 GLCM 中提取四个特征。接下来，利用KNN算法完成了三结果检测系统。验证实验结果表明，我们的系统在测试数据集上可以达到82.87%（标准差=8.5%）的精度。在未来的工作中，我们计划将检测对象扩展到更多掩模类型。这项工作表明，所提出的移动显微镜系统可以作为使用口罩的助手，这可能在对抗COVID-19方面发挥积极作用。 本文提出了一种基于手机的系统，用于检测口罩的使用阶段，以帮助用户判断口罩是否需要更换。 Yuzhen Chen,Menghan Hu,Chunjun Hua,Guangtao Zhai,Jian Zhang,Qingli Li,Simon X. Yang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Saman Motamed,Patrik Rogalla,Farzad Khalvati
title: RANDGAN: Randomized Generative Adversarial Network for Detection of COVID-19 in Chest X-ray
title_zh: RANDGAN：用于检测胸部 X 光中的 COVID-19 的随机生成对抗网络
abstract: COVID-19 spread across the globe at an immense rate has left healthcare systems incapacitated to diagnose and test patients at the needed rate. Studies have shown promising results for detection of COVID-19 from viral bacterial pneumonia in chest X-rays. Automation of COVID-19 testing using medical images can speed up the testing process of patients where health care systems lack sufficient numbers of the reverse-transcription polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR) tests. Supervised deep learning models such as convolutional neural networks (CNN) need enough labeled data for all classes to correctly learn the task of detection. Gathering labeled data is a cumbersome task and requires time and resources which could further strain health care systems and radiologists at the early stages of a pandemic such as COVID-19. In this study, we propose a randomized generative adversarial network (RANDGAN) that detects images of an unknown class (COVID-19) from known and labelled classes (Normal and Viral Pneumonia) without the need for labels and training data from the unknown class of images (COVID-19). We used the largest publicly available COVID-19 chest X-ray dataset, COVIDx, which is comprised of Normal, Pneumonia, and COVID-19 images from multiple public databases. In this work, we use transfer learning to segment the lungs in the COVIDx dataset. Next, we show why segmentation of the region of interest (lungs) is vital to correctly learn the task of classification, specifically in datasets that contain images from different resources as it is the case for the COVIDx dataset. Finally, we show improved results in detection of COVID-19 cases using our generative model (RANDGAN) compared to conventional generative adversarial networks (GANs) for anomaly detection in medical images, improving the area under the ROC curve from 0.71 to 0.77.

Studies have shown promising results for detection of COVID-19 from viral bacterial pneumonia in chest X-rays. Automation of COVID-19 testing using medical images can speed up the testing process of patients where health care systems lack sufficient numbers of the reverse-transcription polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR) tests. Supervised deep learning models such as convolutional neural networks (CNN) need enough labeled data for all classes to correctly learn the task of detection. Gathering labeled data is a cumbersome task and requires time and resources which could further strain health care systems and radiologists at the early stages of a pandemic such as COVID-19. In this study, we propose a randomized generative adversarial network (RANDGAN) that detects images of an unknown class (COVID-19) from known and labelled classes (Normal and Viral Pneumonia) without the need for labels and training data from the unknown class of images (COVID-19). We used the largest publicly available COVID-19 chest X-ray dataset, COVIDx, which is comprised of Normal, Pneumonia, and COVID-19 images from multiple public databases. In this work, we use transfer learning to segment the lungs in the COVIDx dataset. Next, we show why segmentation of the region of interest (lungs) is vital to correctly learn the task of classification, specifically in datasets that contain images from different resources as it is the case for the COVIDx dataset. Finally, we show improved results in detection of COVID-19 cases using our generative model (RANDGAN) compared to conventional generative adversarial networks (GANs) for anomaly detection in medical images, improving the area under the ROC curve from 0.71 to 0.77.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 在全球范围内以惊人的速度传播，导致医疗保健系统无法以所需的速度诊断和检测患者。研究表明，通过胸部 X 光检查从病毒性细菌性肺炎中检测出 COVID-19 具有良好的结果。使用医学图像进行 COVID-19 自动化检测可以加快医疗保健系统缺乏足够数量的逆转录聚合酶链反应 (RT-PCR) 检测的患者的检测过程。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 等监督深度学习模型需要所有类别都有足够的标记数据才能正确学习检测任务。收集标记数据是一项繁琐的任务，需要时间和资源，这可能会在 COVID-19 等大流行的早期阶段进一步给医疗保健系统和放射科医生带来压力。在本研究中，我们提出了一种随机生成对抗网络（RANDGAN），可以从已知和标记的类别（正常和病毒性肺炎）中检测未知类别（COVID-19）的图像，而不需要来自未知类别图像（COVID-19）的标签和训练数据。我们使用了最大的公开可用的 COVID-19 胸部 X 射线数据集 COVIDx，该数据集由来自多个公共数据库的正常图像、肺炎图像和 COVID-19 图像组成。在这项工作中，我们使用迁移学习来分割 COVIDx 数据集中的肺部。接下来，我们将展示为什么感兴趣区域（肺部）的分割对于正确学习分类任务至关重要，特别是在包含来自不同资源的图像的数据集中，就像 COVIDx 数据集的情况一样。最后，与用于医学图像异常检测的传统生成对抗网络 (GAN) 相比，我们展示了使用我们的生成模型 (RANDGAN) 检测 COVID-19 病例的改进结果，将 ROC 曲线下面积从 0.71 提高到 0.77。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需COVID-19标签数据即可检测胸部X光片中COVID-19的随机生成对抗网络（RANDGAN）。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致医疗系统超负荷，传统深度学习模型依赖大量标注数据而难以快速部署，且获取标注数据耗时耗力。
AI.method: 基于迁移学习对COVIDx数据集进行肺部分割，通过RANDGAN在无未知类（COVID-19）标签情况下实现异常检测。
AI.result: RANDGAN将ROC曲线下面积从0.71提升至0.77，优于传统GAN在医学图像异常检测中的表现。
AI.conclusion: RANDGAN有效解决了无标注数据的COVID-19检测难题，肺部区域分割对跨数据源分类任务至关重要。

authors_text: Chang Li,Hideyoshi Yanagisawa
title: Intrinsic motivation in virtual assistant interaction for fostering spontaneous interactions
title_zh: 虚拟助理交互中促进自发交互的内在动机
abstract: With the growing utility of today's conversational virtual assistants, the importance of user motivation in human-AI interaction is becoming more obvious. However, previous studies in this and related fields, such as human-computer interaction and human-robot interaction, scarcely discussed intrinsic motivation and its affecting factors. Those studies either treated motivation as an inseparable concept or focused on non-intrinsic motivation. The current study aims to cover intrinsic motivation by taking an affective-engineering approach. A novel motivation model is proposed, in which intrinsic motivation is affected by two factors that derive from user interactions with virtual assistants: expectation of capability and uncertainty. Experiments are conducted where these two factors are manipulated by making participants believe they are interacting with the smart speaker "Amazon Echo". Intrinsic motivation is measured both by using questionnaires and by covertly monitoring a five-minute free-choice period in the experimenter's absence, during which the participants could decide for themselves whether to interact with the virtual assistants. Results of the first experiment showed that high expectation engenders more intrinsically motivated interaction compared with low expectation. The results also suggested suppressive effects by uncertainty on intrinsic motivation, though we had not hypothesized before experiments. We then revised our hypothetical model of action selection accordingly and conducted a verification experiment of uncertainty's effects. Results of the verification experiment showed that reducing uncertainty encourages more interactions and causes the motivation behind these interactions to shift from non-intrinsic to intrinsic.
summary: With the growing utility of today's conversational virtual assistants, the importance of user motivation in human-AI interaction is becoming more obvious. However, previous studies in this and related fields, such as human-computer interaction and human-robot interaction, scarcely discussed intrinsic motivation and its affecting factors. Those studies either treated motivation as an inseparable concept or focused on non-intrinsic motivation. The current study aims to cover intrinsic motivation by taking an affective-engineering approach. A novel motivation model is proposed, in which intrinsic motivation is affected by two factors that derive from user interactions with virtual assistants: expectation of capability and uncertainty. Experiments are conducted where these two factors are manipulated by making participants believe they are interacting with the smart speaker "Amazon Echo". Intrinsic motivation is measured both by using questionnaires and by covertly monitoring a five-minute free-choice period in the experimenter's absence, during which the participants could decide for themselves whether to interact with the virtual assistants. Results of the first experiment showed that high expectation engenders more intrinsically motivated interaction compared with low expectation. The results also suggested suppressive effects by uncertainty on intrinsic motivation, though we had not hypothesized before experiments. We then revised our hypothetical model of action selection accordingly and conducted a verification experiment of uncertainty's effects. Results of the verification experiment showed that reducing uncertainty encourages more interactions and causes the motivation behind these interactions to shift from non-intrinsic to intrinsic.
abstract_zh: 随着当今会话虚拟助理的实用性不断增长，用户动机在人机交互中的重要性变得越来越明显。然而，以往在该领域以及人机交互、人机交互等相关领域的研究很少讨论内在动机及其影响因素。这些研究要么将动机视为一个不可分割的概念，要么侧重于非内在动机。当前的研究旨在通过采取情感工程方法来涵盖内在动机。提出了一种新颖的动机模型，其中内在动机受到用户与虚拟助理交互中产生的两个因素的影响：能力期望和不确定性。在实验中，通过让参与者相信他们正在与智能扬声器“Amazon Echo”进行交互来操纵这两个因素。内在动机是通过使用问卷和在实验者缺席的情况下秘密监控五分钟的自由选择期来测量的，在此期间参与者可以自己决定是否与虚拟助手互动。第一个实验的结果表明，与低期望相比，高期望会产生更多内在动机的互动。结果还表明不确定性对内在动机产生抑制作用，尽管我们在实验前没有做出假设。然后我们相应地修改了假设的行动选择模型，并进行了不确定性影响的验证实验。验证实验的结果表明，减少不确定性会鼓励更多的互动，并使这些互动背后的动机从非内在转向内在。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究虚拟助手交互中内在动机的形成机制，提出基于能力预期和不确定性的动机模型，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对人机交互中的内在动机关注不足，且未明确其影响因素。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过情感工程方法探索虚拟助手交互中内在动机的驱动因素。
AI.method: 采用实验法，让参与者与Amazon Echo互动，通过操控能力预期和不确定性两个变量，结合问卷和自由选择期的隐性观察测量内在动机。
AI.result: 高能力预期显著提升内在动机，不确定性具有抑制作用；验证实验表明降低不确定性可促进互动并促使动机从外在转向内在。
AI.conclusion: 提出的能力预期-不确定性双因素模型有效解释了虚拟助手交互中的内在动机机制，为提升人机交互体验提供了理论依据。

search_text: Intrinsic motivation in virtual assistant interaction for fostering spontaneous interactions 虚拟助理交互中促进自发交互的内在动机 With the growing utility of today's conversational virtual assistants, the importance of user motivation in human-AI interaction is becoming more obvious. However, previous studies in this and related fields, such as human-computer interaction and human-robot interaction, scarcely discussed intrinsic motivation and its affecting factors. Those studies either treated motivation as an inseparable concept or focused on non-intrinsic motivation. The current study aims to cover intrinsic motivation by taking an affective-engineering approach. A novel motivation model is proposed, in which intrinsic motivation is affected by two factors that derive from user interactions with virtual assistants: expectation of capability and uncertainty. Experiments are conducted where these two factors are manipulated by making participants believe they are interacting with the smart speaker "Amazon Echo". Intrinsic motivation is measured both by using questionnaires and by covertly monitoring a five-minute free-choice period in the experimenter's absence, during which the participants could decide for themselves whether to interact with the virtual assistants. Results of the first experiment showed that high expectation engenders more intrinsically motivated interaction compared with low expectation. The results also suggested suppressive effects by uncertainty on intrinsic motivation, though we had not hypothesized before experiments. We then revised our hypothetical model of action selection accordingly and conducted a verification experiment of uncertainty's effects. Results of the verification experiment showed that reducing uncertainty encourages more interactions and causes the motivation behind these interactions to shift from non-intrinsic to intrinsic. 随着当今会话虚拟助理的实用性不断增长，用户动机在人机交互中的重要性变得越来越明显。然而，以往在该领域以及人机交互、人机交互等相关领域的研究很少讨论内在动机及其影响因素。这些研究要么将动机视为一个不可分割的概念，要么侧重于非内在动机。当前的研究旨在通过采取情感工程方法来涵盖内在动机。提出了一种新颖的动机模型，其中内在动机受到用户与虚拟助理交互中产生的两个因素的影响：能力期望和不确定性。在实验中，通过让参与者相信他们正在与智能扬声器“Amazon Echo”进行交互来操纵这两个因素。内在动机是通过使用问卷和在实验者缺席的情况下秘密监控五分钟的自由选择期来测量的，在此期间参与者可以自己决定是否与虚拟助手互动。第一个实验的结果表明，与低期望相比，高期望会产生更多内在动机的互动。结果还表明不确定性对内在动机产生抑制作用，尽管我们在实验前没有做出假设。然后我们相应地修改了假设的行动选择模型，并进行了不确定性影响的验证实验。验证实验的结果表明，减少不确定性会鼓励更多的互动，并使这些互动背后的动机从非内在转向内在。 该论文研究虚拟助手交互中内在动机的形成机制，提出基于能力预期和不确定性的动机模型，并通过实验验证其有效性。 Chang Li,Hideyoshi Yanagisawa cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Giulia Orrù,Marco Micheletto,Fabio Terranova,Gian Luca Marcialis
title: Electroencephalography signal processing based on textural features for monitoring the driver's state by a Brain-Computer Interface
title_zh: 基于纹理特征的脑电信号处理通过脑机接口监测驾驶员状态
comment: Accepted for the 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2020)
comments: Accepted for the 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2020)
abstract: In this study we investigate a textural processing method of electroencephalography (EEG) signal as an indicator to estimate the driver's vigilance in a hypothetical Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) system. The novelty of the solution proposed relies on employing the one-dimensional Local Binary Pattern (1D-LBP) algorithm for feature extraction from pre-processed EEG data. From the resulting feature vector, the classification is done according to three vigilance classes: awake, tired and drowsy. The claim is that the class transitions can be detected by describing the variations of the micro-patterns' occurrences along the EEG signal. The 1D-LBP is able to describe them by detecting mutual variations of the signal temporarily "close" as a short bit-code. Our analysis allows to conclude that the 1D-LBP adoption has led to significant performance improvement. Moreover, capturing the class transitions from the EEG signal is effective, although the overall performance is not yet good enough to develop a BCI for assessing the driver's vigilance in real environments.
summary: In this study we investigate a textural processing method of electroencephalography (EEG) signal as an indicator to estimate the driver's vigilance in a hypothetical Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) system. The novelty of the solution proposed relies on employing the one-dimensional Local Binary Pattern (1D-LBP) algorithm for feature extraction from pre-processed EEG data. From the resulting feature vector, the classification is done according to three vigilance classes: awake, tired and drowsy. The claim is that the class transitions can be detected by describing the variations of the micro-patterns' occurrences along the EEG signal. The 1D-LBP is able to describe them by detecting mutual variations of the signal temporarily "close" as a short bit-code. Our analysis allows to conclude that the 1D-LBP adoption has led to significant performance improvement. Moreover, capturing the class transitions from the EEG signal is effective, although the overall performance is not yet good enough to develop a BCI for assessing the driver's vigilance in real environments.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们研究了一种脑电图（EEG）信号的纹理处理方法，作为在假设的脑机接口（BCI）系统中估计驾驶员警惕性的指标。所提出的解决方案的新颖性依赖于采用一维局部二值模式（1D-LBP）算法从预处理的脑电图数据中提取特征。根据生成的特征向量，根据三个警戒类别进行分类：清醒、疲倦和困倦。据称，可以通过描述微图案沿脑电图信号出现的变化来检测类别转换。 1D-LBP 能够通过检测作为短位码暂时“关闭”的信号的相互变化来描述它们。我们的分析可以得出这样的结论：1D-LBP 的采用带来了显着的性能提升。此外，从脑电图信号中捕获类别转换是有效的，尽管整体性能还不足以开发用于评估驾驶员在真实环境中的警惕性的脑机接口。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于纹理特征的脑电图（EEG）信号处理方法，用于通过脑机接口（BCI）监测驾驶员的警觉状态。
AI.motivation: 开发可靠的BCI系统以实时监测驾驶员疲劳状态，从而提升道路安全性和减少事故风险。
AI.method: 采用一维局部二值模式（1D-LBP）算法提取预处理EEG信号的纹理特征，并通过分类器将驾驶员状态分为清醒、疲劳和嗜睡三类。
AI.result: 1D-LBP方法显著提升了特征描述能力，但整体分类性能尚未达到实际环境中BCI应用的要求。
AI.conclusion: 1D-LBP在捕捉EEG信号微模式变化方面有效，但需进一步优化以提高BCI系统在真实场景下的可靠性。

authors_text: Emmanouil Panagiotou,Eleni Charou
title: Procedural 3D Terrain Generation using Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络的程序 3D 地形生成
comment: 9pages presented in Games and AI workshop (https://games-and-ai.scify.org/) of SETN2020 conference
comments: 9pages presented in Games and AI workshop (https://games-and-ai.scify.org/) of SETN2020 conference
abstract: Procedural 3D Terrain generation has become a necessity in open world games, as it can provide unlimited content, through a functionally infinite number of different areas, for players to explore. In our approach, we use Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) to yield realistic 3D environments based on the distribution of remotely sensed images of landscapes, captured by satellites or drones. Our task consists of synthesizing a random but plausible RGB satellite image and generating a corresponding Height Map in the form of a 3D point cloud that will serve as an appropriate mesh of the landscape. For the first step, we utilize a GAN trained with satellite images that manages to learn the distribution of the dataset, creating novel satellite images. For the second part, we need a one-to-one mapping from RGB images to Digital Elevation Models (DEM). We deploy a Conditional Generative Adversarial network (CGAN), which is the state-of-the-art approach to image-to-image translation, to generate a plausible height map for every randomly generated image of the first model. Combining the generated DEM and RGB image, we are able to construct 3D scenery consisting of a plausible height distribution and colorization, in relation to the remotely sensed landscapes provided during training.
summary: Procedural 3D Terrain generation has become a necessity in open world games, as it can provide unlimited content, through a functionally infinite number of different areas, for players to explore. In our approach, we use Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) to yield realistic 3D environments based on the distribution of remotely sensed images of landscapes, captured by satellites or drones. Our task consists of synthesizing a random but plausible RGB satellite image and generating a corresponding Height Map in the form of a 3D point cloud that will serve as an appropriate mesh of the landscape. For the first step, we utilize a GAN trained with satellite images that manages to learn the distribution of the dataset, creating novel satellite images. For the second part, we need a one-to-one mapping from RGB images to Digital Elevation Models (DEM). We deploy a Conditional Generative Adversarial network (CGAN), which is the state-of-the-art approach to image-to-image translation, to generate a plausible height map for every randomly generated image of the first model. Combining the generated DEM and RGB image, we are able to construct 3D scenery consisting of a plausible height distribution and colorization, in relation to the remotely sensed landscapes provided during training.
abstract_zh: 程序化 3D 地形生成已成为开放世界游戏的必需品，因为它可以通过功能上无限的不同区域提供无限的内容供玩家探索。在我们的方法中，我们使用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 根据卫星或无人机捕获的遥感景观图像的分布来生成逼真的 3D 环境。我们的任务包括合成随机但合理的 RGB 卫星图像，并以 3D 点云的形式生成相应的高度图，该高度图将用作适当的景观网格。第一步，我们利用经过卫星图像训练的 GAN，它能够学习数据集的分布，从而创建新颖的卫星图像。对于第二部分，我们需要从 RGB 图像到数字高程模型 (DEM) 的一对一映射。我们部署了条件生成对抗网络（CGAN），这是最先进的图像到图像转换方法，为第一个模型的每个随机生成的图像生成合理的高度图。结合生成的 DEM 和 RGB 图像，我们能够构建由合理的高度分布和色彩组成的 3D 场景，与训练期间提供的遥感景观相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的程序化3D地形生成方法，通过卫星或无人机获取的遥感图像生成逼真的RGB卫星图像和对应的数字高程模型（DEM），进而构建3D地形。
AI.motivation: 开放世界游戏需要无限的地形内容以供玩家探索，传统方法难以满足需求。本文旨在利用GAN技术实现高效、无限的3D地形生成，提升游戏场景的真实感和多样性。
AI.method: 分两步实现：首先使用GAN学习卫星图像分布生成随机RGB图像；其次采用条件GAN（CGAN）将RGB图像转化为数字高程模型（DEM），最终结合两者生成包含合理高度分布和色彩的3D地形。
AI.result: 成功生成了与训练数据中遥感景观相符的3D地形，实现了从随机图像到高度图的合理映射，构建出具有真实感的地形模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过GAN与CGAN的结合，有效解决了程序化3D地形生成问题，为开放世界游戏提供了高效的内容生成方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Procedural 3D Terrain Generation using Generative Adversarial Networks 使用生成对抗网络的程序 3D 地形生成 Procedural 3D Terrain generation has become a necessity in open world games, as it can provide unlimited content, through a functionally infinite number of different areas, for players to explore. In our approach, we use Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) to yield realistic 3D environments based on the distribution of remotely sensed images of landscapes, captured by satellites or drones. Our task consists of synthesizing a random but plausible RGB satellite image and generating a corresponding Height Map in the form of a 3D point cloud that will serve as an appropriate mesh of the landscape. For the first step, we utilize a GAN trained with satellite images that manages to learn the distribution of the dataset, creating novel satellite images. For the second part, we need a one-to-one mapping from RGB images to Digital Elevation Models (DEM). We deploy a Conditional Generative Adversarial network (CGAN), which is the state-of-the-art approach to image-to-image translation, to generate a plausible height map for every randomly generated image of the first model. Combining the generated DEM and RGB image, we are able to construct 3D scenery consisting of a plausible height distribution and colorization, in relation to the remotely sensed landscapes provided during training. 程序化 3D 地形生成已成为开放世界游戏的必需品，因为它可以通过功能上无限的不同区域提供无限的内容供玩家探索。在我们的方法中，我们使用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 根据卫星或无人机捕获的遥感景观图像的分布来生成逼真的 3D 环境。我们的任务包括合成随机但合理的 RGB 卫星图像，并以 3D 点云的形式生成相应的高度图，该高度图将用作适当的景观网格。第一步，我们利用经过卫星图像训练的 GAN，它能够学习数据集的分布，从而创建新颖的卫星图像。对于第二部分，我们需要从 RGB 图像到数字高程模型 (DEM) 的一对一映射。我们部署了条件生成对抗网络（CGAN），这是最先进的图像到图像转换方法，为第一个模型的每个随机生成的图像生成合理的高度图。结合生成的 DEM 和 RGB 图像，我们能够构建由合理的高度分布和色彩组成的 3D 场景，与训练期间提供的遥感景观相关。 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的程序化3D地形生成方法，通过卫星或无人机获取的遥感图像生成逼真的RGB卫星图像和对应的数字高程模型（DEM），进而构建3D地形。 Emmanouil Panagiotou,Eleni Charou eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Giulia Orrù,Davide Ghiani,Maura Pintor,Gian Luca Marcialis,Fabio Roli
title: Detecting Anomalies from Video-Sequences: a Novel Descriptor
title_zh: 从视频序列中检测异常：一种新颖的描述符
comment: Accepted for the 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2020)
comments: Accepted for the 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2020)
abstract: We present a novel descriptor for crowd behavior analysis and anomaly detection. The goal is to measure by appropriate patterns the speed of formation and disintegration of groups in the crowd. This descriptor is inspired by the concept of one-dimensional local binary patterns: in our case, such patterns depend on the number of group observed in a time window. An appropriate measurement unit, named "trit" (trinary digit), represents three possible dynamic states of groups on a certain frame. Our hypothesis is that abrupt variations of the groups' number may be due to an anomalous event that can be accordingly detected, by translating these variations on temporal trit-based sequence of strings which are significantly different from the one describing the "no-anomaly" one. Due to the peculiarity of the rationale behind this work, relying on the number of groups, three different methods of people group's extraction are compared. Experiments are carried out on the Motion-Emotion benchmark data set. Reported results point out in which cases the trit-based measurement of group dynamics allows us to detect the anomaly. Besides the promising performance of our approach, we show how it is correlated with the anomaly typology and the camera's perspective to the crowd's flow (frontal, lateral).
summary: We present a novel descriptor for crowd behavior analysis and anomaly detection. The goal is to measure by appropriate patterns the speed of formation and disintegration of groups in the crowd. This descriptor is inspired by the concept of one-dimensional local binary patterns: in our case, such patterns depend on the number of group observed in a time window. An appropriate measurement unit, named "trit" (trinary digit), represents three possible dynamic states of groups on a certain frame. Our hypothesis is that abrupt variations of the groups' number may be due to an anomalous event that can be accordingly detected, by translating these variations on temporal trit-based sequence of strings which are significantly different from the one describing the "no-anomaly" one. Due to the peculiarity of the rationale behind this work, relying on the number of groups, three different methods of people group's extraction are compared. Experiments are carried out on the Motion-Emotion benchmark data set. Reported results point out in which cases the trit-based measurement of group dynamics allows us to detect the anomaly. Besides the promising performance of our approach, we show how it is correlated with the anomaly typology and the camera's perspective to the crowd's flow (frontal, lateral).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于人群行为分析和异常检测的新颖描述符。目标是通过适当的模式来衡量人群中群体形成和瓦解的速度。该描述符的灵感来自于一维局部二进制模式的概念：在我们的例子中，此类模式取决于在时间窗口中观察到的组的数量。一个适当的测量单位，称为“trit”（三位数字），表示特定帧上组的三种可能的动态状态。我们的假设是，群体数量的突然变化可能是由于异常事件引起的，通过将这些变化转换​​为基于时间 trit 的字符串序列（与描述“无异常”的序列显着不同），可以相应地检测到异常事件。由于这项工作背后的基本原理的特殊性，依靠群体的数量，比较了三种不同的人群提取方法。在Motion-Emotion基准数据集上进行了实验。报告的结果指出，在这种情况下，基于 trit 的群体动态测量使我们能够检测到异常。除了我们的方法具有良好的性能之外，我们还展示了它如何与异常类型和摄像机对人群流动的视角（正面、侧面）相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型描述符，用于通过分析人群群体的形成与解散速度来检测视频序列中的异常行为。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效捕捉人群动态变化中的异常模式，需通过量化群体数量的突变来识别异常事件。
AI.method: 基于一维局部二值模式思想，引入三元状态单位'trit'描述帧内群体动态，比较三种群体提取方法并分析异常事件的时间序列差异。
AI.result: 在Motion-Emotion数据集上验证了该方法对不同异常类型及摄像机视角（正面/侧面）的有效性，显示其检测性能与异常特征相关。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过群体数量动态变化的三元序列分析，为异常检测提供了新颖且有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Jakub Vincalek,Sean Walton,Ben Evans
title: It's the Journey Not the Destination: Building Genetic Algorithms Practitioners Can Trust
title_zh: 这是旅程而不是目的地：构建从业者可以信赖的遗传算法
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Evolutionary Computation
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Evolutionary Computation
abstract: Genetic algorithms have been developed for decades by researchers in academia and perform well in engineering applications, yet their uptake in industry remains limited. In order to understand why this is the case, the opinions of users of engineering design tools were gathered. The results from a survey showing the attitudes of engineers and students with design experience with respect to optimisation algorithms are presented. A survey was designed to answer two research questions: To what extent is there a pre-existing sentiment (negative or positive) among students, engineers, and managers towards genetic algorithm-based design? and What are the requirements of practitioners with regards to design optimisation and the design optimisation process? A total of 23 participants (N = 23) took part in the 3-part mixed methods survey. Thematic analysis was conducted on the open-ended questions. A common thread throughout participants responses is that there is a question of trust towards genetic algorithms within industry. Perhaps surprising is that the key to gaining this trust is not producing good results, but creating algorithms which explain the process they take in reaching a result. Participants have expressed a desire to continue to remain in the design loop. This is at odds with the motivation of a portion of the genetic algorithms community of removing humans from the loop. It is clear we need to take a different approach to increase industrial uptake. Based on this, the following recommendations have been made to increase their use in industry: an increase of transparency and explainability of genetic algorithms, an increased focus on user experience, better communication between developers and engineers, and visualising algorithm behaviour.

A survey was designed to answer two research questions: To what extent is there a pre-existing sentiment (negative or positive) among students, engineers, and managers towards genetic algorithm-based design? and What are the requirements of practitioners with regards to design optimisation and the design optimisation process? A total of 23 participants (N = 23) took part in the 3-part mixed methods survey. Thematic analysis was conducted on the open-ended questions. A common thread throughout participants responses is that there is a question of trust towards genetic algorithms within industry. Perhaps surprising is that the key to gaining this trust is not producing good results, but creating algorithms which explain the process they take in reaching a result. Participants have expressed a desire to continue to remain in the design loop. This is at odds with the motivation of a portion of the genetic algorithms community of removing humans from the loop. It is clear we need to take a different approach to increase industrial uptake. Based on this, the following recommendations have been made to increase their use in industry: an increase of transparency and explainability of genetic algorithms, an increased focus on user experience, better communication between developers and engineers, and visualising algorithm behaviour.
abstract_zh: 遗传算法已经由学术界的研究人员开发了数十年，并且在工程应用中表现良好，但其在工业界的应用仍然有限。为了了解为什么会出现这种情况，我们收集了工程设计工具用户的意见。一项调查结果显示了具有设计经验的工程师和学生对优化算法的态度。一项调查旨在回答两个研究问题：学生、工程师和管理人员对基于遗传算法的设计预先存在的情绪（消极或积极）有多大？从业者对设计优化和设计优化过程有哪些要求？共有 23 名参与者 (N = 23) 参加了由 3 部分组成的混合方法调查。对开放式问题进行了主题分析。参与者回答中的一个共同点是，行业内存在对遗传算法的信任问题。也许令人惊讶的是，获得这种信任的关键不是产生好的结果，而是创建算法来解释他们达到结果的过程。参与者表示希望继续留在设计循环中。这与部分遗传算法社区将人类从循环中移除的动机不一致。显然，我们需要采取不同的方法来提高工业吸收率。基于此，提出了以下建议来增加其在工业中的使用：增加遗传算法的透明度和可解释性、更加关注用户体验、开发人员和工程师之间更好的沟通以及可视化算法行为。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了工业界对遗传算法信任度不足的原因，并提出提升其应用的建议。
AI.motivation: 尽管遗传算法在学术界和工程应用中表现良好，但工业界采用率低，需了解工程师和学生对优化算法的态度及需求。
AI.method: 通过混合方法调查（包含23名参与者），结合主题分析法分析开放性问题回答。
AI.result: 参与者普遍对遗传算法缺乏信任，核心问题在于算法过程缺乏透明度和可解释性，且用户希望保持设计闭环参与。
AI.conclusion: 需提升算法透明度、优化用户体验、加强开发者与工程师沟通，并可视化算法行为以促进工业应用。

authors_text: Akhila Sri Manasa Venigalla,Sridhar Chimalakonda
title: EmoG- Towards Emojifying Gmail Conversations
title_zh: EmoG- 迈向表情符号化 Gmail 对话
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, To appear in Proceedings of 54th Hawaii International Conference on System Sciences, HICSS 2021
comments: 9 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, To appear in Proceedings of 54th Hawaii International Conference on System Sciences, HICSS 2021
abstract: Emails are one of the most frequently used medium of communication in the present day across multiple domains including industry and educational institutions. Understanding sentiments being expressed in an email could have a considerable impact on the recipients' action or response to the email. However, it is difficult to interpret emotions of the sender from pure text in which emotions are not explicitly present. Researchers have tried to predict customer attrition by integrating emails in client-company environment with emotions. However, most of the existing works deal with static assessment of email emotions. Presenting sentiments of emails dynamically to the reader could help in understanding senders' emotion and as well have an impact on readers' action. Hence, in this paper, we present EmoG as a Google Chrome Extension which is intended to support university students. It augments emails with emojis based on the sentiment being conveyed in the email, which might also offer faster overview of email sentiments and act as tags that could help in automatic sorting and processing of emails. Currently, EmoG has been developed to support Gmail inbox on a Google Chrome browser, and could be extended to other inboxes and browsers with ease. We have conducted a user survey with 15 university students to understand the usefulness of EmoG and received positive feedback.

Understanding sentiments being expressed in an email could have a considerable impact on the recipients' action or response to the email. However, it is difficult to interpret emotions of the sender from pure text in which emotions are not explicitly present. Researchers have tried to predict customer attrition by integrating emails in client-company environment with emotions. However, most of the existing works deal with static assessment of email emotions. Presenting sentiments of emails dynamically to the reader could help in understanding senders' emotion and as well have an impact on readers' action. Hence, in this paper, we present EmoG as a Google Chrome Extension which is intended to support university students. It augments emails with emojis based on the sentiment being conveyed in the email, which might also offer faster overview of email sentiments and act as tags that could help in automatic sorting and processing of emails. Currently, EmoG has been developed to support Gmail inbox on a Google Chrome browser, and could be extended to other inboxes and browsers with ease. We have conducted a user survey with 15 university students to understand the usefulness of EmoG and received positive feedback.
abstract_zh: 电子邮件是当今跨多个领域（包括行业和教育机构）最常用的通信媒介之一。了解电子邮件中表达的情绪可能会对收件人的行为或对电子邮件的响应产生相当大的影响。然而，很难从情感没有明确呈现的纯文本中解释发送者的情感。研究人员试图通过将客户公司环境中的电子邮件与情绪相结合来预测客户流失。然而，大多数现有作品都涉及电子邮件情绪的静态评估。向读者动态呈现电子邮件的情绪有助于理解发件人的情绪，并对读者的行为产生影响。因此，在本文中，我们将 EmoG 作为 Google Chrome 扩展提供，旨在支持大学生。它根据电子邮件中传达的情绪使用表情符号来增强电子邮件，这也可能提供对电子邮件情绪的更快概述，并充当有助于自动排序和处理电子邮件的标签。目前，EmoG 已开发支持 Google Chrome 浏览器上的 Gmail 收件箱，并且可以轻松扩展到其他收件箱和浏览器。我们对 15 名大学生进行了用户调查，以了解 EmoG 的实用性，并收到了积极的反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmoG，一个基于情感分析的Chrome扩展程序，通过在Gmail邮件中添加表情符号来增强用户对邮件情感的理解。
AI.motivation: 电子邮件文本缺乏显式情感线索，导致接收者难以准确解读发送者情绪，而现有情感分析方法多为静态评估，无法动态呈现情感变化。
AI.method: 开发Chrome扩展程序EmoG，利用自然语言处理技术对邮件内容进行情感分析，并根据分析结果自动添加对应表情符号，支持Gmail邮箱并可扩展至其他平台。
AI.result: 对15名大学生的用户调查显示，EmoG能有效提升邮件情感识别效率，用户反馈积极，认为其有助于邮件分类和快速响应。
AI.conclusion: EmoG通过动态情感可视化有效辅助用户理解邮件情绪，验证了情感增强邮件的可行性，未来可扩展至更多邮件客户端和应用场景。

authors_text: Cedric Renggli,André Susano Pinto,Luka Rimanic,Joan Puigcerver,Carlos Riquelme,Ce Zhang,Mario Lucic
title: Which Model to Transfer? Finding the Needle in the Growing Haystack
title_zh: 要转移哪个模型？大海捞针
abstract: Transfer learning has been recently popularized as a data-efficient alternative to training models from scratch, in particular for computer vision tasks where it provides a remarkably solid baseline. The emergence of rich model repositories, such as TensorFlow Hub, enables the practitioners and researchers to unleash the potential of these models across a wide range of downstream tasks. As these repositories keep growing exponentially, efficiently selecting a good model for the task at hand becomes paramount. We provide a formalization of this problem through a familiar notion of regret and introduce the predominant strategies, namely task-agnostic (e.g. ranking models by their ImageNet performance) and task-aware search strategies (such as linear or kNN evaluation). We conduct a large-scale empirical study and show that both task-agnostic and task-aware methods can yield high regret. We then propose a simple and computationally efficient hybrid search strategy which outperforms the existing approaches. We highlight the practical benefits of the proposed solution on a set of 19 diverse vision tasks.
summary: Transfer learning has been recently popularized as a data-efficient alternative to training models from scratch, in particular for computer vision tasks where it provides a remarkably solid baseline. The emergence of rich model repositories, such as TensorFlow Hub, enables the practitioners and researchers to unleash the potential of these models across a wide range of downstream tasks. As these repositories keep growing exponentially, efficiently selecting a good model for the task at hand becomes paramount. We provide a formalization of this problem through a familiar notion of regret and introduce the predominant strategies, namely task-agnostic (e.g. ranking models by their ImageNet performance) and task-aware search strategies (such as linear or kNN evaluation). We conduct a large-scale empirical study and show that both task-agnostic and task-aware methods can yield high regret. We then propose a simple and computationally efficient hybrid search strategy which outperforms the existing approaches. We highlight the practical benefits of the proposed solution on a set of 19 diverse vision tasks.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习最近作为从头开始训练模型的数据高效替代方案而得到普及，特别是对于计算机视觉任务，它提供了非常可靠的基线。丰富的模型存储库（例如 TensorFlow Hub）的出现，使从业者和研究人员能够在广泛的下游任务中释放这些模型的潜力。随着这些存储库不断呈指数增长，为手头的任务有效地选择一个好的模型变得至关重要。我们通过熟悉的后悔概念提供了这个问题的形式化，并引入了主要策略，即任务无关（例如根据 ImageNet 性能对模型进行排名）和任务感知搜索策略（例如线性或 kNN 评估）。我们进行了大规模的实证研究，结果表明任务无关和任务感知的方法都会产生很高的遗憾。然后，我们提出了一种简单且计算高效的混合搜索策略，其性能优于现有方法。我们强调了所提出的解决方案对 19 项不同视觉任务的实际好处。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在快速增长的预训练模型库中如何高效选择适合特定任务的迁移学习模型，以减少任务遗憾。
AI.motivation: 随着模型仓库的指数级增长，传统任务无关（如ImageNet性能排序）或任务感知（如线性/kNN评估）的模型选择策略可能产生高遗憾，亟需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种计算高效的混合搜索策略，结合任务无关与任务感知方法的优势，通过动态平衡两者权重优化模型选择。
AI.result: 在19个视觉任务的实验中，该混合策略显著优于现有方法，有效降低了迁移学习中的任务遗憾。
AI.conclusion: 混合策略为模型选择提供了实用且高效的解决方案，可广泛应用于计算机视觉领域的迁移学习场景。

authors_text: Jingfei Chang
title: Coarse and fine-grained automatic cropping deep convolutional neural network
title_zh: 粗细粒度自动裁剪深度卷积神经网络
comment: 12 pages, 1 table
comments: 12 pages, 1 table
abstract: The existing convolutional neural network pruning algorithms can be divided into two categories: coarse-grained clipping and fine-grained clipping. This paper proposes a coarse and fine-grained automatic pruning algorithm, which can achieve more efficient and accurate compression acceleration for convolutional neural networks. First, cluster the intermediate feature maps of the convolutional neural network to obtain the network structure after coarse-grained clipping, and then use the particle swarm optimization algorithm to iteratively search and optimize the structure. Finally, the optimal network tailoring substructure is obtained.
summary: The existing convolutional neural network pruning algorithms can be divided into two categories: coarse-grained clipping and fine-grained clipping. This paper proposes a coarse and fine-grained automatic pruning algorithm, which can achieve more efficient and accurate compression acceleration for convolutional neural networks. First, cluster the intermediate feature maps of the convolutional neural network to obtain the network structure after coarse-grained clipping, and then use the particle swarm optimization algorithm to iteratively search and optimize the structure. Finally, the optimal network tailoring substructure is obtained.
abstract_zh: 现有的卷积神经网络剪枝算法可以分为两类：粗粒度剪枝和细粒度剪枝。本文提出了一种粗粒度和细粒度的自动剪枝算法，可以为卷积神经网络实现更高效、更准确的压缩加速。首先对卷积神经网络的中间特征图进行聚类，得到粗粒度裁剪后的网络结构，然后利用粒子群优化算法迭代搜索和优化该结构。最终得到最优的网络裁剪子结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合粗粒度和细粒度的自动剪枝深度卷积神经网络算法，以提高网络压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积神经网络剪枝算法存在粗粒度剪枝效率低、细粒度剪枝计算量大的问题，需兼顾压缩效率与精度。
AI.method: 通过聚类中间特征图实现粗粒度剪枝，再结合粒子群优化算法迭代优化网络结构，最终获得最优子结构。
AI.result: 该方法在保持较高精度的同时，实现了更高效的网络压缩与加速。
AI.conclusion: 融合粗细粒度剪枝策略可有效提升卷积神经网络的压缩性能，为模型优化提供新思路。

ai_content.result: 该方法在保持较高精度的同时，实现了更高效的网络压缩与加速。
ai_content.conclusion: 融合粗细粒度剪枝策略可有效提升卷积神经网络的压缩性能，为模型优化提供新思路。

search_text: Coarse and fine-grained automatic cropping deep convolutional neural network 粗细粒度自动裁剪深度卷积神经网络 The existing convolutional neural network pruning algorithms can be divided into two categories: coarse-grained clipping and fine-grained clipping. This paper proposes a coarse and fine-grained automatic pruning algorithm, which can achieve more efficient and accurate compression acceleration for convolutional neural networks. First, cluster the intermediate feature maps of the convolutional neural network to obtain the network structure after coarse-grained clipping, and then use the particle swarm optimization algorithm to iteratively search and optimize the structure. Finally, the optimal network tailoring substructure is obtained. 现有的卷积神经网络剪枝算法可以分为两类：粗粒度剪枝和细粒度剪枝。本文提出了一种粗粒度和细粒度的自动剪枝算法，可以为卷积神经网络实现更高效、更准确的压缩加速。首先对卷积神经网络的中间特征图进行聚类，得到粗粒度裁剪后的网络结构，然后利用粒子群优化算法迭代搜索和优化该结构。最终得到最优的网络裁剪子结构。 本文提出一种结合粗粒度和细粒度的自动剪枝深度卷积神经网络算法，以提高网络压缩效率。 Jingfei Chang cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: R Mitteau,J Spruytte,S Vallet,J Travère,D Guilhem,C Brosset
title: A Possible Method of Carbon Deposit Mapping on Plasma Facing Components Using Infrared Thermography
title_zh: 使用红外热成像技术对等离子体表面部件进行碳沉积测绘的一种可能方法
comment: Journal of Nuclear Materials, Elsevier, 2007
comments: Journal of Nuclear Materials, Elsevier, 2007
abstract: The material eroded from the surface of plasma facing components is redeposited partly close to high heat flux areas. At these locations, the deposit is heated by the plasma and the deposition pattern evolves depending on the operation parameters. The mapping of the deposit is still a matter of intense scientific activity, especially during the course of experimental campaigns. A method based on the comparison of surface temperature maps, obtained in situ by infrared cameras and by theoretical modelling is proposed. The difference between the two is attributed to the thermal resistance added by deposited material, and expressed as a deposit thickness. The method benefits of elaborated imaging techniques such as possibility theory and fuzzy logics. The results are consistent with deposit maps obtained by visual inspection during shutdowns.
summary: The material eroded from the surface of plasma facing components is redeposited partly close to high heat flux areas. At these locations, the deposit is heated by the plasma and the deposition pattern evolves depending on the operation parameters. The mapping of the deposit is still a matter of intense scientific activity, especially during the course of experimental campaigns. A method based on the comparison of surface temperature maps, obtained in situ by infrared cameras and by theoretical modelling is proposed. The difference between the two is attributed to the thermal resistance added by deposited material, and expressed as a deposit thickness. The method benefits of elaborated imaging techniques such as possibility theory and fuzzy logics. The results are consistent with deposit maps obtained by visual inspection during shutdowns.
abstract_zh: 从面向等离子体的部件表面侵蚀的材料部分地重新沉积在高热通量区域附近。在这些位置，沉积物被等离子体加热，沉积图案根据操作参数而变化。矿床测绘仍然是一项激烈的科学活动，特别是在实验活动过程中。提出了一种基于通过红外摄像机现场获得的表面温度图进行比较并通过理论建模的方法。两者之间的差异归因于沉积材料增加的热阻，并表示为沉积厚度。该方法受益于复杂的成像技术，例如可能性理论和模糊逻辑。结果与停机期间通过目视检查获得的沉积图一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用红外热成像技术对等离子体面对组件上的碳沉积进行映射的可能方法。
AI.motivation: 等离子体面对组件表面被侵蚀的材料部分沉积在高热通量区域，这些区域的沉积物受等离子体加热，沉积模式随操作参数变化而变化，因此需要一种有效的沉积物映射方法。
AI.method: 该方法通过比较现场红外相机获取的表面温度图和理论模型的温度图，利用可能性理论和模糊逻辑等先进的成像技术，将两者的差异归因于沉积物增加的热阻，并表示为沉积厚度。
AI.result: 该方法得出的沉积图与停机时通过目视检查获得的沉积图一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为等离子体面对组件上的碳沉积映射提供了一种可行的解决方案，具有较高的准确性。

authors_text: Debjyoti Mukherjee,Alireza Ahmadi,Maryam Vahdat Pour,Joel Reardon
title: An Empirical Study on User Reviews Targeting Mobile Apps' Security & Privacy
title_zh: 针对移动应用安全与隐私的用户评论实证研究
abstract: Application markets provide a communication channel between app developers and their end-users in form of app reviews, which allow users to provide feedback about the apps. Although security and privacy in mobile apps are one of the biggest issues, it is unclear how much people are aware of these or discuss them in reviews. In this study, we explore the privacy and security concerns of users using reviews in the Google Play Store. For this, we conducted a study by analyzing around 2.2M reviews from the top 539 apps of this Android market. We found that 0.5\% of these reviews are related to the security and privacy concerns of the users. We further investigated these apps by performing dynamic analysis which provided us valuable insights into their actual behaviors. Based on the different perspectives, we categorized the apps and evaluated how the different factors influence the users' perception of the apps. It was evident from the results that the number of permissions that the apps request plays a dominant role in this matter. We also found that sending out the location can affect the users' thoughts about the app. The other factors do not directly affect the privacy and security concerns for the users.
summary: Application markets provide a communication channel between app developers and their end-users in form of app reviews, which allow users to provide feedback about the apps. Although security and privacy in mobile apps are one of the biggest issues, it is unclear how much people are aware of these or discuss them in reviews. In this study, we explore the privacy and security concerns of users using reviews in the Google Play Store. For this, we conducted a study by analyzing around 2.2M reviews from the top 539 apps of this Android market. We found that 0.5\% of these reviews are related to the security and privacy concerns of the users. We further investigated these apps by performing dynamic analysis which provided us valuable insights into their actual behaviors. Based on the different perspectives, we categorized the apps and evaluated how the different factors influence the users' perception of the apps. It was evident from the results that the number of permissions that the apps request plays a dominant role in this matter. We also found that sending out the location can affect the users' thoughts about the app. The other factors do not directly affect the privacy and security concerns for the users.
abstract_zh: 应用程序市场以应用程序评论的形式在应用程序开发人员与其最终用户之间提供沟通渠道，允许用户提供有关应用程序的反馈。尽管移动应用程序的安全和隐私是最大的问题之一，但尚不清楚有多少人意识到这些问题或在评论中讨论它们。在本研究中，我们探讨了在 Google Play 商店中使用评论的用户的隐私和安全问题。为此，我们进行了一项研究，分析了该 Android 市场排名前 539 的应用程序的约 220 万条评论。我们发现这些评论中有 0.5\% 与用户的安全和隐私问题有关。我们通过执行动态分析进一步研究了这些应用程序，这为我们提供了对其实际行为的宝贵见解。基于不同的视角，我们对应用程序进行了分类，并评估了不同因素如何影响用户对应用程序的感知。从结果中可以明显看出，应用程序请求的权限数量在这方面起着主导作用。我们还发现发送位置会影响用户对应用程序的看法。其他因素不会直接影响用户的隐私和安全问题。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析Google Play商店中220万条应用评论及动态分析，研究用户对移动应用安全与隐私问题的讨论及感知因素。
AI.motivation: 尽管移动应用的安全与隐私问题日益严重，但用户在应用评论中讨论这些话题的程度尚不明确，需通过实证研究揭示用户关注点及影响因素。
AI.method: 收集Google Play商店前539名应用的220万条评论，筛选涉及安全隐私的评论；结合动态分析技术评估应用实际行为，从权限数量、位置共享等维度分类分析影响用户感知的因素。
AI.result: 仅0.5%的评论涉及安全隐私问题；动态分析显示应用请求的权限数量和位置共享行为显著影响用户感知，其他因素影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 用户评论中安全隐私话题讨论较少，但应用权限数量及位置共享等行为是影响用户安全感知的关键因素，开发者需重点关注此类设计。

authors_text: Jianrong Wang,Tong Wu,Shanyu Wang,Mei Yu,Qiang Fang,Ju Zhang,Li Liu
title: Three-Dimensional Lip Motion Network for Text-Independent Speaker Recognition
title_zh: 用于与文本无关的说话人识别的三维唇动网络
abstract: Lip motion reflects behavior characteristics of speakers, and thus can be used as a new kind of biometrics in speaker recognition. In the literature, lots of works used two-dimensional (2D) lip images to recognize speaker in a textdependent context. However, 2D lip easily suffers from various face orientations. To this end, in this work, we present a novel end-to-end 3D lip motion Network (3LMNet) by utilizing the sentence-level 3D lip motion (S3DLM) to recognize speakers in both the text-independent and text-dependent contexts. A new regional feedback module (RFM) is proposed to obtain attentions in different lip regions. Besides, prior knowledge of lip motion is investigated to complement RFM, where landmark-level and frame-level features are merged to form a better feature representation. Moreover, we present two methods, i.e., coordinate transformation and face posture correction to pre-process the LSD-AV dataset, which contains 68 speakers and 146 sentences per speaker. The evaluation results on this dataset demonstrate that our proposed 3LMNet is superior to the baseline models, i.e., LSTM, VGG-16 and ResNet-34, and outperforms the state-of-the-art using 2D lip image as well as the 3D face. The code of this work is released at https://github.com/wutong18/Three-Dimensional-Lip- Motion-Network-for-Text-Independent-Speaker-Recognition.
summary: Lip motion reflects behavior characteristics of speakers, and thus can be used as a new kind of biometrics in speaker recognition. In the literature, lots of works used two-dimensional (2D) lip images to recognize speaker in a textdependent context. However, 2D lip easily suffers from various face orientations. To this end, in this work, we present a novel end-to-end 3D lip motion Network (3LMNet) by utilizing the sentence-level 3D lip motion (S3DLM) to recognize speakers in both the text-independent and text-dependent contexts. A new regional feedback module (RFM) is proposed to obtain attentions in different lip regions. Besides, prior knowledge of lip motion is investigated to complement RFM, where landmark-level and frame-level features are merged to form a better feature representation. Moreover, we present two methods, i.e., coordinate transformation and face posture correction to pre-process the LSD-AV dataset, which contains 68 speakers and 146 sentences per speaker. The evaluation results on this dataset demonstrate that our proposed 3LMNet is superior to the baseline models, i.e., LSTM, VGG-16 and ResNet-34, and outperforms the state-of-the-art using 2D lip image as well as the 3D face. The code of this work is released at https://github.com/wutong18/Three-Dimensional-Lip- Motion-Network-for-Text-Independent-Speaker-Recognition.
abstract_zh: 唇动反映了说话人的行为特征，因此可以作为说话人识别中的一种新型生物识别技术。在文献中，许多作品使用二维 (2D) 嘴唇图像来识别文本相关上下文中的说话者。然而，2D 唇部很容易受到各种面部方向的影响。为此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端 3D 唇部运动网络 (3LMNet)，利用句子级 3D 唇部运动 (S3DLM) 来识别文本无关和文本相关上下文中的说话者。提出了一种新的区域反馈模块（RFM）来获得不同嘴唇区域的注意力。此外，还研究了嘴唇运动的先验知识来补充 RFM，其中地标级和帧级特征被合并以形成更好的特征表示。此外，我们提出了两种方法，即坐标变换和面部姿势校正来预处理 LSD-AV 数据集，该数据集包含 68 个说话者和每个说话者 146 个句子。该数据集的评估结果表明，我们提出的 3LMNet 优于基线模型，即 LSTM、VGG-16 和 ResNet-34，并且优于使用 2D 唇部图像和 3D 人脸的最新技术。这项工作的代码发布于https://github.com/wutong18/Three-Dimensional-Lip-Motion-Network-for-Text-Independent-Speaker-Recognition。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三维唇部运动的端到端网络（3LMNet），用于文本无关和文本相关的说话人识别任务。
AI.motivation: 二维唇部图像易受面部朝向影响，难以准确捕捉说话人行为特征，需利用三维唇部运动信息提升识别鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计区域反馈模块（RFM）获取不同唇区注意力，结合关键点级与帧级特征增强表征；采用坐标变换与面部姿态校正预处理LSD-AV数据集。
AI.result: 在包含68名说话人、每人146句的LSD-AV数据集上，3LMNet优于LSTM、VGG-16、ResNet-34等基线模型及现有2D/3D方法。
AI.conclusion: 三维唇部运动特征结合RFM模块与先验知识能有效提升说话人识别性能，为文本无关场景提供新思路。

To this end, in this work, we present a novel end-to-end 3D lip motion Network (3LMNet) by utilizing the sentence-level 3D lip motion (S3DLM) to recognize speakers in both the text-independent and text-dependent contexts. Moreover, we present two methods, i.e., coordinate transformation and face posture correction to pre-process the LSD-AV dataset, which contains 68 speakers and 146 sentences per speaker. authors_text: Jinting Wu,Yujia Zhang,Xiaoguang Zhao,Wenbin Gao
title: A Generalized Zero-Shot Framework for Emotion Recognition from Body Gestures
title_zh: 用于身体手势情绪识别的通用零样本框架
comment: The new version adds a co-author and revises the layout of Fig.3
comments: The new version adds a co-author and revises the layout of Fig.3
abstract: Although automatic emotion recognition from facial expressions and speech has made remarkable progress, emotion recognition from body gestures has not been thoroughly explored. People often use a variety of body language to express emotions, and it is difficult to enumerate all emotional body gestures and collect enough samples for each category. Therefore, recognizing new emotional body gestures is critical for better understanding human emotions. However, the existing methods fail to accurately determine which emotional state a new body gesture belongs to. In order to solve this problem, we introduce a Generalized Zero-Shot Learning (GZSL) framework, which consists of three branches to infer the emotional state of the new body gestures with only their semantic descriptions. The first branch is a Prototype-Based Detector (PBD) which is used to determine whether an sample belongs to a seen body gesture category and obtain the prediction results of the samples from the seen categories. The second branch is a Stacked AutoEncoder (StAE) with manifold regularization, which utilizes semantic representations to predict samples from unseen categories. Note that both of the above branches are for body gesture recognition. We further add an emotion classifier with a softmax layer as the third branch in order to better learn the feature representations for this emotion classification task. The input features for these three branches are learned by a shared feature extraction network, i.e., a Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory Networks (BLSTM) with a self-attention module. We treat these three branches as subtasks and use multi-task learning strategies for joint training. The performance of our framework on an emotion recognition dataset is significantly superior to the traditional method of emotion classification and state-of-the-art zero-shot learning methods.
summary: Although automatic emotion recognition from facial expressions and speech has made remarkable progress, emotion recognition from body gestures has not been thoroughly explored. People often use a variety of body language to express emotions, and it is difficult to enumerate all emotional body gestures and collect enough samples for each category. Therefore, recognizing new emotional body gestures is critical for better understanding human emotions. However, the existing methods fail to accurately determine which emotional state a new body gesture belongs to. In order to solve this problem, we introduce a Generalized Zero-Shot Learning (GZSL) framework, which consists of three branches to infer the emotional state of the new body gestures with only their semantic descriptions. The first branch is a Prototype-Based Detector (PBD) which is used to determine whether an sample belongs to a seen body gesture category and obtain the prediction results of the samples from the seen categories. The second branch is a Stacked AutoEncoder (StAE) with manifold regularization, which utilizes semantic representations to predict samples from unseen categories. Note that both of the above branches are for body gesture recognition. We further add an emotion classifier with a softmax layer as the third branch in order to better learn the feature representations for this emotion classification task. The input features for these three branches are learned by a shared feature extraction network, i.e., a Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory Networks (BLSTM) with a self-attention module. We treat these three branches as subtasks and use multi-task learning strategies for joint training. The performance of our framework on an emotion recognition dataset is significantly superior to the traditional method of emotion classification and state-of-the-art zero-shot learning methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管面部表情和语音的自动情绪识别已经取得了显着的进展，但身体姿势的情绪识别尚未得到彻底探索。人们经常使用各种肢体语言来表达情感，并且很难枚举所有情绪化的身体姿势并为每个类别收集足够的样本。因此，识别新的情绪身体姿势对于更好地理解人类情绪至关重要。然而，现有的方法无法准确确定新的身体姿势属于哪种情绪状态。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了广义零样本学习（GZSL）框架，该框架由三个分支组成，仅通过语义描述来推断新身体姿势的情绪状态。第一个分支是基于原型的检测器（PBD），用于确定样本是否属于所见的身体姿势类别，并从所见的类别中获取样本的预测结果。第二个分支是具有流形正则化的堆叠式自动编码器（StAE），它利用语义表示来预测未见过的类别中的样本。请注意，上述两个分支都是用于身体姿势识别。我们进一步添加带有 softmax 层的情感分类器作为第三个分支，以便更好地学习此情感分类任务的特征表示。这三个分支的输入特征是通过共享特征提取网络学习的，即具有自注意力模块的双向长短期记忆网络（BLSTM）。我们将这三个分支视为子任务，并使用多任务学习策略进行联合训练。我们的框架在情感识别数据集上的性能明显优于传统的情感分类方法和最先进的零样本学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的零样本学习框架，用于从身体手势中识别情绪，解决新情绪手势识别难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确判断新型身体手势对应的情绪状态，且难以枚举所有情绪手势并收集足够样本，需通过语义描述实现零样本识别。
AI.method: 构建包含三个分支的GZSL框架：基于原型的检测器（PBD）处理已见类别，带流形正则化的堆叠自编码器（StAE）预测未见类别，结合softmax的情绪分类器；共享BLSTM与自注意力模块提取特征，采用多任务学习策略联合训练。
AI.result: 在情绪识别数据集上显著优于传统分类方法及现有零样本学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过语义信息与多任务学习有效解决了新型身体手势情绪识别问题，推动了基于身体语言的情绪识别研究。

authors_text: Zongxin Yang,Yunchao Wei,Yi Yang
title: Collaborative Video Object Segmentation by Multi-Scale Foreground-Background Integration
title_zh: 通过多尺度前景-背景集成进行协作视频对象分割
comment: Accepted by TPAMI; Journal extension of arXiv:2003.08333 (ECCV 2020, Spotlight)
comments: Accepted by TPAMI; Journal extension of arXiv:2003.08333 (ECCV 2020, Spotlight)
abstract: This paper investigates the principles of embedding learning to tackle the challenging semi-supervised video object segmentation. Unlike previous practices that focus on exploring the embedding learning of foreground object (s), we consider background should be equally treated. Thus, we propose a Collaborative video object segmentation by Foreground-Background Integration (CFBI) approach. CFBI separates the feature embedding into the foreground object region and its corresponding background region, implicitly promoting them to be more contrastive and improving the segmentation results accordingly. Moreover, CFBI performs both pixel-level matching processes and instance-level attention mechanisms between the reference and the predicted sequence, making CFBI robust to various object scales. Based on CFBI, we introduce a multi-scale matching structure and propose an Atrous Matching strategy, resulting in a more robust and efficient framework, CFBI+. We conduct extensive experiments on two popular benchmarks, i.e., DAVIS and YouTube-VOS. Without applying any simulated data for pre-training, our CFBI+ achieves the performance (J&F) of 82.9% and 82.8%, outperforming all the other state-of-the-art methods. Code: https://github.com/z-x-yang/CFBI.
summary: This paper investigates the principles of embedding learning to tackle the challenging semi-supervised video object segmentation. Unlike previous practices that focus on exploring the embedding learning of foreground object (s), we consider background should be equally treated. Thus, we propose a Collaborative video object segmentation by Foreground-Background Integration (CFBI) approach. CFBI separates the feature embedding into the foreground object region and its corresponding background region, implicitly promoting them to be more contrastive and improving the segmentation results accordingly. Moreover, CFBI performs both pixel-level matching processes and instance-level attention mechanisms between the reference and the predicted sequence, making CFBI robust to various object scales. Based on CFBI, we introduce a multi-scale matching structure and propose an Atrous Matching strategy, resulting in a more robust and efficient framework, CFBI+. We conduct extensive experiments on two popular benchmarks, i.e., DAVIS and YouTube-VOS. Without applying any simulated data for pre-training, our CFBI+ achieves the performance (J&F) of 82.9% and 82.8%, outperforming all the other state-of-the-art methods. Code: https://github.com/z-x-yang/CFBI.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了嵌入学习的原理，以解决具有挑战性的半监督视频对象分割问题。与以前专注于探索前景对象的嵌入学习的实践不同，我们认为背景应该受到同等对待。因此，我们提出了一种通过前景-背景集成（CFBI）方法进行协作视频对象分割。 CFBI 将嵌入到前景对象区域及其相应背景区域的特征分开，隐式地促进它们更具对比性并相应地改善分割结果。此外，CFBI 在参考序列和预测序列之间执行像素级匹配过程和实例级注意机制，使 CFBI 对各种对象尺度具有鲁棒性。在CFBI的基础上，我们引入了多尺度匹配结构，并提出了Atrous Matching策略，从而产生了一个更加健壮和高效的框架CFBI+。我们对两个流行的基准测试（即 DAVIS 和 YouTube-VOS）进行了广泛的实验。在没有应用任何模拟数据进行预训练的情况下，我们的 CFBI+ 实现了 82.9% 和 82.8% 的性能 (J&F)，优于所有其他最先进的方法。代码：https://github.com/z-x-yang/CFBI。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多尺度前景-背景融合的协作式视频目标分割方法CFBI+，通过同时优化前景与背景特征表示提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督视频分割方法过度关注前景目标学习，忽视了背景信息的对称性建模，导致分割结果在复杂场景下存在对比度不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计CFBI框架分离前景-背景特征嵌入，结合像素级匹配与实例级注意力机制，并引入多尺度空洞匹配策略构建CFBI+模型。
AI.result: 在DAVIS和YouTube-VOS基准测试中，CFBI+在无模拟数据预训练情况下达到82.9%（J&F指标）的分割精度，超越所有现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过协同建模前景与背景特征对比关系，结合多尺度匹配策略可有效提升视频目标分割的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: D. C. Hernandez-Bocanegra,J. Ziegler
title: Assessing the Helpfulness of Review Content for Explaining Recommendations
title_zh: 评估评论内容对解释建议的有用性
comment: 4 pages, In Proceedings of SIGIR 2019 Workshop on ExplainAble Recommendation and Search (EARS 19)
comments: 4 pages, In Proceedings of SIGIR 2019 Workshop on ExplainAble Recommendation and Search (EARS 19)
abstract: Despite the maturity already achieved by recommender systems algorithms, little is known about how to obtain and provide users with a proper rationale for a recommendation. Transparency and effectiveness of recommender systems may be increased when explanations are provided. In particular, identifying of helpful argumentative content from reviews can be leveraged to generate textual explanations. In this paper, we investigate the reasons why a review might be considered helpful, and show that the perception of credibility and convincingness mediates the relationship between helpfulness and the perception of objectivity and relevant aspects addressed. Our findings led us to suggest an argumentbased approach to automatically extracting helpful content from hotel reviews, a domain that differs from those that best fit classical argumentation theories.
summary: Despite the maturity already achieved by recommender systems algorithms, little is known about how to obtain and provide users with a proper rationale for a recommendation. Transparency and effectiveness of recommender systems may be increased when explanations are provided. In particular, identifying of helpful argumentative content from reviews can be leveraged to generate textual explanations. In this paper, we investigate the reasons why a review might be considered helpful, and show that the perception of credibility and convincingness mediates the relationship between helpfulness and the perception of objectivity and relevant aspects addressed. Our findings led us to suggest an argumentbased approach to automatically extracting helpful content from hotel reviews, a domain that differs from those that best fit classical argumentation theories.
abstract_zh: 尽管推荐系统算法已经成熟，但人们对如何获取并向用户提供适当的推荐理由知之甚少。提供解释后，推荐系统的透明度和有效性可能会提高。特别是，可以利用从评论中识别有用的论证内容来生成文本解释。在本文中，我们调查了评论可能被认为有帮助的原因，并表明对可信度和说服力的看法调解了有用性与对客观性和相关方面的看法之间的关系。我们的研究结果使我们提出了一种基于论证的方法来自动从酒店评论中提取有用的内容，该领域不同于最适合经典论证理论的领域。

AI.tldr: 研究如何从评论中提取有用内容以生成推荐解释
AI.motivation: 提高推荐系统的透明度和有效性，通过解释帮助用户理解推荐理由
AI.method: 提出基于论点的方法，自动提取酒店评论中的有用内容
AI.result: 发现可信度和说服力在帮助性与客观性及相关方面之间起中介作用
AI.conclusion: 建议采用基于论点的方法自动提取评论中的有用内容以生成解释

authors_text: Dan A. Calian,Daniel J. Mankowitz,Tom Zahavy,Zhongwen Xu,Junhyuk Oh,Nir Levine,Timothy Mann
title: Balancing Constraints and Rewards with Meta-Gradient D4PG
title_zh: 使用元梯度 D4PG 平衡约束和奖励
abstract: Deploying Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents to solve real-world applications often requires satisfying complex system constraints. Often the constraint thresholds are incorrectly set due to the complex nature of a system or the inability to verify the thresholds offline (e.g, no simulator or reasonable offline evaluation procedure exists). This results in solutions where a task cannot be solved without violating the constraints. However, in many real-world cases, constraint violations are undesirable yet they are not catastrophic, motivating the need for soft-constrained RL approaches. We present a soft-constrained RL approach that utilizes meta-gradients to find a good trade-off between expected return and minimizing constraint violations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach by showing that it consistently outperforms the baselines across four different MuJoCo domains.
summary: Deploying Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents to solve real-world applications often requires satisfying complex system constraints. Often the constraint thresholds are incorrectly set due to the complex nature of a system or the inability to verify the thresholds offline (e.g, no simulator or reasonable offline evaluation procedure exists). This results in solutions where a task cannot be solved without violating the constraints. However, in many real-world cases, constraint violations are undesirable yet they are not catastrophic, motivating the need for soft-constrained RL approaches. We present a soft-constrained RL approach that utilizes meta-gradients to find a good trade-off between expected return and minimizing constraint violations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach by showing that it consistently outperforms the baselines across four different MuJoCo domains.
abstract_zh: 部署强化学习（RL）代理来解决现实世界的应用程序通常需要满足复杂的系统约束。通常，由于系统的复杂性或无法离线验证阈值（例如，不存在模拟器或合理的离线评估程序），约束阈值设置不正确。这会导致在不违反约束的情况下无法解决任务的解决方案。然而，在许多现实世界的情况下，违反约束是不受欢迎的，但它们并不是灾难性的，这就激发了对软约束强化学习方法的需求。我们提出了一种软约束强化学习方法，该方法利用元梯度在预期回报和最小化约束违规之间找到良好的权衡。我们通过证明该方法在四个不同 MuJoCo 领域的性能始终优于基线来证明该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元梯度的软约束强化学习方法D4PG，用于在复杂系统约束下优化任务回报。
AI.motivation: 现实系统中约束阈值常因系统复杂性或缺乏离线验证工具而设置不当，导致传统RL方法无法在满足约束的前提下完成任务，需寻求非灾难性约束违规的软约束解决方案。
AI.method: 结合元梯度优化与D4PG算法，通过元学习动态调整约束惩罚权重，在保证任务回报的同时最小化约束违规。
AI.result: 在四个MuJoCo仿真环境中，该方法在约束满足率和任务回报指标上均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 元梯度驱动的软约束RL框架能有效平衡现实系统中的多目标优化需求，为复杂约束场景提供可行解决方案。

We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach by showing that it consistently outperforms the baselines across four different MuJoCo domains. 部署强化学习（RL）代理来解决现实世界的应用程序通常需要满足复杂的系统约束。通常，由于系统的复杂性或无法离线验证阈值（例如，不存在模拟器或合理的离线评估程序），约束阈值设置不正确。这会导致在不违反约束的情况下无法解决任务的解决方案。然而，在许多现实世界的情况下，违反约束是不受欢迎的，但它们并不是灾难性的，这就激发了对软约束强化学习方法的需求。我们提出了一种软约束强化学习方法，该方法利用元梯度在预期回报和最小化约束违规之间找到良好的权衡。我们通过证明该方法在四个不同 MuJoCo 领域的性能始终优于基线来证明该方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于元梯度的软约束强化学习方法D4PG，用于在复杂系统约束下优化任务回报。 Dan A. Calian,Daniel J. Mankowitz,Tom Zahavy,Zhongwen Xu,Junhyuk Oh,Nir Levine,Timothy Mann cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Lukas von Stumberg,Patrick Wenzel,Nan Yang,Daniel Cremers
title: LM-Reloc: Levenberg-Marquardt Based Direct Visual Relocalization
title_zh: LM-Reloc：基于 Levenberg-Marquardt 的直接视觉重定位
comment: International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV), 2020
comments: International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV), 2020
abstract: We present LM-Reloc -- a novel approach for visual relocalization based on direct image alignment. In contrast to prior works that tackle the problem with a feature-based formulation, the proposed method does not rely on feature matching and RANSAC. Hence, the method can utilize not only corners but any region of the image with gradients. In particular, we propose a loss formulation inspired by the classical Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm to train LM-Net. The learned features significantly improve the robustness of direct image alignment, especially for relocalization across different conditions. To further improve the robustness of LM-Net against large image baselines, we propose a pose estimation network, CorrPoseNet, which regresses the relative pose to bootstrap the direct image alignment. Evaluations on the CARLA and Oxford RobotCar relocalization tracking benchmark show that our approach delivers more accurate results than previous state-of-the-art methods while being comparable in terms of robustness.
summary: We present LM-Reloc -- a novel approach for visual relocalization based on direct image alignment. In contrast to prior works that tackle the problem with a feature-based formulation, the proposed method does not rely on feature matching and RANSAC. Hence, the method can utilize not only corners but any region of the image with gradients. In particular, we propose a loss formulation inspired by the classical Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm to train LM-Net. The learned features significantly improve the robustness of direct image alignment, especially for relocalization across different conditions. To further improve the robustness of LM-Net against large image baselines, we propose a pose estimation network, CorrPoseNet, which regresses the relative pose to bootstrap the direct image alignment. Evaluations on the CARLA and Oxford RobotCar relocalization tracking benchmark show that our approach delivers more accurate results than previous state-of-the-art methods while being comparable in terms of robustness.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 LM-Reloc——一种基于直接图像对齐的视觉重新定位的新方法。与之前使用基于特征的公式解决问题的工作相比，所提出的方法不依赖于特征匹配和 RANSAC。因此，该方法不仅可以利用角点，还可以利用图像中具有梯度的任何区域。特别是，我们提出了一种受经典 Levenberg-Marquardt 算法启发的损失公式来训练 LM-Net。学习到的特征显着提高了直接图像对齐的鲁棒性，特别是在不同条件下的重新定位。为了进一步提高 LM-Net 针对大图像基线的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种姿态估计网络 CorrPoseNet，它可以回归相对姿态以引导直接图像对齐。对 CARLA 和 Oxford RobotCar 重定位跟踪基准的评估表明，我们的方法比以前最先进的方法提供了更准确的结果，同时在稳健性方面具有可比性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LM-Reloc方法，基于直接图像对齐实现视觉重定位，无需特征匹配和RANSAC。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖特征匹配和RANSAC，限制了图像梯度信息的利用，导致在复杂条件下鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计受Levenberg-Marquardt算法启发的损失函数训练LM-Net，并引入CorrPoseNet网络回归相对位姿以提升直接对齐鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CARLA和Oxford RobotCar基准测试中，该方法在定位精度上优于现有最佳方法，且鲁棒性表现相当。
AI.conclusion: LM-Reloc通过直接图像对齐和位姿回归网络，有效提升了视觉重定位的精度与跨条件适应能力。

authors_text: Marko Bjelonic,Ruben Grandia,Oliver Harley,Cla Galliard,Samuel Zimmermann,Marco Hutter
title: Whole-Body MPC and Online Gait Sequence Generation for Wheeled-Legged Robots
title_zh: 轮腿机器人的全身 MPC 和在线步态序列生成
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 1 table, 52 references, 9 equations
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 1 table, 52 references, 9 equations
abstract: Our paper proposes a model predictive controller as a single-task formulation that simultaneously optimizes wheel and torso motions. This online joint velocity and ground reaction force optimization integrates a kinodynamic model of a wheeled quadrupedal robot. It defines the single rigid body dynamics along with the robot's kinematics while treating the wheels as moving ground contacts. With this approach, we can accurately capture the robot's rolling constraint and dynamics, enabling automatic discovery of hybrid maneuvers without needless motion heuristics. The formulation's generality through the simultaneous optimization over the robot's whole-body variables allows for a single set of parameters and makes online gait sequence adaptation possible. Aperiodic gait sequences are automatically found through kinematic leg utilities without the need for predefined contact and lift-off timings, reducing the cost of transport by up to 85%. Our experiments demonstrate dynamic motions on a quadrupedal robot with non-steerable wheels in challenging indoor and outdoor environments. The paper's findings contribute to evaluating a decomposed, i.e., sequential optimization of wheel and torso motion, and single-task motion planner with a novel quantity, the prediction error, which describes how well a receding horizon planner can predict the robot's future state. To this end, we report an improvement of up to 71% using our proposed single-task approach, making fast locomotion feasible and revealing wheeled-legged robots' full potential.
summary: Our paper proposes a model predictive controller as a single-task formulation that simultaneously optimizes wheel and torso motions. This online joint velocity and ground reaction force optimization integrates a kinodynamic model of a wheeled quadrupedal robot. It defines the single rigid body dynamics along with the robot's kinematics while treating the wheels as moving ground contacts. With this approach, we can accurately capture the robot's rolling constraint and dynamics, enabling automatic discovery of hybrid maneuvers without needless motion heuristics. The formulation's generality through the simultaneous optimization over the robot's whole-body variables allows for a single set of parameters and makes online gait sequence adaptation possible. Aperiodic gait sequences are automatically found through kinematic leg utilities without the need for predefined contact and lift-off timings, reducing the cost of transport by up to 85%. Our experiments demonstrate dynamic motions on a quadrupedal robot with non-steerable wheels in challenging indoor and outdoor environments. The paper's findings contribute to evaluating a decomposed, i.e., sequential optimization of wheel and torso motion, and single-task motion planner with a novel quantity, the prediction error, which describes how well a receding horizon planner can predict the robot's future state. To this end, we report an improvement of up to 71% using our proposed single-task approach, making fast locomotion feasible and revealing wheeled-legged robots' full potential.
abstract_zh: 我们的论文提出了一种模型预测控制器作为单任务公式，可同时优化车轮和躯干运动。这种在线关节速度和地面反作用力优化集成了轮式四足机器人的运动动力学模型。它定义了单个刚体动力学以及机器人的运动学，同时将轮子视为移动的地面接触。通过这种方法，我们可以准确地捕获机器人的滚动约束和动力学，从而能够自动发现混合动作，而无需不必要的运动启发法。通过同时优化机器人的全身变量，该公式具有通用性，允许使用一组参数，并使在线步态序列适应成为可能。通过腿部运动实用程序自动找到非周期性步态序列，无需预定义接触和抬起时间，从而将运输成本降低高达 85%。我们的实验演示了具有不可转向轮的四足机器人在具有挑战性的室内和室外环境中的动态运动。该论文的研究结果有助于评估分解的（即轮子和躯干运动的顺序优化）以及具有新量（预测误差）的单任务运动规划器，该量描述了后退地平线规划器预测机器人未来状态的能力。为此，我们报告使用我们提出的单任务方法提高了高达 71%，使快速运动变得可行并揭示了轮腿机器人的全部潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对轮腿机器人的全身模型预测控制器（MPC），通过在线优化轮子和躯干运动，实现动态步态序列生成。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将轮子与躯干运动分离控制，导致效率低下且难以适应复杂环境，需开发统一优化框架以提升轮腿机器人机动性与能耗效率。
AI.method: 基于轮腿机器人运动学与动力学模型，设计单任务MPC同时优化全身关节速度与地面反作用力，通过运动学腿效用自动发现非周期步态，无需预设接触时序。
AI.result: 实验显示运输能耗降低85%，预测误差提升71%，成功实现非转向轮机器人在室内外复杂环境的动态运动。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统一优化框架验证了轮腿机器人全身控制潜力，为高效自适应移动提供了新思路。

authors_text: Akiyoshi Kurobe,Yoshikatsu Nakajima,Hideo Saito,Kris Kitani
title: Audio-Visual Self-Supervised Terrain Type Discovery for Mobile Platforms
title_zh: 移动平台的视听自监督地形类型发现
abstract: The ability to both recognize and discover terrain characteristics is an important function required for many autonomous ground robots such as social robots, assistive robots, autonomous vehicles, and ground exploration robots. Recognizing and discovering terrain characteristics is challenging because similar terrains may have very different appearances (e.g., carpet comes in many colors), while terrains with very similar appearance may have very different physical properties (e.g. mulch versus dirt). In order to address the inherent ambiguity in vision-based terrain recognition and discovery, we propose a multi-modal self-supervised learning technique that switches between audio features extracted from a mic attached to the underside of a mobile platform and image features extracted by a camera on the platform to cluster terrain types. The terrain cluster labels are then used to train an image-based convolutional neural network to predict changes in terrain types. Through experiments, we demonstrate that the proposed self-supervised terrain type discovery method achieves over 80% accuracy, which greatly outperforms several baselines and suggests strong potential for assistive applications.
summary: The ability to both recognize and discover terrain characteristics is an important function required for many autonomous ground robots such as social robots, assistive robots, autonomous vehicles, and ground exploration robots. Recognizing and discovering terrain characteristics is challenging because similar terrains may have very different appearances (e.g., carpet comes in many colors), while terrains with very similar appearance may have very different physical properties (e.g. mulch versus dirt). In order to address the inherent ambiguity in vision-based terrain recognition and discovery, we propose a multi-modal self-supervised learning technique that switches between audio features extracted from a mic attached to the underside of a mobile platform and image features extracted by a camera on the platform to cluster terrain types. The terrain cluster labels are then used to train an image-based convolutional neural network to predict changes in terrain types. Through experiments, we demonstrate that the proposed self-supervised terrain type discovery method achieves over 80% accuracy, which greatly outperforms several baselines and suggests strong potential for assistive applications.
abstract_zh: 识别和发现地形特征的能力是许多自主地面机器人（例如社交机器人、辅助机器人、自主车辆和地面探索机器人）所需的重要功能。识别和发现地形特征具有挑战性，因为相似的地形可能具有非常不同的外观（例如，地毯有多种颜色），而外观非常相似的地形可能具有非常不同的物理特性（例如，覆盖物与泥土）。为了解决基于视觉的地形识别和发现中固有的模糊性，我们提出了一种多模态自监督学习技术，该技术可以在从连接到移动平台底部的麦克风提取的音频特征和由平台上的摄像头提取的图像特征之间切换，以聚类地形类型。然后，地形聚类标签用于训练基于图像的卷积神经网络来预测地形类型的变化。通过实验，我们证明了所提出的自监督地形类型发现方法的准确率超过 80%，大大优于几个基线，并表明辅助应用具有强大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态自监督学习方法，结合音频和视觉信息实现移动平台的地形类型发现。
AI.motivation: 视觉识别地形存在歧义，相似地形可能有不同外观或物理特性，需融合多模态信息提升识别准确性。
AI.method: 通过麦克风采集底部音频特征与摄像头图像特征，采用多模态自监督学习聚类地形类型，并训练CNN预测地形变化。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法准确率超过80%，显著优于多个基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模态自监督方法有效解决地形识别歧义，具有辅助机器人等应用的潜力。
