authors_text: Shixiang Feng,Beibei Liu,Ya Zhang,Xiaoyun Zhang,Yuehua Li
title: Two-Stream Compare and Contrast Network for Vertebral Compression Fracture Diagnosis
title_zh: 用于椎体压缩骨折诊断的双流比较网络
comment: submitted to TMI
comments: submitted to TMI
abstract: Differentiating Vertebral Compression Fractures (VCFs) associated with trauma and osteoporosis (benign VCFs) or those caused by metastatic cancer (malignant VCFs) are critically important for treatment decisions. So far, automatic VCFs diagnosis is solved in a two-step manner, i.e. first identify VCFs and then classify it into benign or malignant. In this paper, we explore to model VCFs diagnosis as a three-class classification problem, i.e. normal vertebrae, benign VCFs, and malignant VCFs. However, VCFs recognition and classification require very different features, and both tasks are characterized by high intra-class variation and high inter-class similarity. Moreover, the dataset is extremely class-imbalanced. To address the above challenges, we propose a novel Two-Stream Compare and Contrast Network (TSCCN) for VCFs diagnosis. This network consists of two streams, a recognition stream which learns to identify VCFs through comparing and contrasting between adjacent vertebra, and a classification stream which compares and contrasts between intra-class and inter-class to learn features for fine-grained classification. The two streams are integrated via a learnable weight control module which adaptively sets their contribution. The TSCCN is evaluated on a dataset consisting of 239 VCFs patients and achieves the average sensitivity and specificity of 92.56\% and 96.29\%, respectively.
summary: Differentiating Vertebral Compression Fractures (VCFs) associated with trauma and osteoporosis (benign VCFs) or those caused by metastatic cancer (malignant VCFs) are critically important for treatment decisions. So far, automatic VCFs diagnosis is solved in a two-step manner, i.e. first identify VCFs and then classify it into benign or malignant. In this paper, we explore to model VCFs diagnosis as a three-class classification problem, i.e. normal vertebrae, benign VCFs, and malignant VCFs. However, VCFs recognition and classification require very different features, and both tasks are characterized by high intra-class variation and high inter-class similarity. Moreover, the dataset is extremely class-imbalanced. To address the above challenges, we propose a novel Two-Stream Compare and Contrast Network (TSCCN) for VCFs diagnosis. This network consists of two streams, a recognition stream which learns to identify VCFs through comparing and contrasting between adjacent vertebra, and a classification stream which compares and contrasts between intra-class and inter-class to learn features for fine-grained classification. The two streams are integrated via a learnable weight control module which adaptively sets their contribution. The TSCCN is evaluated on a dataset consisting of 239 VCFs patients and achieves the average sensitivity and specificity of 92.56\% and 96.29\%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 区分与创伤和骨质疏松症相关的椎体压缩性骨折 (VCF)（良性 VCF）或由转移性癌症引起的椎体压缩性骨折（恶性 VCF）对于治疗决策至关重要。到目前为止，VCF的自动诊断是通过两步方式解决的，即首先识别VCF，然后将其分类为良性或恶性。在本文中，我们探索将 VCF 诊断建模为三类分类问题，即正常椎骨、良性 VCF 和恶性 VCF。然而，VCF 识别和分类需要非常不同的特征，并且这两个任务都具有高类内变异和高类间相似性的特点。此外，数据集的类别极其不平衡。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种用于 VCF 诊断的新型双流比较和对比网络（TSCCN）。该网络由两个流组成，一个是识别流，通过相邻椎骨之间的比较和对比来学习识别 VCF，另一个是分类流，通过在类内和类间之间进行比较和对比来学习细粒度分类的特征。这两个流通过可学习的权重控制模块集成，该模块自适应地设置它们的贡献。 TSCCN 在由 239 名 VCF 患者组成的数据集上进行评估，平均灵敏度和特异性分别为 92.56% 和 96.29%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双流对比网络（TSCCN），用于将椎体压缩性骨折（VCF）诊断建模为三分类问题（正常、良性、恶性），以改进传统两步诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 传统VCF诊断需分两步进行（先识别再分类），但存在类间不平衡、特征差异大等问题，需直接建模三分类任务以提升诊断准确性。
AI.method: 设计双流网络：识别流通过相邻椎体对比学习VCF识别，分类流通过类内/类间对比学习细粒度特征，结合可学习权重模块动态整合两流输出。
AI.result: 在239例VCF患者数据集上达到平均灵敏度92.56%和特异度96.29%。
AI.conclusion: TSCCN通过双流对比机制有效解决了VCF诊断中的类不平衡和特征差异问题，优于传统两步方法。

search_text: Two-Stream Compare and Contrast Network for Vertebral Compression Fracture Diagnosis 用于椎体压缩骨折诊断的双流比较网络 Differentiating Vertebral Compression Fractures (VCFs) associated with trauma and osteoporosis (benign VCFs) or those caused by metastatic cancer (malignant VCFs) are critically important for treatment decisions. So far, automatic VCFs diagnosis is solved in a two-step manner, i.e. first identify VCFs and then classify it into benign or malignant. In this paper, we explore to model VCFs diagnosis as a three-class classification problem, i.e. normal vertebrae, benign VCFs, and malignant VCFs. However, VCFs recognition and classification require very different features, and both tasks are characterized by high intra-class variation and high inter-class similarity. Moreover, the dataset is extremely class-imbalanced. To address the above challenges, we propose a novel Two-Stream Compare and Contrast Network (TSCCN) for VCFs diagnosis. This network consists of two streams, a recognition stream which learns to identify VCFs through comparing and contrasting between adjacent vertebra, and a classification stream which compares and contrasts between intra-class and inter-class to learn features for fine-grained classification. The two streams are integrated via a learnable weight control module which adaptively sets their contribution. The TSCCN is evaluated on a dataset consisting of 239 VCFs patients and achieves the average sensitivity and specificity of 92.56\% and 96.29\%, respectively. 区分与创伤和骨质疏松症相关的椎体压缩性骨折 (VCF)（良性 VCF）或由转移性癌症引起的椎体压缩性骨折（恶性 VCF）对于治疗决策至关重要。到目前为止，VCF的自动诊断是通过两步方式解决的，即首先识别VCF，然后将其分类为良性或恶性。在本文中，我们探索将 VCF 诊断建模为三类分类问题，即正常椎骨、良性 VCF 和恶性 VCF。然而，VCF 识别和分类需要非常不同的特征，并且这两个任务都具有高类内变异和高类间相似性的特点。此外，数据集的类别极其不平衡。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种用于 VCF 诊断的新型双流比较和对比网络（TSCCN）。该网络由两个流组成，一个是识别流，通过相邻椎骨之间的比较和对比来学习识别 VCF，另一个是分类流，通过在类内和类间之间进行比较和对比来学习细粒度分类的特征。这两个流通过可学习的权重控制模块集成，该模块自适应地设置它们的贡献。 TSCCN 在由 239 名 VCF 患者组成的数据集上进行评估，平均灵敏度和特异性分别为 92.56% 和 96.29%。 本文提出一种双流对比网络（TSCCN），用于将椎体压缩性骨折（VCF）诊断建模为三分类问题（正常、良性、恶性），以改进传统两步诊断方法。 Shixiang Feng,Beibei Liu,Ya Zhang,Xiaoyun Zhang,Yuehua Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Anubhav Garg,Amit Kumar Saha,Debo Dutta
title: Direct Federated Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 直接联合神经架构搜索
comment: Under Review
comments: Under Review
abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) is a collection of methods to craft the way neural networks are built. We apply this idea to Federated Learning (FL), wherein predefined neural network models are trained on the client/device data. This approach is not optimal as the model developers can't observe the local data, and hence, are unable to build highly accurate and efficient models. NAS is promising for FL which can search for global and personalized models automatically for the non-IID data. Most NAS methods are computationally expensive and require fine-tuning after the search, making it a two-stage complex process with possible human intervention. Thus there is a need for end-to-end NAS which can run on the heterogeneous data and resource distribution typically seen in the FL scenario. In this paper, we present an effective approach for direct federated NAS which is hardware agnostic, computationally lightweight, and a one-stage method to search for ready-to-deploy neural network models. Our results show an order of magnitude reduction in resource consumption while edging out prior art in accuracy. This opens up a window of opportunity to create optimized and computationally efficient federated learning systems.
summary: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) is a collection of methods to craft the way neural networks are built. We apply this idea to Federated Learning (FL), wherein predefined neural network models are trained on the client/device data. This approach is not optimal as the model developers can't observe the local data, and hence, are unable to build highly accurate and efficient models. NAS is promising for FL which can search for global and personalized models automatically for the non-IID data. Most NAS methods are computationally expensive and require fine-tuning after the search, making it a two-stage complex process with possible human intervention. Thus there is a need for end-to-end NAS which can run on the heterogeneous data and resource distribution typically seen in the FL scenario. In this paper, we present an effective approach for direct federated NAS which is hardware agnostic, computationally lightweight, and a one-stage method to search for ready-to-deploy neural network models. Our results show an order of magnitude reduction in resource consumption while edging out prior art in accuracy. This opens up a window of opportunity to create optimized and computationally efficient federated learning systems.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 是构建神经网络的方法的集合。我们将这个想法应用于联邦学习（FL），其中预定义的神经网络模型是在客户端/设备数据上进行训练的。这种方法并不是最佳的，因为模型开发人员无法观察本地数据，因此无法构建高度准确和高效的模型。 NAS 对于 FL 来说是有前途的，它可以为非 IID 数据自动搜索全局和个性化模型。大多数 NAS 方法的计算成本很高，并且需要在搜索后进行微调，这使其成为一个两阶段的复杂过程，可能需要人工干预。因此，需要能够在 FL 场景中常见的异构数据和资源分布上运行的端到端 NAS。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的直接联合 NAS 方法，该方法与硬件无关、计算量轻，并且是一种搜索可立即部署的神经网络模型的单阶段方法。我们的结果表明，资源消耗减少了一个数量级，同时在准确性方面超越了现有技术。这为创建优化且计算高效的联邦学习系统打开了机会之窗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种直接联邦神经网络架构搜索方法，旨在解决联邦学习中模型开发受限于无法观察本地数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习中预定义模型因无法获取本地数据而效率低下，现有NAS方法计算成本高且需多阶段调优，难以适应联邦学习的异构环境。
AI.method: 设计一种硬件无关、计算轻量的端到端联邦NAS框架，直接在非独立同分布数据上搜索全局与个性化模型，无需额外调优阶段。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在资源消耗上减少一个数量级，同时在准确率上超越现有联邦NAS方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建高效、优化的联邦学习系统提供了可行路径，推动NAS与FL的深度融合应用。

authors_text: Beren Millidge,Alexander Tschantz,Anil Seth,Christopher L Buckley
title: Investigating the Scalability and Biological Plausibility of the Activation Relaxation Algorithm
title_zh: 研究激活松弛算法的可扩展性和生物学合理性
comment: 13/10/20 initial upload
comments: 13/10/20 initial upload
abstract: The recently proposed Activation Relaxation (AR) algorithm provides a simple and robust approach for approximating the backpropagation of error algorithm using only local learning rules. Unlike competing schemes, it converges to the exact backpropagation gradients, and utilises only a single type of computational unit and a single backwards relaxation phase. We have previously shown that the algorithm can be further simplified and made more biologically plausible by (i) introducing a learnable set of backwards weights, which overcomes the weight-transport problem, and (ii) avoiding the computation of nonlinear derivatives at each neuron. However, tthe efficacy of these simplifications has, so far, only been tested on simple multi-layer-perceptron (MLP) networks. Here, we show that these simplifications still maintain performance using more complex CNN architectures and challenging datasets, which have proven difficult for other biologically-plausible schemes to scale to. We also investigate whether another biologically implausible assumption of the original AR algorithm -- the frozen feedforward pass -- can be relaxed without damaging performance.
summary: The recently proposed Activation Relaxation (AR) algorithm provides a simple and robust approach for approximating the backpropagation of error algorithm using only local learning rules. Unlike competing schemes, it converges to the exact backpropagation gradients, and utilises only a single type of computational unit and a single backwards relaxation phase. We have previously shown that the algorithm can be further simplified and made more biologically plausible by (i) introducing a learnable set of backwards weights, which overcomes the weight-transport problem, and (ii) avoiding the computation of nonlinear derivatives at each neuron. However, tthe efficacy of these simplifications has, so far, only been tested on simple multi-layer-perceptron (MLP) networks. Here, we show that these simplifications still maintain performance using more complex CNN architectures and challenging datasets, which have proven difficult for other biologically-plausible schemes to scale to. We also investigate whether another biologically implausible assumption of the original AR algorithm -- the frozen feedforward pass -- can be relaxed without damaging performance.
abstract_zh: 最近提出的激活松弛（AR）算法提供了一种简单而鲁棒的方法，仅使用局部学习规则来近似误差算法的反向传播。与竞争方案不同，它收敛到精确的反向传播梯度，并且仅利用单一类型的计算单元和单一的向后弛豫阶段。我们之前已经表明，通过（i）引入一组可学习的向后权重，克服权重传输问题，以及（ii）避免在每个神经元处计算非线性导数，可以进一步简化该算法并使其在生物学上更加合理。然而，到目前为止，这些简化的效果仅在简单的多层感知器（MLP）网络上进行了测试。在这里，我们表明，使用更复杂的 CNN 架构和具有挑战性的数据集，这些简化仍然可以保持性能，而事实证明，其他生物学上可行的方案很难扩展到这些数据集。我们还研究了原始 AR 算法的另一个生物学上不可信的假设——冻结前馈传递——是否可以在不损害性能的情况下放松。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了激活松弛算法（AR）的可扩展性与生物合理性，通过简化后的AR算法在复杂卷积神经网络（CNN）和挑战性数据集上的表现，并探讨了放松原始算法中冻结前向传递假设的可行性。
AI.motivation: 尽管AR算法在简单多层感知机（MLP）上表现出色，但其简化版本在复杂模型中的有效性尚未验证，且原始算法仍依赖不具生物合理性的冻结前向传递假设。
AI.method: 将简化后的AR算法应用于复杂CNN架构和挑战性数据集，同时测试放松冻结前向传递假设对性能的影响。
AI.result: 简化后的AR算法在复杂CNN和数据集上保持性能，且放松冻结前向传递假设未损害效果，表明其具备更好的生物合理性。
AI.conclusion: AR算法的简化版本可有效扩展至复杂模型，且无需冻结前向传递假设，增强了其生物合理性与实用性。

result: 简化后的AR算法在复杂CNN和数据集上保持性能，且放松冻结前向传递假设未损害效果，表明其具备更好的生物合理性。
conclusion: AR算法的简化版本可有效扩展至复杂模型，且无需冻结前向传递假设，增强了其生物合理性与实用性。
search_text: Investigating the Scalability and Biological Plausibility of the Activation Relaxation Algorithm 研究激活松弛算法的可扩展性和生物学合理性 The recently proposed Activation Relaxation (AR) algorithm provides a simple and robust approach for approximating the backpropagation of error algorithm using only local learning rules. Unlike competing schemes, it converges to the exact backpropagation gradients, and utilises only a single type of computational unit and a single backwards relaxation phase. We have previously shown that the algorithm can be further simplified and made more biologically plausible by (i) introducing a learnable set of backwards weights, which overcomes the weight-transport problem, and (ii) avoiding the computation of nonlinear derivatives at each neuron. However, tthe efficacy of these simplifications has, so far, only been tested on simple multi-layer-perceptron (MLP) networks. Here, we show that these simplifications still maintain performance using more complex CNN architectures and challenging datasets, which have proven difficult for other biologically-plausible schemes to scale to. We also investigate whether another biologically implausible assumption of the original AR algorithm -- the frozen feedforward pass -- can be relaxed without damaging performance. 最近提出的激活松弛（AR）算法提供了一种简单而鲁棒的方法，仅使用局部学习规则来近似误差算法的反向传播。与竞争方案不同，它收敛到精确的反向传播梯度，并且仅利用单一类型的计算单元和单一的向后弛豫阶段。我们之前已经表明，通过（i）引入一组可学习的向后权重，克服权重传输问题，以及（ii）避免在每个神经元处计算非线性导数，可以进一步简化该算法并使其在生物学上更加合理。然而，到目前为止，这些简化的效果仅在简单的多层感知器（MLP）网络上进行了测试。在这里，我们表明，使用更复杂的 CNN 架构和具有挑战性的数据集，这些简化仍然可以保持性能，而事实证明，其他生物学上可行的方案很难扩展到这些数据集。我们还研究了原始 AR 算法的另一个生物学上不可信的假设——冻结前馈传递——是否可以在不损害性能的情况下放松。 本文研究了激活松弛算法（AR）的可扩展性与生物合理性，通过简化后的AR算法在复杂卷积神经网络（CNN）和挑战性数据集上的表现，并探讨了放松原始算法中冻结前向传递假设的可行性。 Beren Millidge,Alexander Tschantz,Anil Seth,Christopher L Buckley cs.AI,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Simon Jenni,Paolo Favaro
title: Self-Supervised Multi-View Synchronization Learning for 3D Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于 3D 姿态估计的自监督多视图同步学习
comment: ACCV 2020 (oral)
comments: ACCV 2020 (oral)
abstract: Current state-of-the-art methods cast monocular 3D human pose estimation as a learning problem by training neural networks on large data sets of images and corresponding skeleton poses. In contrast, we propose an approach that can exploit small annotated data sets by fine-tuning networks pre-trained via self-supervised learning on (large) unlabeled data sets. To drive such networks towards supporting 3D pose estimation during the pre-training step, we introduce a novel self-supervised feature learning task designed to focus on the 3D structure in an image. We exploit images extracted from videos captured with a multi-view camera system. The task is to classify whether two images depict two views of the same scene up to a rigid transformation. In a multi-view data set, where objects deform in a non-rigid manner, a rigid transformation occurs only between two views taken at the exact same time, i.e., when they are synchronized. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the synchronization task on the Human3.6M data set and achieve state-of-the-art results in 3D human pose estimation.
summary: Current state-of-the-art methods cast monocular 3D human pose estimation as a learning problem by training neural networks on large data sets of images and corresponding skeleton poses. In contrast, we propose an approach that can exploit small annotated data sets by fine-tuning networks pre-trained via self-supervised learning on (large) unlabeled data sets. To drive such networks towards supporting 3D pose estimation during the pre-training step, we introduce a novel self-supervised feature learning task designed to focus on the 3D structure in an image. We exploit images extracted from videos captured with a multi-view camera system. The task is to classify whether two images depict two views of the same scene up to a rigid transformation. In a multi-view data set, where objects deform in a non-rigid manner, a rigid transformation occurs only between two views taken at the exact same time, i.e., when they are synchronized. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the synchronization task on the Human3.6M data set and achieve state-of-the-art results in 3D human pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 当前最先进的方法通过在大数据集图像和相应的骨架姿势上训练神经网络，将单眼 3D 人体姿势估计视为一个学习问题。相比之下，我们提出了一种方法，可以通过对（大型）未标记数据集进行自我监督学习来微调预先训练的网络，从而利用小型注释数据集。为了在预训练步骤中推动此类网络支持 3D 姿态估计，我们引入了一种新颖的自监督特征学习任务，旨在关注图像中的 3D 结构。我们利用从多视图相机系统捕获的视频中提取的图像。任务是对两个图像是否描绘同一场景的两个视图进行分类，直至进行严格的变换。在多视图数据集中，对象以非刚性方式变形，刚性变换仅发生在同时拍摄的两个视图之间，即当它们同步时。我们在 Human3.6M 数据集上展示了同步任务的有效性，并在 3D 人体姿态估计中取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督多视图同步学习方法，用于改进3D人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的方法依赖于大量标注数据训练神经网络进行单目3D人体姿态估计，但标注数据获取成本高。本文旨在利用小规模标注数据集，通过在大规模未标注数据集上进行自监督预训练来提升模型性能。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种新的自监督特征学习任务，通过多视图摄像头系统捕获的视频图像，判断两幅图像是否为同一场景在同步时间下的不同视角。该任务聚焦于图像中的3D结构，从而在预训练阶段驱动网络学习对3D姿态估计有用的特征。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M数据集上验证了同步任务的有效性，并在3D人体姿态估计任务中取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过自监督多视图同步学习，可以在小规模标注数据集上实现高质量的3D人体姿态估计，有效减少了对大规模标注数据的依赖。

authors_text: Congqi Cao,Yajuan Li,Qinyi Lv,Peng Wang,Yanning Zhang
title: Few-shot Action Recognition with Implicit Temporal Alignment and Pair Similarity Optimization
title_zh: 具有隐式时间对齐和对相似性优化的少镜头动作识别
abstract: Few-shot learning aims to recognize instances from novel classes with few labeled samples, which has great value in research and application. Although there has been a lot of work in this area recently, most of the existing work is based on image classification tasks. Video-based few-shot action recognition has not been explored well and remains challenging: 1) the differences of implementation details among different papers make a fair comparison difficult; 2) the wide variations and misalignment of temporal sequences make the video-level similarity comparison difficult; 3) the scarcity of labeled data makes the optimization difficult. To solve these problems, this paper presents 1) a specific setting to evaluate the performance of few-shot action recognition algorithms; 2) an implicit sequence-alignment algorithm for better video-level similarity comparison; 3) an advanced loss for few-shot learning to optimize pair similarity with limited data. Specifically, we propose a novel few-shot action recognition framework that uses long short-term memory following 3D convolutional layers for sequence modeling and alignment. Circle loss is introduced to maximize the within-class similarity and minimize the between-class similarity flexibly towards a more definite convergence target. Instead of using random or ambiguous experimental settings, we set a concrete criterion analogous to the standard image-based few-shot learning setting for few-shot action recognition evaluation. Extensive experiments on two datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Few-shot learning aims to recognize instances from novel classes with few labeled samples, which has great value in research and application. Although there has been a lot of work in this area recently, most of the existing work is based on image classification tasks. Video-based few-shot action recognition has not been explored well and remains challenging: 1) the differences of implementation details among different papers make a fair comparison difficult; 2) the wide variations and misalignment of temporal sequences make the video-level similarity comparison difficult; 3) the scarcity of labeled data makes the optimization difficult. To solve these problems, this paper presents 1) a specific setting to evaluate the performance of few-shot action recognition algorithms; 2) an implicit sequence-alignment algorithm for better video-level similarity comparison; 3) an advanced loss for few-shot learning to optimize pair similarity with limited data. Specifically, we propose a novel few-shot action recognition framework that uses long short-term memory following 3D convolutional layers for sequence modeling and alignment. Circle loss is introduced to maximize the within-class similarity and minimize the between-class similarity flexibly towards a more definite convergence target. Instead of using random or ambiguous experimental settings, we set a concrete criterion analogous to the standard image-based few-shot learning setting for few-shot action recognition evaluation. Extensive experiments on two datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: Few-shot Learning旨在识别新类别中标记样本较少的实例，具有巨大的研究和应用价值。尽管最近这方面已经有很多工作，但现有的大部分工作都是基于图像分类任务。基于视频的少镜头动作识别尚未得到很好的探索，仍然具有挑战性：1）不同论文之间实现细节的差异使得公平比较变得困难； 2）时间序列的广泛变化和错位使得视频级相似性比较变得困难； 3）标记数据的稀缺使得优化变得困难。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了1）评估少样本动作识别算法性能的特定设置； 2）隐式序列对齐算法，用于更好的视频级相似性比较； 3）少样本学习的高级损失，以利用有限的数据优化配对相似性。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的少镜头动作识别框架，该框架使用 3D 卷积层之后的长短期记忆进行序列建模和对齐。引入圆损失以最大化类内相似度并最小化类间相似度以达到更明确的收敛目标。我们没有使用随机或模糊的实验设置，而是设置了一个类似于用于少镜头动作识别评估的标准基于图像的少镜头学习设置的具体标准。对两个数据集的广泛实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对视频的少样本动作识别框架，通过隐式时间对齐和配对相似度优化解决现有方法在数据稀缺、时间序列对齐困难等问题。
AI.motivation: 视频少样本动作识别面临实现细节差异大、时间序列对齐困难及标注数据稀缺等挑战，现有研究多集中于图像分类任务，缺乏针对视频的有效方法。
AI.method: 设计包含3D卷积和LSTM的序列建模框架，引入Circle Loss优化类内/类间相似度，并设定类似图像少样本学习的评估标准以确保实验公平性。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在少样本动作识别任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过隐式时间对齐、配对相似度优化及标准化评估设置，本文有效提升了视频少样本动作识别的性能与可比性。

Instead of using random or ambiguous experimental settings, we set a concrete criterion analogous to the standard image-based few-shot learning setting for few-shot action recognition evaluation. Extensive experiments on two datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Few-shot Learning旨在识别新类别中标记样本较少的实例，具有巨大的研究和应用价值。尽管最近这方面已经有很多工作，但现有的大部分工作都是基于图像分类任务。基于视频的少镜头动作识别尚未得到很好的探索，仍然具有挑战性：1）不同论文之间实现细节的差异使得公平比较变得困难； 2）时间序列的广泛变化和错位使得视频级相似性比较变得困难； 3）标记数据的稀缺使得优化变得困难。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了1）评估少样本动作识别算法性能的特定设置； 2）隐式序列对齐算法，用于更好的视频级相似性比较； 3）少样本学习的高级损失，以利用有限的数据优化配对相似性。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的少镜头动作识别框架，该框架使用 3D 卷积层之后的长短期记忆进行序列建模和对齐。引入圆损失以最大化类内相似度并最小化类间相似度以达到更明确的收敛目标。我们没有使用随机或模糊的实验设置，而是设置了一个类似于用于少镜头动作识别评估的标准基于图像的少镜头学习设置的具体标准。对两个数据集的广泛实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种针对视频的少样本动作识别框架，通过隐式时间对齐和配对相似度优化解决现有方法在数据稀缺、时间序列对齐困难等问题。 Congqi Cao,Yajuan Li,Qinyi Lv,Peng Wang,Yanning Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Matthew Evanusa,Cornelia Fermüller,Yiannis Aloimonos
title: Deep Reservoir Networks with Learned Hidden Reservoir Weights using Direct Feedback Alignment
title_zh: 使用直接反馈对齐的具有学习隐藏储层权重的深层储层网络
abstract: Deep Reservoir Computing has emerged as a new paradigm for deep learning, which is based around the reservoir computing principle of maintaining random pools of neurons combined with hierarchical deep learning. The reservoir paradigm reflects and respects the high degree of recurrence in biological brains, and the role that neuronal dynamics play in learning. However, one issue hampering deep reservoir network development is that one cannot backpropagate through the reservoir layers. Recent deep reservoir architectures do not learn hidden or hierarchical representations in the same manner as deep artificial neural networks, but rather concatenate all hidden reservoirs together to perform traditional regression. Here we present a novel Deep Reservoir Network for time series prediction and classification that learns through the non-differentiable hidden reservoir layers using a biologically-inspired backpropagation alternative called Direct Feedback Alignment, which resembles global dopamine signal broadcasting in the brain. We demonstrate its efficacy on two real world multidimensional time series datasets.
summary: Deep Reservoir Computing has emerged as a new paradigm for deep learning, which is based around the reservoir computing principle of maintaining random pools of neurons combined with hierarchical deep learning. The reservoir paradigm reflects and respects the high degree of recurrence in biological brains, and the role that neuronal dynamics play in learning. However, one issue hampering deep reservoir network development is that one cannot backpropagate through the reservoir layers. Recent deep reservoir architectures do not learn hidden or hierarchical representations in the same manner as deep artificial neural networks, but rather concatenate all hidden reservoirs together to perform traditional regression. Here we present a novel Deep Reservoir Network for time series prediction and classification that learns through the non-differentiable hidden reservoir layers using a biologically-inspired backpropagation alternative called Direct Feedback Alignment, which resembles global dopamine signal broadcasting in the brain. We demonstrate its efficacy on two real world multidimensional time series datasets.
abstract_zh: 深度存储计算已成为深度学习的新范式，它基于维护随机神经元池的存储计算原理与分层深度学习相结合。储存库范式反映并尊重生物大脑的高度重复性，以及神经元动力学在学习中发挥的作用。然而，阻碍深层储层网络开发的一个问题是无法通过储层进行反向传播。最近的深层储层架构并不以与深层人工神经网络相同的方式学习隐藏或分层表示，而是将所有隐藏储层连接在一起以执行传统的回归。在这里，我们提出了一种用于时间序列预测和分类的新型深层储层网络，该网络使用一种名为“直接反馈对齐”的受生物学启发的反向传播替代方案通过不可微的隐藏储层进行学习，该替代方案类似于大脑中的全局多巴胺信号广播。我们在两个现实世界的多维时间序列数据集上展示了它的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用直接反馈对齐（DFA）机制学习隐藏水库权重的深度水库网络，用于时间序列预测与分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统深度水库网络无法通过水库层进行反向传播，导致无法像人工神经网络一样学习分层表示，只能简单拼接水库进行回归，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 采用生物启发的直接反馈对齐算法替代反向传播，通过模仿大脑多巴胺信号广播机制，实现对非微分隐藏水库层的参数学习。
AI.result: 在两个真实多维时间序列数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，证明其在时序任务中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了深度水库网络的梯度传递难题，为生物启发的神经网络设计提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的时序建模应用。

authors_text: Shujun Wang,Lequan Yu,Kang Li,Xin Yang,Chi-Wing Fu,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: DoFE: Domain-oriented Feature Embedding for Generalizable Fundus Image Segmentation on Unseen Datasets
title_zh: DoFE：面向领域的特征嵌入，用于看不见的数据集上的通用眼底图像分割
comment: Accepted at IEEE-TMI 2020
comments: Accepted at IEEE-TMI 2020
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks have significantly boosted the performance of fundus image segmentation when test datasets have the same distribution as the training datasets. However, in clinical practice, medical images often exhibit variations in appearance for various reasons, e.g., different scanner vendors and image quality. These distribution discrepancies could lead the deep networks to over-fit on the training datasets and lack generalization ability on the unseen test datasets. To alleviate this issue, we present a novel Domain-oriented Feature Embedding (DoFE) framework to improve the generalization ability of CNNs on unseen target domains by exploring the knowledge from multiple source domains. Our DoFE framework dynamically enriches the image features with additional domain prior knowledge learned from multi-source domains to make the semantic features more discriminative. Specifically, we introduce a Domain Knowledge Pool to learn and memorize the prior information extracted from multi-source domains. Then the original image features are augmented with domain-oriented aggregated features, which are induced from the knowledge pool based on the similarity between the input image and multi-source domain images. We further design a novel domain code prediction branch to infer this similarity and employ an attention-guided mechanism to dynamically combine the aggregated features with the semantic features. We comprehensively evaluate our DoFE framework on two fundus image segmentation tasks, including the optic cup and disc segmentation and vessel segmentation. Our DoFE framework generates satisfying segmentation results on unseen datasets and surpasses other domain generalization and network regularization methods.
summary: Deep convolutional neural networks have significantly boosted the performance of fundus image segmentation when test datasets have the same distribution as the training datasets. However, in clinical practice, medical images often exhibit variations in appearance for various reasons, e.g., different scanner vendors and image quality. These distribution discrepancies could lead the deep networks to over-fit on the training datasets and lack generalization ability on the unseen test datasets. To alleviate this issue, we present a novel Domain-oriented Feature Embedding (DoFE) framework to improve the generalization ability of CNNs on unseen target domains by exploring the knowledge from multiple source domains. Our DoFE framework dynamically enriches the image features with additional domain prior knowledge learned from multi-source domains to make the semantic features more discriminative. Specifically, we introduce a Domain Knowledge Pool to learn and memorize the prior information extracted from multi-source domains. Then the original image features are augmented with domain-oriented aggregated features, which are induced from the knowledge pool based on the similarity between the input image and multi-source domain images. We further design a novel domain code prediction branch to infer this similarity and employ an attention-guided mechanism to dynamically combine the aggregated features with the semantic features. We comprehensively evaluate our DoFE framework on two fundus image segmentation tasks, including the optic cup and disc segmentation and vessel segmentation. Our DoFE framework generates satisfying segmentation results on unseen datasets and surpasses other domain generalization and network regularization methods.
abstract_zh: 当测试数据集与训练数据集具有相同的分布时，深度卷积神经网络显着提高了眼底图像分割的性能。然而，在临床实践中，医学图像经常由于各种原因而表现出外观变化，例如不同的扫描仪供应商和图像质量。这些分布差异可能导致深层网络过度拟合训练数据集，并且缺乏对未见过的测试数据集的泛化能力。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的面向领域的特征嵌入（DoFE）框架，通过探索多个源领域的知识来提高 CNN 在未见过的目标领域上的泛化能力。我们的 DoFE 框架通过从多源领域学习到的额外领域先验知识动态丰富图像特征，使语义特征更具辨别力。具体来说，我们引入了领域知识库来学习和记忆从多源领域提取的先验信息。然后，使用面向领域的聚合特征来增强原始图像特征，这些聚合特征是根据输入图像和多源领域图像之间的相似性从知识池中归纳出来的。我们进一步设计了一种新颖的域代码预测分支来推断这种相似性，并采用注意力引导机制来动态地将聚合特征与语义特征相结合。我们在两个眼底图像分割任务上全面评估了我们的 DoFE 框架，包括视杯和视盘分割以及血管分割。我们的 DoFE 框架在看不见的数据集上生成令人满意的分割结果，并超越其他领域泛化和网络正则化方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种领域自适应的特征嵌入框架DoFE，以提高在未见数据集上的视网膜图像分割泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 临床中视网膜图像因设备或质量差异导致分布差异，现有模型在未见数据集上泛化能力不足，需提升模型的跨领域适应性。
AI.method: 通过构建多源领域知识池，动态融合领域先验知识，结合注意力机制增强特征判别性。
AI.result: 在视盘、杯和血管分割任务中，DoFE在未见数据集上表现优于其他领域泛化方法。
AI.conclusion: DoFE通过多源领域知识增强特征，有效提升模型在未见领域的分割泛化能力。

authors_text: He-Liang Huang,Yuxuan Du,Ming Gong,Youwei Zhao,Yulin Wu,Chaoyue Wang,Shaowei Li,Futian Liang,Jin Lin,Yu Xu,Rui Yang,Tongliang Liu,Min-Hsiu Hsieh,Hui Deng,Hao Rong,Cheng-Zhi Peng,Chao-Yang Lu,Yu-Ao Chen,Dacheng Tao,Xiaobo Zhu,Jian-Wei Pan
title: Experimental Quantum Generative Adversarial Networks for Image Generation
title_zh: 用于图像生成的实验性量子生成对抗网络
comment: This work was completed in 2019, and the first version of manuscript was submitted to the journal in January 2020
comments: This work was completed in 2019, and the first version of manuscript was submitted to the journal in January 2020
abstract: Quantum machine learning is expected to be one of the first practical applications of near-term quantum devices. Pioneer theoretical works suggest that quantum generative adversarial networks (GANs) may exhibit a potential exponential advantage over classical GANs, thus attracting widespread attention. However, it remains elusive whether quantum GANs implemented on near-term quantum devices can actually solve real-world learning tasks. Here, we devise a flexible quantum GAN scheme to narrow this knowledge gap, which could accomplish image generation with arbitrarily high-dimensional features, and could also take advantage of quantum superposition to train multiple examples in parallel. For the first time, we experimentally achieve the learning and generation of real-world hand-written digit images on a superconducting quantum processor. Moreover, we utilize a gray-scale bar dataset to exhibit the competitive performance between quantum GANs and the classical GANs based on multilayer perceptron and convolutional neural network architectures, respectively, benchmarked by the Fréchet Distance score. Our work provides guidance for developing advanced quantum generative models on near-term quantum devices and opens up an avenue for exploring quantum advantages in various GAN-related learning tasks.
summary: Quantum machine learning is expected to be one of the first practical applications of near-term quantum devices. Pioneer theoretical works suggest that quantum generative adversarial networks (GANs) may exhibit a potential exponential advantage over classical GANs, thus attracting widespread attention. However, it remains elusive whether quantum GANs implemented on near-term quantum devices can actually solve real-world learning tasks. Here, we devise a flexible quantum GAN scheme to narrow this knowledge gap, which could accomplish image generation with arbitrarily high-dimensional features, and could also take advantage of quantum superposition to train multiple examples in parallel. For the first time, we experimentally achieve the learning and generation of real-world hand-written digit images on a superconducting quantum processor. Moreover, we utilize a gray-scale bar dataset to exhibit the competitive performance between quantum GANs and the classical GANs based on multilayer perceptron and convolutional neural network architectures, respectively, benchmarked by the Fréchet Distance score. Our work provides guidance for developing advanced quantum generative models on near-term quantum devices and opens up an avenue for exploring quantum advantages in various GAN-related learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 量子机器学习预计将成为近期量子设备的首批实际应用之一。先驱理论工作表明，量子生成对抗网络（GAN）可能比经典 GAN 表现出潜在的指数优势，从而引起广泛关注。然而，在近期量子设备上实现的量子 GAN 是否能够真正解决现实世界的学习任务仍然是一个难以捉摸的问题。在这里，我们设计了一种灵活的量子 GAN 方案来缩小这一知识差距，它可以完成具有任意高维特征的图像生成，并且还可以利用量子叠加来并行训练多个示例。我们首次在超导量子处理器上实验性地实现了真实世界手写数字图像的学习和生成。此外，我们利用灰度条数据集来展示量子 GAN 与分别基于多层感知器和卷积神经网络架构的经典 GAN 之间的竞争性能，并以 Fréchet 距离分数为基准。我们的工作为在近期量子设备上开发先进的量子生成模型提供了指导，并为探索各种 GAN 相关学习任务中的量子优势开辟了途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种灵活的量子生成对抗网络（GAN）方案，并首次在超导量子处理器上实现真实手写数字图像的生成与学习，同时通过灰度条数据集对比量子GAN与经典GAN的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管理论研究表明量子GAN可能具有指数级优势，但其在近期内是否能解决实际学习任务仍不清楚，需填补这一知识空白。
AI.method: 设计支持高维特征生成的量子GAN架构，利用量子叠加并行训练多个样本，通过超导量子处理器实现图像生成，并采用Fréchet距离评估量子GAN与经典GAN（基于多层感知机和卷积神经网络）的性能差异。
AI.result: 首次在量子设备上实现手写数字图像生成，灰度条实验显示量子GAN在性能上与经典GAN具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为近期内量子生成模型的开发提供了指导，并为探索量子优势在GAN相关任务中的应用开辟了新方向。

authors_text: Puneet Kumar,Sidharth Jain,Balasubramanian Raman,Partha Pratim Roy,Masakazu Iwamura
title: End-to-end Triplet Loss based Emotion Embedding System for Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 用于语音情感识别的基于端到端三元组损失的情感嵌入系统
comment: Accepted in ICPR 2020
comments: Accepted in ICPR 2020
abstract: In this paper, an end-to-end neural embedding system based on triplet loss and residual learning has been proposed for speech emotion recognition. The proposed system learns the embeddings from the emotional information of the speech utterances. The learned embeddings are used to recognize the emotions portrayed by given speech samples of various lengths. The proposed system implements Residual Neural Network architecture. It is trained using softmax pre-training and triplet loss function. The weights between the fully connected and embedding layers of the trained network are used to calculate the embedding values. The embedding representations of various emotions are mapped onto a hyperplane, and the angles among them are computed using the cosine similarity. These angles are utilized to classify a new speech sample into its appropriate emotion class. The proposed system has demonstrated 91.67% and 64.44% accuracy while recognizing emotions for RAVDESS and IEMOCAP dataset, respectively.
summary: In this paper, an end-to-end neural embedding system based on triplet loss and residual learning has been proposed for speech emotion recognition. The proposed system learns the embeddings from the emotional information of the speech utterances. The learned embeddings are used to recognize the emotions portrayed by given speech samples of various lengths. The proposed system implements Residual Neural Network architecture. It is trained using softmax pre-training and triplet loss function. The weights between the fully connected and embedding layers of the trained network are used to calculate the embedding values. The embedding representations of various emotions are mapped onto a hyperplane, and the angles among them are computed using the cosine similarity. These angles are utilized to classify a new speech sample into its appropriate emotion class. The proposed system has demonstrated 91.67% and 64.44% accuracy while recognizing emotions for RAVDESS and IEMOCAP dataset, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于三元组损失和残差学习的端到端神经嵌入系统，用于语音情感识别。所提出的系统从语音话语的情感信息中学习嵌入。学习到的嵌入用于识别给定的不同长度的语音样本所描绘的情感。所提出的系统实现了残差神经网络架构。它使用softmax预训练和三元组损失函数进行训练。训练网络的全连接层和嵌入层之间的权重用于计算嵌入值。各种情绪的嵌入表示被映射到超平面上，并使用余弦相似度计算它们之间的角度。这些角度用于将新的语音样本分类到其适当的情感类别中。所提出的系统在识别 RAVDESS 和 IEMOCAP 数据集的情绪时的准确率分别为 91.67% 和 64.44%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于三元组损失和残差学习的端到端神经嵌入系统，用于语音情感识别。
AI.motivation: 传统情感识别方法在处理不同长度语音样本和复杂情感分类时存在局限性，需更高效的嵌入学习方法提升准确率。
AI.method: 采用残差神经网络架构，结合softmax预训练和三元组损失函数训练网络，通过全连接层与嵌入层权重计算情感嵌入表示，并利用余弦相似度计算情感类别间的角度进行分类。
AI.result: 在RAVDESS数据集上达到91.67%的识别准确率，在IEMOCAP数据集上达到64.44%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过嵌入空间映射和三元组损失优化，有效提升了语音情感识别性能，验证了方法在跨数据集中的可行性。

authors_text: Luyang Wang,Kai Huang,Jiao Wang,Shengsheng Huang,Jason Dai,Yue Zhuang
title: Context-Aware Drive-thru Recommendation Service at Fast Food Restaurants
title_zh: 快餐店的情境感知得来速推荐服务
comment: 9 pages
comments: 9 pages
abstract: Drive-thru is a popular sales channel in the fast food industry where consumers can make food purchases without leaving their cars. Drive-thru recommendation systems allow restaurants to display food recommendations on the digital menu board as guests are making their orders. Popular recommendation models in eCommerce scenarios rely on user attributes (such as user profiles or purchase history) to generate recommendations, while such information is hard to obtain in the drive-thru use case. Thus, in this paper, we propose a new recommendation model Transformer Cross Transformer (TxT), which exploits the guest order behavior and contextual features (such as location, time, and weather) using Transformer encoders for drive-thru recommendations. Empirical results show that our TxT model achieves superior results in Burger King's drive-thru production environment compared with existing recommendation solutions. In addition, we implement a unified system to run end-to-end big data analytics and deep learning workloads on the same cluster. We find that in practice, maintaining a single big data cluster for the entire pipeline is more efficient and cost-saving. Our recommendation system is not only beneficial for drive-thru scenarios, and it can also be generalized to other customer interaction channels.
summary: Drive-thru is a popular sales channel in the fast food industry where consumers can make food purchases without leaving their cars. Drive-thru recommendation systems allow restaurants to display food recommendations on the digital menu board as guests are making their orders. Popular recommendation models in eCommerce scenarios rely on user attributes (such as user profiles or purchase history) to generate recommendations, while such information is hard to obtain in the drive-thru use case. Thus, in this paper, we propose a new recommendation model Transformer Cross Transformer (TxT), which exploits the guest order behavior and contextual features (such as location, time, and weather) using Transformer encoders for drive-thru recommendations. Empirical results show that our TxT model achieves superior results in Burger King's drive-thru production environment compared with existing recommendation solutions. In addition, we implement a unified system to run end-to-end big data analytics and deep learning workloads on the same cluster. We find that in practice, maintaining a single big data cluster for the entire pipeline is more efficient and cost-saving. Our recommendation system is not only beneficial for drive-thru scenarios, and it can also be generalized to other customer interaction channels.
abstract_zh: 得来速是快餐行业流行的销售渠道，消费者无需离开汽车即可购买食品。得来速推荐系统允许餐厅在客人下订单时在数字菜单板上显示食物推荐。电子商务场景中流行的推荐模型依赖于用户属性（例如用户个人资料或购买历史记录）来生成推荐，而此类信息在得来速用例中很难获取。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的推荐模型 Transformer Cross Transformer (TxT)，它利用 Transformer 编码器来利用客人订单行为和上下文特征（例如位置、时间和天气）来进行得来速推荐。实证结果表明，与现有的推荐解决方案相比，我们的 TxT 模型在汉堡王的得来速生产环境中取得了优异的结果。此外，我们还实施了一个统一的系统，在同一集群上运行端到端大数据分析和深度学习工作负载。我们发现，在实践中，为整个管道维护单个大数据集群更加高效且节省成本。我们的推荐系统不仅有利于得来速场景，而且还可以推广到其他客户交互渠道。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于上下文的 drive-thru 推荐系统，用于快餐店的数字菜单板推荐。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐模型依赖用户属性（如购买历史），但在 drive-thru 场景中难以获取此类信息，需利用上下文特征进行推荐。
AI.method: 设计 Transformer Cross Transformer (TxT) 模型，结合顾客订单行为与地理位置、时间、天气等上下文特征进行推荐。
AI.result: TxT 模型在 Burger King 的 drive-thru 环境中表现优于现有方案，且统一集群系统提升了效率并降低成本。
AI.conclusion: 该推荐系统不仅适用于 drive-thru 场景，还可推广至其他客户交互渠道。

search_text: Context-Aware Drive-thru Recommendation Service at Fast Food Restaurants 快餐店的情境感知得来速推荐服务 Drive-thru is a popular sales channel in the fast food industry where consumers can make food purchases without leaving their cars. Drive-thru recommendation systems allow restaurants to display food recommendations on the digital menu board as guests are making their orders. Popular recommendation models in eCommerce scenarios rely on user attributes (such as user profiles or purchase history) to generate recommendations, while such information is hard to obtain in the drive-thru use case. Thus, in this paper, we propose a new recommendation model Transformer Cross Transformer (TxT), which exploits the guest order behavior and contextual features (such as location, time, and weather) using Transformer encoders for drive-thru recommendations. Empirical results show that our TxT model achieves superior results in Burger King's drive-thru production environment compared with existing recommendation solutions. In addition, we implement a unified system to run end-to-end big data analytics and deep learning workloads on the same cluster. We find that in practice, maintaining a single big data cluster for the entire pipeline is more efficient and cost-saving. Our recommendation system is not only beneficial for drive-thru scenarios, and it can also be generalized to other customer interaction channels. 得来速是快餐行业流行的销售渠道，消费者无需离开汽车即可购买食品。得来速推荐系统允许餐厅在客人下订单时在数字菜单板上显示食物推荐。电子商务场景中流行的推荐模型依赖于用户属性（例如用户个人资料或购买历史记录）来生成推荐，而此类信息在得来速用例中很难获取。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的推荐模型 Transformer Cross Transformer (TxT)，它利用 Transformer 编码器来利用客人订单行为和上下文特征（例如位置、时间和天气）来进行得来速推荐。实证结果表明，与现有的推荐解决方案相比，我们的 TxT 模型在汉堡王的得来速生产环境中取得了优异的结果。此外，我们还实施了一个统一的系统，在同一集群上运行端到端大数据分析和深度学习工作负载。我们发现，在实践中，为整个管道维护单个大数据集群更加高效且节省成本。我们的推荐系统不仅有利于得来速场景，而且还可以推广到其他客户交互渠道。 本文提出了一种基于上下文的 drive-thru 推荐系统，用于快餐店的数字菜单板推荐。 Luyang Wang,Kai Huang,Jiao Wang,Shengsheng Huang,Jason Dai,Yue Zhuang cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Tianqiao Liu,Qiang Fang,Wenbiao Ding,Hang Li,Zhongqin Wu,Zitao Liu
title: Mathematical Word Problem Generation from Commonsense Knowledge Graph and Equations
title_zh: 从常识知识图和方程生成数学应用题
comment: EMNLP'21: The 2021 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing, 2021
comments: EMNLP'21: The 2021 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing, 2021
abstract: There is an increasing interest in the use of mathematical word problem (MWP) generation in educational assessment. Different from standard natural question generation, MWP generation needs to maintain the underlying mathematical operations between quantities and variables, while at the same time ensuring the relevance between the output and the given topic. To address above problem, we develop an end-to-end neural model to generate diverse MWPs in real-world scenarios from commonsense knowledge graph and equations. The proposed model (1) learns both representations from edge-enhanced Levi graphs of symbolic equations and commonsense knowledge; (2) automatically fuses equation and commonsense knowledge information via a self-planning module when generating the MWPs. Experiments on an educational gold-standard set and a large-scale generated MWP set show that our approach is superior on the MWP generation task, and it outperforms the SOTA models in terms of both automatic evaluation metrics, i.e., BLEU-4, ROUGE-L, Self-BLEU, and human evaluation metrics, i.e., equation relevance, topic relevance, and language coherence. To encourage reproducible results, we make our code and MWP dataset public available at \url{https://github.com/tal-ai/MaKE_EMNLP2021}.
summary: There is an increasing interest in the use of mathematical word problem (MWP) generation in educational assessment. Different from standard natural question generation, MWP generation needs to maintain the underlying mathematical operations between quantities and variables, while at the same time ensuring the relevance between the output and the given topic. To address above problem, we develop an end-to-end neural model to generate diverse MWPs in real-world scenarios from commonsense knowledge graph and equations. The proposed model (1) learns both representations from edge-enhanced Levi graphs of symbolic equations and commonsense knowledge; (2) automatically fuses equation and commonsense knowledge information via a self-planning module when generating the MWPs. Experiments on an educational gold-standard set and a large-scale generated MWP set show that our approach is superior on the MWP generation task, and it outperforms the SOTA models in terms of both automatic evaluation metrics, i.e., BLEU-4, ROUGE-L, Self-BLEU, and human evaluation metrics, i.e., equation relevance, topic relevance, and language coherence. To encourage reproducible results, we make our code and MWP dataset public available at \url{https://github.com/tal-ai/MaKE_EMNLP2021}.
abstract_zh: 人们对在教育评估中使用数学应用题（MWP）生成越来越感兴趣。与标准自然问题生成不同，MWP生成需要维护数量和变量之间的底层数学运算，同时确保输出与给定主题之间的相关性。为了解决上述问题，我们开发了一个端到端神经模型，根据常识知识图和方程在现实场景中生成不同的 MWP。所提出的模型（1）从符号方程的边缘增强 Levi 图和常识知识中学习两种表示； （2）在生成MWP时，通过自规划模块自动融合方程和常识知识信息。在教育金标准集和大规模生成 MWP 集上的实验表明，我们的方法在 MWP 生成任务上表现出色，并且在自动评估指标（即 BLEU-4、ROUGE-L、Self-BLEU）和人类评估指标（即方程相关性、主题相关性和语言连贯性）方面优于 SOTA 模型。为了鼓励可重现的结果，我们在 \url{https://github.com/tal-ai/MaKE_EMNLP2021} 公开我们的代码和 MWP 数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于常识知识图谱和方程的数学应用题生成方法，旨在生成符合数学逻辑且与主题相关的多样化题目。
AI.motivation: 传统数学应用题生成方法难以同时保证数学运算的准确性与题目内容的语义相关性，需结合常识知识与方程信息实现更自然的生成。
AI.method: 构建端到端神经网络模型，通过增强边的Levi图提取方程符号表示，结合常识知识图谱，并利用自规划模块融合方程与常识信息生成题目。
AI.result: 在教育标准数据集和大规模生成数据集上均优于现有模型，自动评估指标（BLEU-4、ROUGE-L等）和人工评估指标（方程相关性、语言连贯性等）表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结构化知识融合有效提升了数学应用题生成质量，公开代码与数据集便于复现与进一步研究。

authors_text: Naoki Wake,Machiko Sato,Kazuhiro Sasabuchi,Minako Nakamura,Katsushi Ikeuchi
title: Labeling the Phrases of a Conversational Agent with a Unique Personalized Vocabulary
title_zh: 用独特的个性化词汇标记会话代理的短语
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to and accepted by IEEE/SICE SII 2022. Last updated November 12th, 2021
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to and accepted by IEEE/SICE SII 2022. Last updated November 12th, 2021
abstract: Mapping spoken text to gestures is an important research topic for robots with conversation capabilities. According to studies on human co-speech gestures, a reasonable solution for mapping is using a concept-based approach in which a text is first mapped to a semantic cluster (i.e., a concept) containing texts with similar meanings. Subsequently, each concept is mapped to a predefined gesture. By using a concept-based approach, this paper discusses the practical issue of obtaining concepts for a unique vocabulary personalized for a conversational agent. Using Microsoft Rinna as an agent, we qualitatively compare concepts obtained automatically through a natural language processing (NLP) approach to those obtained manually through a sociological approach. We then identify three limitations of the NLP approach: at the semantic level with emojis and symbols; at the semantic level with slang, new words, and buzzwords; and at the pragmatic level. We attribute these limitations to the personalized vocabulary of Rinna. A follow-up experiment demonstrates that robot gestures selected using a concept-based approach leave a better impression than randomly selected gestures for the Rinna vocabulary, suggesting the usefulness of a concept-based gesture generation system for personalized vocabularies. This study provides insights into the development of gesture generation systems for conversational agents with personalized vocabularies.
summary: Mapping spoken text to gestures is an important research topic for robots with conversation capabilities. According to studies on human co-speech gestures, a reasonable solution for mapping is using a concept-based approach in which a text is first mapped to a semantic cluster (i.e., a concept) containing texts with similar meanings. Subsequently, each concept is mapped to a predefined gesture. By using a concept-based approach, this paper discusses the practical issue of obtaining concepts for a unique vocabulary personalized for a conversational agent. Using Microsoft Rinna as an agent, we qualitatively compare concepts obtained automatically through a natural language processing (NLP) approach to those obtained manually through a sociological approach. We then identify three limitations of the NLP approach: at the semantic level with emojis and symbols; at the semantic level with slang, new words, and buzzwords; and at the pragmatic level. We attribute these limitations to the personalized vocabulary of Rinna. A follow-up experiment demonstrates that robot gestures selected using a concept-based approach leave a better impression than randomly selected gestures for the Rinna vocabulary, suggesting the usefulness of a concept-based gesture generation system for personalized vocabularies. This study provides insights into the development of gesture generation systems for conversational agents with personalized vocabularies.
abstract_zh: 将语音文本映射到手势是具有对话功能的机器人的一个重要研究课题。根据对人类协同语音手势的研究，映射的合理解决方案是使用基于概念的方法，其中文本首先被映射到包含具有相似含义的文本的语义簇（即概念）。随后，每个概念都被映射到预定义的手势。通过使用基于概念的方法，本文讨论了获取针对对话代理个性化的独特词汇的概念的实际问题。使用 Microsoft Rinna 作为代理，我们对通过自然语言处理 (NLP) 方法自动获得的概念与通过社会学方法手动获得的概念进行定性比较。然后，我们确定了 NLP 方法的三个局限性：在表情符号和符号的语义层面；在语义层面，包括俚语、新词和流行语；并在务实层面。我们将这些限制归因于 Rinna 的个性化词汇。后续实验表明，使用基于概念的方法选择的机器人手势比随机选择的 Rinna 词汇手势留下了更好的印象，这表明基于概念的手势生成系统对于个性化词汇的有用性。这项研究为具有个性化词汇的对话代理的手势生成系统的开发提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何为具有个性化词汇的对话代理标注短语，并通过基于概念的方法将文本映射到手势。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理表情符号、俚语及实用层面存在局限，需探索适用于个性化词汇的更有效手势生成方案。
AI.method: 以Microsoft Rinna为对话代理，对比NLP自动获取概念与人工社会学方法的结果，分析NLP局限性，并通过实验验证概念驱动的手势选择效果。
AI.result: 基于概念的手势选择比随机选择更受用户好评，证明概念驱动方法对个性化词汇的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 概念驱动的手势生成系统可提升个性化对话代理的表现，但需改进NLP在语义及实用层面的局限性。

search_text: Labeling the Phrases of a Conversational Agent with a Unique Personalized Vocabulary 用独特的个性化词汇标记会话代理的短语 Mapping spoken text to gestures is an important research topic for robots with conversation capabilities. According to studies on human co-speech gestures, a reasonable solution for mapping is using a concept-based approach in which a text is first mapped to a semantic cluster (i.e., a concept) containing texts with similar meanings. Subsequently, each concept is mapped to a predefined gesture. By using a concept-based approach, this paper discusses the practical issue of obtaining concepts for a unique vocabulary personalized for a conversational agent. Using Microsoft Rinna as an agent, we qualitatively compare concepts obtained automatically through a natural language processing (NLP) approach to those obtained manually through a sociological approach. We then identify three limitations of the NLP approach: at the semantic level with emojis and symbols; at the semantic level with slang, new words, and buzzwords; and at the pragmatic level. We attribute these limitations to the personalized vocabulary of Rinna. A follow-up experiment demonstrates that robot gestures selected using a concept-based approach leave a better impression than randomly selected gestures for the Rinna vocabulary, suggesting the usefulness of a concept-based gesture generation system for personalized vocabularies. This study provides insights into the development of gesture generation systems for conversational agents with personalized vocabularies. 将语音文本映射到手势是具有对话功能的机器人的一个重要研究课题。根据对人类协同语音手势的研究，映射的合理解决方案是使用基于概念的方法，其中文本首先被映射到包含具有相似含义的文本的语义簇（即概念）。随后，每个概念都被映射到预定义的手势。通过使用基于概念的方法，本文讨论了获取针对对话代理个性化的独特词汇的概念的实际问题。使用 Microsoft Rinna 作为代理，我们对通过自然语言处理 (NLP) 方法自动获得的概念与通过社会学方法手动获得的概念进行定性比较。然后，我们确定了 NLP 方法的三个局限性：在表情符号和符号的语义层面；在语义层面，包括俚语、新词和流行语；并在务实层面。我们将这些限制归因于 Rinna 的个性化词汇。后续实验表明，使用基于概念的方法选择的机器人手势比随机选择的 Rinna 词汇手势留下了更好的印象，这表明基于概念的手势生成系统对于个性化词汇的有用性。这项研究为具有个性化词汇的对话代理的手势生成系统的开发提供了见解。 本文研究如何为具有个性化词汇的对话代理标注短语，并通过基于概念的方法将文本映射到手势。 Naoki Wake,Machiko Sato,Kazuhiro Sasabuchi,Minako Nakamura,Katsushi Ikeuchi cs.RO

authors_text: Takayuki Nishio,Yusuke Koda,Jihong Park,Mehdi Bennis,Klaus Doppler
title: When Wireless Communications Meet Computer Vision in Beyond 5G
title_zh: 当无线通信与 5G 之外的计算机视觉相遇
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures; This work has been submitted to IEEE Communications Standards Magazine for possible publication
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures; This work has been submitted to IEEE Communications Standards Magazine for possible publication
abstract: This article articulates the emerging paradigm, sitting at the confluence of computer vision and wireless communication, to enable beyond-5G/6G mission-critical applications (autonomous/remote-controlled vehicles, visuo-haptic VR, and other cyber-physical applications). First, drawing on recent advances in machine learning and the availability of non-RF data, vision-aided wireless networks are shown to significantly enhance the reliability of wireless communication without sacrificing spectral efficiency. In particular, we demonstrate how computer vision enables {look-ahead} prediction in a millimeter-wave channel blockage scenario, before the blockage actually happens. From a computer vision perspective, we highlight how radio frequency (RF) based sensing and imaging are instrumental in robustifying computer vision applications against occlusion and failure. This is corroborated via an RF-based image reconstruction use case, showcasing a receiver-side image failure correction resulting in reduced retransmission and latency. Taken together, this article sheds light on the much-needed convergence of RF and non-RF modalities to enable ultra-reliable communication and truly intelligent 6G networks.
summary: This article articulates the emerging paradigm, sitting at the confluence of computer vision and wireless communication, to enable beyond-5G/6G mission-critical applications (autonomous/remote-controlled vehicles, visuo-haptic VR, and other cyber-physical applications). First, drawing on recent advances in machine learning and the availability of non-RF data, vision-aided wireless networks are shown to significantly enhance the reliability of wireless communication without sacrificing spectral efficiency. In particular, we demonstrate how computer vision enables {look-ahead} prediction in a millimeter-wave channel blockage scenario, before the blockage actually happens. From a computer vision perspective, we highlight how radio frequency (RF) based sensing and imaging are instrumental in robustifying computer vision applications against occlusion and failure. This is corroborated via an RF-based image reconstruction use case, showcasing a receiver-side image failure correction resulting in reduced retransmission and latency. Taken together, this article sheds light on the much-needed convergence of RF and non-RF modalities to enable ultra-reliable communication and truly intelligent 6G networks.
abstract_zh: 本文阐述了计算机视觉和无线通信融合的新兴范例，以实现超越 5G/6G 的关键任务应用（自动/遥控车辆、视觉触觉 VR 和其他网络物理应用）。首先，利用机器学习的最新进展和非射频数据的可用性，视觉辅助无线网络被证明可以在不牺牲频谱效率的情况下显着提高无线通信的可靠性。特别是，我们演示了计算机视觉如何在毫米波信道阻塞场景中（在阻塞实际发生之前）实现“前瞻”预测。从计算机视觉的角度来看，我们重点介绍基于射频 (RF) 的传感和成像如何有助于增强计算机视觉应用，防止遮挡和故障。基于 RF 的图像重建用例证实了这一点，展示了接收器端图像故障校正，从而减少了重传和延迟。综上所述，本文阐明了急需的射频和非射频模式融合，以实现超可靠的通信和真正智能的 6G 网络。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将计算机视觉与无线通信结合，以支持超越5G/6G的关键任务应用，如自动驾驶和增强现实。
AI.motivation: 现有无线通信在毫米波阻塞和高可靠性需求下存在局限，需融合计算机视觉等非射频技术提升网络性能。
AI.method: 利用机器学习和非射频数据构建视觉辅助无线网络，通过预测毫米波信道阻塞和RF图像重建技术增强通信可靠性。
AI.result: 实现了阻塞前的预测性通信调整和接收端图像修复，降低了重传率与延迟。
AI.conclusion: 射频与非射频模态的融合是构建超可靠6G网络的关键，需进一步推动跨学科技术整合。

authors_text: Nahid Parvez Farazi,Tanvir Ahamed,Limon Barua,Bo Zou
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning and Transportation Research: A Comprehensive Review
title_zh: 深度强化学习和交通研究：综合回顾
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is an emerging methodology that is transforming the way many complicated transportation decision-making problems are tackled. Researchers have been increasingly turning to this powerful learning-based methodology to solve challenging problems across transportation fields. While many promising applications have been reported in the literature, there remains a lack of comprehensive synthesis of the many DRL algorithms and their uses and adaptations. The objective of this paper is to fill this gap by conducting a comprehensive, synthesized review of DRL applications in transportation. We start by offering an overview of the DRL mathematical background, popular and promising DRL algorithms, and some highly effective DRL extensions. Building on this overview, a systematic investigation of about 150 DRL studies that have appeared in the transportation literature, divided into seven different categories, is performed. Building on this review, we continue to examine the applicability, strengths, shortcomings, and common and application-specific issues of DRL techniques with regard to their applications in transportation. In the end, we recommend directions for future research and present available resources for actually implementing DRL.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is an emerging methodology that is transforming the way many complicated transportation decision-making problems are tackled. Researchers have been increasingly turning to this powerful learning-based methodology to solve challenging problems across transportation fields. While many promising applications have been reported in the literature, there remains a lack of comprehensive synthesis of the many DRL algorithms and their uses and adaptations. The objective of this paper is to fill this gap by conducting a comprehensive, synthesized review of DRL applications in transportation. We start by offering an overview of the DRL mathematical background, popular and promising DRL algorithms, and some highly effective DRL extensions. Building on this overview, a systematic investigation of about 150 DRL studies that have appeared in the transportation literature, divided into seven different categories, is performed. Building on this review, we continue to examine the applicability, strengths, shortcomings, and common and application-specific issues of DRL techniques with regard to their applications in transportation. In the end, we recommend directions for future research and present available resources for actually implementing DRL.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习 (DRL) 是一种新兴方法，它正在改变许多复杂交通决策问题的解决方式。研究人员越来越多地转向这种强大的基于学习的方法来解决交通领域的挑战性问题。尽管文献中已经报道了许多有前途的应用，但仍然缺乏对许多 DRL 算法及其用途和适应性的全面综合。本文的目的是通过对 DRL 在交通运输中的应用进行全面、综合的审查来填补这一空白。我们首先概述 DRL 数学背景、流行且有前途的 DRL 算法以及一些高效的 DRL 扩展。在此概述的基础上，对交通文献中出现的约 150 项 DRL 研究进行了系统调查，分为七个不同的类别。在此审查的基础上，我们继续研究 DRL 技术在交通运输中的适用性、优点、缺点以及常见和特定应用问题。最后，我们推荐了未来的研究方向，并提供了实际实施 DRL 的可用资源。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾深度强化学习（DRL）在交通领域的应用，分析其算法、适应性及挑战，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管DRL在交通领域应用广泛，但缺乏对算法及其应用的全面综述，导致技术适应性与问题未被充分讨论。
AI.method: 通过概述DRL数学基础与算法，系统分析约150篇交通领域文献，按七类问题分类探讨DRL的适用性、优势、缺陷及具体问题。
AI.result: 总结DRL在交通决策中的应用现状，揭示其在复杂环境中的有效性及计算成本、泛化能力等局限性。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来研究关注算法优化与跨领域适应性，同时提供DRL实施资源以促进实际应用。

authors_text: Anwaar Ulhaq,Oliver Burmeister
title: COVID-19 Imaging Data Privacy by Federated Learning Design: A Theoretical Framework
title_zh: 联合学习设计的 COVID-19 成像数据隐私：理论框架
comment: 2 images, 0 Table,8 pages
comments: 2 images, 0 Table,8 pages
abstract: To address COVID-19 healthcare challenges, we need frequent sharing of health data, knowledge and resources at a global scale. However, in this digital age, data privacy is a big concern that requires the secure embedding of privacy assurance into the design of all technological solutions that use health data. In this paper, we introduce differential privacy by design (dPbD) framework and discuss its embedding into the federated machine learning system. To limit the scope of our paper, we focus on the problem scenario of COVID-19 imaging data privacy for disease diagnosis by computer vision and deep learning approaches. We discuss the evaluation of the proposed design of federated machine learning systems and discuss how differential privacy by design (dPbD) framework can enhance data privacy in federated learning systems with scalability and robustness. We argue that scalable differentially private federated learning design is a promising solution for building a secure, private and collaborative machine learning model such as required to combat COVID19 challenge.
summary: To address COVID-19 healthcare challenges, we need frequent sharing of health data, knowledge and resources at a global scale. However, in this digital age, data privacy is a big concern that requires the secure embedding of privacy assurance into the design of all technological solutions that use health data. In this paper, we introduce differential privacy by design (dPbD) framework and discuss its embedding into the federated machine learning system. To limit the scope of our paper, we focus on the problem scenario of COVID-19 imaging data privacy for disease diagnosis by computer vision and deep learning approaches. We discuss the evaluation of the proposed design of federated machine learning systems and discuss how differential privacy by design (dPbD) framework can enhance data privacy in federated learning systems with scalability and robustness. We argue that scalable differentially private federated learning design is a promising solution for building a secure, private and collaborative machine learning model such as required to combat COVID19 challenge.
abstract_zh: 为了应对 COVID-19 医疗挑战，我们需要在全球范围内频繁共享健康数据、知识和资源。然而，在这个数字时代，数据隐私是一个大问题，需要将隐私保证安全地嵌入到所有使用健康数据的技术解决方案的设计中。在本文中，我们介绍了差分隐私设计（dPbD）框架，并讨论了将其嵌入到联邦机器学习系统中。为了限制我们论文的范围，我们重点关注通过计算机视觉和深度学习方法进行疾病诊断的 COVID-19 成像数据隐私问题场景。我们讨论了对联邦机器学习系统的拟议设计的评估，并讨论了差分隐私设计（dPbD）框架如何通过可扩展性和鲁棒性增强联邦学习系统中的数据隐私。我们认为，可扩展的差分隐私联合学习设计是构建安全、隐私和协作机器学习模型（例如应对新冠肺炎挑战所需的模型）的一种有前景的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合差分隐私设计的联邦学习框架，以解决COVID-19影像数据隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 为应对全球数据共享中的隐私风险，需在技术设计中嵌入隐私保障，尤其针对COVID-19影像数据的隐私挑战。
AI.method: 通过引入差分隐私设计框架（dPbD），将其嵌入联邦学习系统，评估其在可扩展性和鲁棒性方面的表现。
AI.result: 提出的设计有效增强了联邦学习系统的数据隐私，同时保持了系统的可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 可扩展的差分隐私联邦学习设计为应对COVID-19挑战提供了安全、私密的协作机器学习模型解决方案。

search_text: COVID-19 Imaging Data Privacy by Federated Learning Design: A Theoretical Framework 联合学习设计的 COVID-19 成像数据隐私：理论框架 To address COVID-19 healthcare challenges, we need frequent sharing of health data, knowledge and resources at a global scale. However, in this digital age, data privacy is a big concern that requires the secure embedding of privacy assurance into the design of all technological solutions that use health data. In this paper, we introduce differential privacy by design (dPbD) framework and discuss its embedding into the federated machine learning system. To limit the scope of our paper, we focus on the problem scenario of COVID-19 imaging data privacy for disease diagnosis by computer vision and deep learning approaches. We discuss the evaluation of the proposed design of federated machine learning systems and discuss how differential privacy by design (dPbD) framework can enhance data privacy in federated learning systems with scalability and robustness. We argue that scalable differentially private federated learning design is a promising solution for building a secure, private and collaborative machine learning model such as required to combat COVID19 challenge. 为了应对 COVID-19 医疗挑战，我们需要在全球范围内频繁共享健康数据、知识和资源。然而，在这个数字时代，数据隐私是一个大问题，需要将隐私保证安全地嵌入到所有使用健康数据的技术解决方案的设计中。在本文中，我们介绍了差分隐私设计（dPbD）框架，并讨论了将其嵌入到联邦机器学习系统中。为了限制我们论文的范围，我们重点关注通过计算机视觉和深度学习方法进行疾病诊断的 COVID-19 成像数据隐私问题场景。我们讨论了对联邦机器学习系统的拟议设计的评估，并讨论了差分隐私设计（dPbD）框架如何通过可扩展性和鲁棒性增强联邦学习系统中的数据隐私。我们认为，可扩展的差分隐私联合学习设计是构建安全、隐私和协作机器学习模型（例如应对新冠肺炎挑战所需的模型）的一种有前景的解决方案。 提出一种结合差分隐私设计的联邦学习框架，以解决COVID-19影像数据隐私问题。 Anwaar Ulhaq,Oliver Burmeister cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yibo Yang,Hongyang Li,Shan You,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Zhouchen Lin
title: ISTA-NAS: Efficient and Consistent Neural Architecture Search by Sparse Coding
title_zh: ISTA-NAS：通过稀疏编码进行高效一致的神经架构搜索
comment: NeurIPS 2020
comments: NeurIPS 2020
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) aims to produce the optimal sparse solution from a high-dimensional space spanned by all candidate connections. Current gradient-based NAS methods commonly ignore the constraint of sparsity in the search phase, but project the optimized solution onto a sparse one by post-processing. As a result, the dense super-net for search is inefficient to train and has a gap with the projected architecture for evaluation. In this paper, we formulate neural architecture search as a sparse coding problem. We perform the differentiable search on a compressed lower-dimensional space that has the same validation loss as the original sparse solution space, and recover an architecture by solving the sparse coding problem. The differentiable search and architecture recovery are optimized in an alternate manner. By doing so, our network for search at each update satisfies the sparsity constraint and is efficient to train. In order to also eliminate the depth and width gap between the network in search and the target-net in evaluation, we further propose a method to search and evaluate in one stage under the target-net settings. When training finishes, architecture variables are absorbed into network weights. Thus we get the searched architecture and optimized parameters in a single run. In experiments, our two-stage method on CIFAR-10 requires only 0.05 GPU-day for search. Our one-stage method produces state-of-the-art performances on both CIFAR-10 and ImageNet at the cost of only evaluation time.
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS) aims to produce the optimal sparse solution from a high-dimensional space spanned by all candidate connections. Current gradient-based NAS methods commonly ignore the constraint of sparsity in the search phase, but project the optimized solution onto a sparse one by post-processing. As a result, the dense super-net for search is inefficient to train and has a gap with the projected architecture for evaluation. In this paper, we formulate neural architecture search as a sparse coding problem. We perform the differentiable search on a compressed lower-dimensional space that has the same validation loss as the original sparse solution space, and recover an architecture by solving the sparse coding problem. The differentiable search and architecture recovery are optimized in an alternate manner. By doing so, our network for search at each update satisfies the sparsity constraint and is efficient to train. In order to also eliminate the depth and width gap between the network in search and the target-net in evaluation, we further propose a method to search and evaluate in one stage under the target-net settings. When training finishes, architecture variables are absorbed into network weights. Thus we get the searched architecture and optimized parameters in a single run. In experiments, our two-stage method on CIFAR-10 requires only 0.05 GPU-day for search. Our one-stage method produces state-of-the-art performances on both CIFAR-10 and ImageNet at the cost of only evaluation time.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）旨在从所有候选连接跨越的高维空间中生成最佳稀疏解决方案。当前基于梯度的NAS方法通常忽略搜索阶段稀疏性的约束，而是通过后处理将优化解投影到稀疏解上。因此，用于搜索的密集超级网络训练效率低下，并且与预计的评估架构存在差距。在本文中，我们将神经架构搜索表述为稀疏编码问题。我们在与原始稀疏解空间具有相同验证损失的压缩低维空间上执行可微搜索，并通过解决稀疏编码问题来恢复体系结构。可微搜索和架构恢复以交替方式进行优化。通过这样做，我们的每次更新搜索网络都满足稀疏性约束，并且训练效率很高。为了消除搜索网络与评估目标网络之间的深度和宽度差距，我们进一步提出了一种在目标网络设置下在一个阶段进行搜索和评估的方法。训练完成后，架构变量将被吸收到网络权重中。因此，我们在一次运行中获得了搜索到的架构和优化的参数。在实验中，我们在 CIFAR-10 上的两阶段方法仅需要 0.05 GPU 天的搜索时间。我们的一阶段方法只需花费评估时间即可在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 上产生最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ISTA-NAS方法，通过稀疏编码解决神经架构搜索（NAS）中效率与一致性问题，实现高效且一致的架构搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的NAS方法在搜索阶段忽略稀疏性约束，导致超级网络训练低效且与评估架构存在差距。
AI.method: 将NAS建模为稀疏编码问题，在低维压缩空间进行可微分搜索，交替优化架构恢复；提出单阶段方法在目标网络设置下同步搜索与评估，最终吸收架构变量至网络权重。
AI.result: 两阶段方法在CIFAR-10上仅需0.05 GPU天，单阶段方法在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上达到SOTA性能，且无需额外搜索时间。
AI.conclusion: ISTA-NAS通过稀疏编码约束实现高效搜索，解决了NAS中效率与一致性矛盾，在多个数据集上验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Mauricio Gonzalez-Soto,Ivan R. Feliciano-Avelino,L. Enrique Sucar,Hugo J. Escalante Balderas
title: Causal Structure Learning: a Bayesian approach based on random graphs
title_zh: 因果结构学习：基于随机图的贝叶斯方法
abstract: A Random Graph is a random object which take its values in the space of graphs. We take advantage of the expressibility of graphs in order to model the uncertainty about the existence of causal relationships within a given set of variables. We adopt a Bayesian point of view in order to capture a causal structure via interaction and learning with a causal environment. We test our method over two different scenarios, and the experiments mainly confirm that our technique can learn a causal structure. Furthermore, the experiments and results presented for the first test scenario demonstrate the usefulness of our method to learn a causal structure as well as the optimal action. On the other hand the second experiment, shows that our proposal manages to learn the underlying causal structure of several tasks with different sizes and different causal structures.
summary: A Random Graph is a random object which take its values in the space of graphs. We take advantage of the expressibility of graphs in order to model the uncertainty about the existence of causal relationships within a given set of variables. We adopt a Bayesian point of view in order to capture a causal structure via interaction and learning with a causal environment. We test our method over two different scenarios, and the experiments mainly confirm that our technique can learn a causal structure. Furthermore, the experiments and results presented for the first test scenario demonstrate the usefulness of our method to learn a causal structure as well as the optimal action. On the other hand the second experiment, shows that our proposal manages to learn the underlying causal structure of several tasks with different sizes and different causal structures.
abstract_zh: 随机图是在图空间中获取其值的随机对象。我们利用图形的可表达性来对给定变量集内因果关系存在的不确定性进行建模。我们采用贝叶斯观点，通过与因果环境的交互和学习来捕获因果结构。我们在两种不同的场景中测试我们的方法，实验主要证实我们的技术可以学习因果结构。此外，第一个测试场景的实验和结果证明了我们的方法在学习因果结构以及最佳行动方面的有用性。另一方面，第二个实验表明，我们的建议成功地学习了具有不同规模和不同因果结构的多个任务的潜在因果结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于随机图的贝叶斯方法，用于学习变量间的因果结构。
AI.motivation: 传统因果结构学习方法在处理不确定性及复杂关系时存在局限，而随机图能有效表达因果关系的不确定性，贝叶斯框架适合建模这种不确定性。
AI.method: 采用随机图建模因果关系的不确定性，结合贝叶斯方法通过交互学习因果环境，利用两种不同场景进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效学习因果结构及最优动作，适用于不同规模和复杂度的因果任务。
AI.conclusion: 基于随机图的贝叶斯方法在因果结构学习中表现有效，可处理多样化任务场景。

search_text: Causal Structure Learning: a Bayesian approach based on random graphs 因果结构学习：基于随机图的贝叶斯方法 A Random Graph is a random object which take its values in the space of graphs. We take advantage of the expressibility of graphs in order to model the uncertainty about the existence of causal relationships within a given set of variables. We adopt a Bayesian point of view in order to capture a causal structure via interaction and learning with a causal environment. We test our method over two different scenarios, and the experiments mainly confirm that our technique can learn a causal structure. Furthermore, the experiments and results presented for the first test scenario demonstrate the usefulness of our method to learn a causal structure as well as the optimal action. On the other hand the second experiment, shows that our proposal manages to learn the underlying causal structure of several tasks with different sizes and different causal structures. 随机图是在图空间中获取其值的随机对象。我们利用图形的可表达性来对给定变量集内因果关系存在的不确定性进行建模。我们采用贝叶斯观点，通过与因果环境的交互和学习来捕获因果结构。我们在两种不同的场景中测试我们的方法，实验主要证实我们的技术可以学习因果结构。此外，第一个测试场景的实验和结果证明了我们的方法在学习因果结构以及最佳行动方面的有用性。另一方面，第二个实验表明，我们的建议成功地学习了具有不同规模和不同因果结构的多个任务的潜在因果结构。 本文提出一种基于随机图的贝叶斯方法，用于学习变量间的因果结构。 Mauricio Gonzalez-Soto,Ivan R. Feliciano-Avelino,L. Enrique Sucar,Hugo J. Escalante Balderas cs.AI

authors_text: Yichi Zhang,Qingcheng Liao,Le Ding,Jicong Zhang
title: Bridging 2D and 3D Segmentation Networks for Computation Efficient Volumetric Medical Image Segmentation: An Empirical Study of 2.5D Solutions
title_zh: 连接 2D 和 3D 分割网络以实现计算高效的体积医学图像分割：2.5D 解决方案的实证研究
comment: Computerized Medical Imaging and Graphics
comments: Computerized Medical Imaging and Graphics
abstract: Recently, deep convolutional neural networks have achieved great success for medical image segmentation. However, unlike segmentation of natural images, most medical images such as MRI and CT are volumetric data. In order to make full use of volumetric information, 3D CNNs are widely used. However, 3D CNNs suffer from higher inference time and computation cost, which hinders their further clinical applications. Additionally, with the increased number of parameters, the risk of overfitting is higher, especially for medical images where data and annotations are expensive to acquire. To issue this problem, many 2.5D segmentation methods have been proposed to make use of volumetric spatial information with less computation cost. Despite these works lead to improvements on a variety of segmentation tasks, to the best of our knowledge, there has not previously been a large-scale empirical comparison of these methods. In this paper, we aim to present a review of the latest developments of 2.5D methods for volumetric medical image segmentation. Additionally, to compare the performance and effectiveness of these methods, we provide an empirical study of these methods on three representative segmentation tasks involving different modalities and targets. Our experimental results highlight that 3D CNNs may not always be the best choice. Despite all these 2.5D methods can bring performance gains to 2D baseline, not all the methods hold the benefits on different datasets. We hope the results and conclusions of our study will prove useful for the community on exploring and developing efficient volumetric medical image segmentation methods.

abstract_zh: 最近，深度卷积神经网络在医学图像分割方面取得了巨大成功。然而，与自然图像的分割不同，大多数医学图像（例如 MRI 和 CT）都是体积数据。为了充分利用体积信息，3D CNN 被广泛使用。然而，3D CNN 的推理时间和计算成本较高，这阻碍了其进一步的临床应用。此外，随着参数数量的增加，过度拟合的风险也会更高，特别是对于获取数据和注释成本昂贵的医学图像。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了许多 2.5D 分割方法，以较少的计算成本利用体积空间信息。尽管这些工作导致了各种分割任务的改进，但据我们所知，之前还没有对这些方法进行大规模的实证比较。在本文中，我们旨在回顾 2.5D 体医学图像分割方法的最新进展。此外，为了比较这些方法的性能和有效性，我们在涉及不同模式和目标的三个代表性分割任务上对这些方法进行了实证研究。我们的实验结果表明，3D CNN 可能并不总是最佳选择。尽管所有这些 2.5D 方法都可以为 2D 基线带来性能提升，但并非所有方法都在不同数据集上具有优势。我们希望我们的研究结果和结论能够对社区探索和开发有效的体积医学图像分割方法有用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在回顾并比较2.5D方法在医学影像分割中的性能，探索更高效的体积分割方案。
AI.motivation: 3D卷积网络虽能处理医学影像的体积信息，但计算成本高且易过拟合，而现有2.5D方法缺乏大规模对比研究。
AI.method: 通过在三种不同模态和目标的分割任务上进行实验，对多种2.5D方法进行实证比较。
AI.result: 实验表明3D网络并非始终最优，部分2.5D方法在不同数据集上表现不一。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为开发高效医学影像分割方法提供了参考，需根据具体任务选择合适方案。
